- Reach the requirements in the Imaginarium Theater performance challenge to gain Keys of Echoes.\nEvery 2 Keys you consume allows you to unlock 1 character's Envisaged Echoes stage. After completing the challenges, you can obtain that character's Echo cosmetic. ｜ 在「幻想真境剧诗」的演出挑战中达成一定条件，可以领取游迹钥匙。\n每消耗2把游迹钥匙，即可解锁一个角色的「绘想游迹」挑战关卡。完成挑战后，可以获得对应角色的游迹外观奖励。

- A book on the cultures and customs of Liyue originally compiled by Fadhlan, a scholar from Sumeru residing in Liyue. It was then edited by many local scholars and published. It is one of the bestsellers in Liyue. ｜ 记录璃月港本土风俗的专著，最初由旅居璃月的须弥旅行学者法德兰编写，而后经过了诸多璃月本地学者的编校，在璃月广为出版流传。

- Pure elemental life-forms composed of drifting Anemo particles, as free and unbound as the butterflies they resemble.\nA glittering Anemo creature that is the product of rising and condensing elements, and which feeds off the ubiquitous power of Anemo.\nThey say that the flapping of a butterfly's wings has the power to whip up a storm. But within the Serenitea Pot, that raging storm will become a comfortable breeze. ｜ 空气中飘荡不定的风元素微粒聚合而成的纯粹元素生命，同蛱蝶一般悠游。\n闪光的风元素生物，是元素上升凝合而成的产物，以无处不在的风元素维生。\n传说蝴蝶的振翅有着掀起风暴的力量，而在这「尘歌壶」中，狂躁的风暴也会化为舒适的清风。

- A magnificent, intricately designed four-sided lantern featuring a lampshade in the traditional style of Liyue's overhanging eaves, specially commissioned by the Ministry of Civil Affairs in celebration of the Lantern Rite. When lit, the scenes within will gradually begin to spin, presenting to the viewer an ever-changing procession of stunning sights. ｜ 外形华贵，内构精巧的四角灯具，使用了璃月常用的飞檐型灯罩，内置旋转机构与各色灯景，外连「烟花筒」，是总务司专为庆祝海灯节而定制的灯具。当灯火燃起时，灯具内置的灯景便会缓缓更迭旋转，让无数美丽的景色依次浮现…

In her own words, this is part of her "duty to take care of everyone." ｜ 可见于海沫村的棚屋，结构极简，用料也相当节省，只凭一位美露莘就能轻松完成搭建。\n传说，这是某位年龄稍大的美露莘特意建成的棚屋，如此一来，便能防止瀑布飞溅而出，或是洞顶坠落的水珠将妹妹们心爱的物品彻底打湿。用她的话来说，这就是「照顾大家的义务」。

- A gamepiece based on Ruin Guards.\nAn ancient humanoid war machine armed with "explosive firepower" that can be found all over Teyvat. The armed services of various nations often use it as the default hypothetical enemy, and look for ways to destroy them from medium to long range. This is because the immense power they possess would utterly overwhelm ordinary people, and engaging in close combat with them is a very bad idea. Based on preliminary analysis, Ruin Guards are far more destructive towards buildings than to small, agile units, and so they have been designated as playing the role of the terrifyingly strong battering ram in this simulation. ｜ 以「遗迹守卫」为原型的兵棋。\n古老的人形战斗机械，拥有着「爆炸性的火力」，广泛可见于提瓦特多地，常被各方将士预设为假想敌，寻找在中远距离上击毁它的方法。这是因为它拥有常人难以抵抗的巨大力劲，与其接近作战并不是个好主意。根据分析，遗迹守卫对于建筑物的破坏力比灵活的小型单位更为突出，因此，遗迹守卫在推演中扮演了攻城锤那般分量惊人的角色。
- That ill-tempered fogey then proceeded to blame me all the more for "not considering user needs" and "lacking awareness of practical circumstances." It was a real tongue-lashing, I'll tell you that. ｜ 事后那个臭脾气的老头，更是斥责我「没有考虑用户需求」、「无法满足实际情况」，把我狠批了一顿。

- The current disguises in this Contested Zone are: <color=#FFCC33>wine kegs and wooden crates</color>.\nThe chase continues even in the dark woods.\nDisguising oneself as wine kegs or wooden crates in an area populated by barely anyone is clearly not a smart call.\nPerhaps the darkness itself and the interference of the ghostly flames will provide some unexpected concealment... ｜ 当前「周旋之地」中的伪装物：<color=#FFCC33>酒桶、木箱</color>。\n阴森的山林中，追捕仍在继续。\n在人迹罕至之地，以木桶和木箱作为伪装，显然不是明智之举。\n或许利用昏暗的环境与鬼火的干扰，能达到意想不到的隐藏效果…
- And then they'll sentence me to all kinds of work, which'll really cut into my time for napping. ｜ 接下来可能还有惩罚性的强制工作，那我就少了好多睡觉的时间。
- "I barely earn enough carrying these stones. But with a single order of carrying something like cans of knowledge, I could afford to get married back at my hometown." ｜ 「天天搬这些破石头又赚不到钱，要是能让我贩运点什么知识罐头之类的东西出去，只要干成一单就能回老家结婚了。」
- Weird, it's bigger on the inside than Paimon imagined. Are you sure it's still a work in progress? ｜ 奇怪，里面比想象中要大，真的还没有完工吗？

- Friendly Hilichurl ｜ 友好的丘丘人
- Duniya ｜ 度尼娅

- The water level has been lowered! There's the Zohrah Mushroom! ｜ 水面下降了！「须罗蕈」在那里！

- *grunt* Morning... ｜ 嗯…早…
- None of them could figure out what it was? That seems strange... ｜ 看不出病吗？该不会…

This effect can be triggered once every 0.2s. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>炎啸狮子咬</color>的炽鬃拳与焚落踢命中敌人时，将为迪希雅恢复1.5点元素能量，并基于生命值上限的2.5%，为迪希雅恢复生命值。该效果每0.2秒至多触发一次。

- H—Hey, not so loud...! ｜ 别、别这么大声…
- Happy birthday! It's amazing to think that you were born on this day, years ago in the past. Do you have a birthday wish? If it involves going somewhere dangerous, let me join you — I'll be your guard. Or if you're looking to rest and revitalize, come to Aaru Village, and I'll serve you the finest meats and drinks we have. ｜ 祝你生日快乐！多了不起啊，你在过去某年某月的这一天出生了。有什么想要实现的愿望吗。如果要去险远之处，我就作你旅途的护卫。若是想稍作休息，那就来阿如村，我用最好的烤肉和饮料招待你。
- Together with Paimon, you describe to the old man what you heard about Agnes from Caterpillar. As you speak, Lanoire supplements the tale with a few childish words of her own... ｜ 和派蒙一起，向老人讲述了从卡特皮拉那里听来的关于艾格妮丝的事，其间，莉诺尔也用稚嫩的话语做了一些补足…
- #Nara {NICKNAME} is right. Be careful of those bad "sand grains" and their wicked thoughts. ｜ #那菈{NICKNAME}说得对，要小心「沙子」冒出来，小心「沙子」的坏心思。
- She exercises wondrous command of this folk art. So absorbed was I in the performance that I forgot to drink even a single cup of the tea I had ordered. ｜ 云先生的曲艺造化神妙无比，我明明点了一壶茶，但整场戏结束，都没记起来喝一杯。
- Are you waiting for someone? ｜ 在等人吗？
- Oh, Paimon almost forgot that you're also from Haravatat... ｜ 差点忘了你也是知论派的…
- I'll keep waiting for you here then. ｜ 那么我就继续在这里等你们了。

- Ah, I see. That's alright. ｜ 这样啊，没关系的。

- She, too, approves of me, of course! Alright, Rashnu, will you come with me to the Vourukasha Oasis? ｜ 前辈她当然也是认可的！好了，拉沙鲁，你愿意同我一道回甘露花海吗？

- As for what potions you should brew next, we'll need to consult the news from the market. ｜ 至于之后要炼制什么样的药剂，就要参考市场消息了。
- ...All this way, right from when we set out from the Children of Echoes, this girl's been clutching that bag with all her documents in as if it were a baby. ｜ …这家伙把自己装文献的包捂得死紧，从「回声之子」那边一直走到这里。

- Of course not. I'd be honored! ｜ 好的！这是我的荣幸！
- But why would you be looking for people to play Genius Invokation in a place like this? Don't people usually come here to fight? ｜ 你一直在这里找人打牌吗？可这里明明是打架的地方呀？
- Desert Watch ｜ 沙海守望

- Oh, Paimon... one more thing: ｜ 哦对了派蒙。

- If so... sorry, Bennett, but you really did miss it. He got paired up with a different instructor instead. ｜ 如果是这样…班尼特，你确实来晚了，那位新人已经找其他教官组队了哦。
- Beats me. All I know is that he dropped by in a hurry the other day and left this letter. ｜ 那我可就不知道了。前段时间，他匆匆忙忙地过来，交给我了这封信。
- Never mind that! I have something important to tell you. Come with me! ｜ 很重要的事！总之，先跟我去一个没人的地方！
- So this is an excellent way to raise funds. Let's set off right away, Sir. ｜ 所以这也正是我们筹集经费的好方法，咱们快点出发吧，先生。
- I see... I never expected that other people would be burying things in the same place. ｜ 原来是这样…没想到除了我之外，还有别的人会在那里埋东西。

- (Did Rosaria just... smile?) ｜ （罗莎莉亚刚才…是不是笑了？）

- You'd forgive me, right? ｜ 你们会理解我的，对吗？

- Now all has been revealed. ｜ 故事到此为止。
- Traveler, do you have any information? ｜ 旅行者，你那边有什么信息吗？

- At that point, everything had fallen apart. But the more such things happen, the more we want a simple, happy ending. ｜ 那时候，一切已经四分五裂了。但越是这样，我们就越想要一个简单的、快乐的结局…

- I never said that...! His strength may exceed mine by a hair's breadth... But in astrology alone, he doesn't come close! ｜ 谁、谁说的！他不过是实力险胜一筹而已，单论占星术可比我差远了！

- It's been a little tiring. ｜ 有些疲惫。

- Eventually, you get used to the unpleasant odor of straw, mold, and rust, and find yourselves alternating between fits of drowsiness and despair... ｜ 等你们终于习惯了那稻草、霉菌与铁锈混合而成的肮脏气味，在绝望与睡意侵扰之间左右徘徊的时候…

- New research project, Timaeus? ｜ 研究哪种东西？

- Furuya Noboru's intel is actually pretty good. ｜ 古谷升的消息可真灵通啊。

- Too hard? How can you complain? We're talking about your own survival there! ｜ 太麻烦了？…为了生存怎么可以嫌麻烦呢…
- Boss, how did other people find their way here? We... ｜ 老大，怎么还有其他人找到这地方了？咱们…
- Hahaha, that's alright! I've heard many stories about her from the rest of the Spina. They've always said that they were sure we would have gotten along famously. ｜ 哈哈哈，没关系，我听刺玫会里很多人讲过她的故事，他们都说我和我母亲一定合得来。
- Wow. This'll make things much easier! ｜ 哇，那还真的挺方便的！
- Am I not a good boss? ｜ 难道我不是个好老板吗？

- Well, okay then... I'll wait for you here. ｜ 那好吧…我在这里等你们。

- How's the situation at the Mikage Furnace? ｜ 「御影炉心」还好吗？
- I'm afraid we rangers will be battling the Withering Zones here for a long time until a cure is found. ｜ 我们巡林员，恐怕还要长久地和死域战斗下去。
- Reach the nameless island northeast of Mondstadt. ｜ 到达蒙德东北方的无名小岛。
- Looks like we can't come to an agreement, then... ｜ 看来是谈不拢了啊…
- I'll even be able to visit other places for training. I'll go wherever I want and sleep wherever I want! ｜ 我还有独自去其他地方修行的权利，想去什么地方就可以去什么地方，想在哪里睡觉就在哪里睡觉。
- "No hard feelings, I hope..." ｜ 「希望你不要觉得难过…」
- Wonderful. Thank you, dears. ｜ 那就太好了，就拜托你们了。

- Yeah! Mr. Leroy treats me really well. Mr. Son-in-Law, does he not live here anymore? ｜ 对，勒鲁瓦先生对我特别好。女婿叔叔，他是不住在这里了吗？
- My apologies for interrupting, Ms. Mamere, Ms. Puca. Considering our surroundings, I suggest that we leave this place post-haste to avoid further attacks. ｜ 很抱歉打断两位的对话，玛梅赫小姐，芙佳小姐。然而，考虑到目前的环境，我建议几位尽快离开这里，以免再次遭到袭击。

- A dragon ruin from antiquity. Within it are hidden large devices that can affect the Ley Lines. You must make every second count if The Captain and Ororon's radical plan is to be stopped. ｜ 远古时期留下的龙之遗迹，其中隐藏着能够影响地脉的大型装置。只有抓紧每分每秒，才有机会阻止队长和欧洛伦的激进做法。
- Why are there seven people all striving to have a relationship with a single male protagonist? Is this some sort of narrative device, too? ｜ 为什么有七个人都执着于和男主角缔结关系，这也是「设定」吗？
- It seems like they've been planning this for some time. We started investigating as soon as we received your letter yesterday. ｜ 应该是蓄谋已久的行动，在昨天收到了你寄来的信之后，我就和刺玫会成员一同去调查。

- You can find many Excerpts of Bliss scattered throughout Simulanka.\nCollect Jubilant Feathers and open Fairytale Troves to obtain these Excerpts and get other valuable items and rewards...\nYou can more easily obtain Excerpts when you have either the Jocund Letter or Joyous Letter equipped. ｜ 在「希穆兰卡」各地，散落着大量「悠乐片段」。\n通过收集「欢声飞羽」和开启「童话宝箱」，即可获得「悠乐片段」，赢取珍贵的物资等奖励…\n装备并使用「轻愉信笺」或「欢跃信笺」后，即可更轻松地获取「悠乐片段」。

- Package of Fresh Flowers ｜ 装有鲜花的包裹

- I am uninclined to eat a heavy meal this luncheon, but instead indulge in some baked treats. As long as I eat in the study, my father and brother never have to know! Oh, you want to join me? Well... As long as you don't get crumbs on the books, I suppose it's fine. ｜ 午饭有点不想吃米饭，想吃糕点。待在书斋吃，父亲和兄长就不知道了…嗯？想一起来吗？嗯…只要你不把碎屑沾到书上就行。
- ...Best if you say the bare minimum to me. I don't want to deplete my stamina. ｜ …最好别和我说太多话，会消耗我的体力。

- Redhead ｜ 红发青年

- <color=#00E1FFFF>Help me, that seal, it's very close...</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>帮帮我，那封印，就在附近…</color>
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！

- Talk to Mavuika ｜ 与玛薇卡对话
- Aw, Miko... you sound like a really great friend. ｜ 神子小姐…是个很好的朋友呢。
- Increases Shield Strength by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. Scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color> for 8s. Max 5 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. While protected by a shield, this ATK increase effect is increased by 100%. ｜ 护盾强效提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>。攻击命中后的8秒内，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>4%</color>。该效果至多可叠加5层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。此外，处于护盾庇护下时，该效果的攻击力提升效果提高100%。
- Hahaha, where'd that expression of discontent on your face go, eh? ｜ 刚才一脸不乐意的表情一瞬间就消失了。
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢你。
- My question is: what's the name of those barriers? ｜ 我的问题是，那些障壁的学名是？
- Pyro: DMG Bonus|1 Character {param1:F1P} ｜ 火：伤害提升|1名角色{param1:F1P}
- The Almighty Arataki Extraordinary and Exhilarating Extreme Beetle Brawl appears to have been a great success, and it's now time to return to the brawl grounds to check on Arataki Itto and Grandmaster Hanakado... ｜ 「荒泷极意堂堂斗虫大试合」举办得似乎相当成功，是时候回到场地，看看荒泷一斗和「花角玉将」切磋得怎么样了…
- Logistics Manager ｜ 物资管理人
- Battle reports indicate that the crisis in this area has been resolved by Nusta and her team. Let us hope everything has gone well. ｜ 战报显示，此地的危机已由努斯妲和她的小队前往解决，希望一切顺利。
- Thank you! I'll make note of it for sure... Ah yes, right. This is your repayment, please take it. It's as generous as can be, you know! ｜ 谢谢您！我先记下来…对了，这是您的报酬，请您收好，很丰厚的哦。
- Ah, the Water Droplet lit up that Hydro monument! ｜ 啊，「小水珠」点亮了那块水元素方碑！
- Bona ｜ 玻娜
- Sheikh Zubayr ｜ 谢赫祖拜尔
- Guess Focalors had Fontainians in mind the whole time. In the end, it was thanks to her that they finally became real humans... ｜ 芙卡洛斯果然还是在为枫丹人着想吧，甚至最后枫丹人真正成为人类也是托她的福…
- You surprised me with some of your cards there... It really threw me for a loop. Well done, you win! ｜ 没想到你居然会在牌组里加入那种卡牌…真是出乎意料，这一局是你赢啦。
- They must perform these extra measures in addition to their standard daily affairs. The only manpower they can muster during the festival would be the emergency response units. ｜ 他们还要兼顾日常事务，确实分身乏术。唯一能动用的，就是那几支特别应急小队。
- Well, for example, a colleague once asked me: "Is there anything I can help you with, Ms. Keqing?" ｜ 比如之前有同事问我：「刻晴小姐有什么需要我帮忙的吗？」
- He's only just joined up. Is he really going on quests already? ｜ 他才刚进去没多久，就已经开始在外出任务了吗？
- It's fine. There isn't anything I'd like to read right now. ｜ 算了，没什么想看的。
- He purposely erased it? ｜ 故意…抹去？
- Oh, and please don't open the letter. My father is quite sensitive to things like that — he'll think it's been tampered with. ｜ 对了，信可别拆开了，我老爹还挺敏感的…说不定就觉得这封信是伪造的了。
- Yoriki ｜ 与力
- The different islands are really completely different. Also, it turns out that the shrine can be on such a high mountain. Aren't humans afraid of heights? ｜ 不同的岛，真的完全不一样。而且，原来神社可以在这么高的山上。人类难道不怕高吗？
- Ah, if I don't take good care of her, how can I face my parents? ｜ 唉，要是不照顾好她，我该怎么和二老交代啊…
- Sender's Title 1 ｜ 寄柬者称谓·之一
- It's not Mora, is it? ｜ 总不能是为了报酬吧？
- Hey there, you two. Sorry I've been scarce, I've been buried in marketing and preparing the film for release ever since we wrapped post-production... ｜ 两位好，这不是，剪辑完成之后，我又开始着手于宣传与放映的工作了，实在忙不过来。
- Takatsukasa Clan Retainer ｜ 鹰司家臣
- Eh? But why? That's what Momoyo said, and it's pretty convincing! ｜ 欸，为什么？可这不是百代小姐的原话吗，而且也很有说服力呀！
- Plain Brightwood Shelf ｜ 辉木白本置物架
- #Wow, {NICKNAME} actually got mad... Let's just drop that argument already, okay? ｜ #呜哇…{NICKNAME}真的生气了…你们两个还是不要吵架啦…
- So, for now, we need but just wait patiently. ｜ 现在，就让我们一起慢慢等待吧。
- He's not used to being out and about in the desert... ｜ 他不太擅长在沙漠里行动…
- Besides... Hmph, I finally found someone who is educated. She'd be very useful here. ｜ 而且…哼，总算是找到了一个懂点学问的人了，我留着她可有大用处。
- Plunge DMG|{param8:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param8:F1P}
- Someone wants Hiiragi Chisato to be married as soon as possible, and if my guess is right... it is someone from within the Kanjou Commission. This person is presumably also responsible for the mysterious and misleading letter. ｜ 有人盼望柊千里尽快结婚，如果我的猜想正确…是勘定奉行内部的人。引起两人误会的信，应该也是出自他们之手。
- So... I've been wanting to ask this, but why is Mamere here? ｜ 所以…刚才就想问了，为什么玛梅赫会在这里来着？
- Seems like she's in the zone... talking away to herself... ｜ 她好像在忙呢，嘴里还念念有词…
- Certified player Ahangar. A reliable smith who is equally focused while playing cards, often being able to find the gap in his opponent's defenses and thereby achieve victory. ｜ 协会认证牌手阿汉格尔。可靠的铁匠，打牌的时候就像打铁一样专注，经常能够发现对手的破绽而取得胜利。
- Wait, wait! Stop, let Paimon explain... We're from the Adventurers' Guild. They commissioned us to come here and investigate after the meteor shower. ｜ 啊啊请不要误会！我们是冒险家协会成员，受委托前来调查情况的！
- Activate ｜ 激活
- That's right. No matter what happens, we'll be happy so long as we can play with our shroom buddies, clear challenges with them, and overcome difficulties together! ｜ 嗯！不管怎么样，只要能和蕈兽伙伴们一起玩，一起通过考验，战胜困难，我们就很开心啦！
- But the songs he plays are... a bit archaic? ｜ 不过他的曲子…怎么说呢，有点太古典了？
- An ordinary-looking mushroom with an extraordinary flavor. Only grows near the orchard at Varesa's house. Since Paimon gave it a cute name, its taste must have been truly memorable for her.\n Although these mushrooms are alter egos of the mushroom god, they won't grow forever and are harmless to consume. Thus, they make for high-quality ingredients. ｜ 看似形态普通，风味却相当特殊的蘑菇，只会生长于瓦雷莎家的果园附近。既然派蒙取下了很可爱的名字，说明味道深得她心。\n虽然这种蘑菇是「蕈之魔神」催生的分身，但它不会无限增殖，对食用者也毫无副作用，所以依然是很优质的食材。
- Surely no one would ever consider your sweet voice a disturbance? ｜ 芭芭拉的歌声不能说是打扰吧。
- I'm looking for a place to rest. ｜ 我想找个地方过夜。
- A mysterious crystalline substance that you obtained after defeating the mighty Hypostases within a heretofore undiscovered Domain. Its lovely colors are like the remnant light of the elements as they are scattered.\nCan be used to exchange for valuable resources in the event "Hypostatic Symphony: Dissonant Verse" ｜ 战胜未知秘境中强大的无相元素后，寻获的神秘晶体，绮丽的色彩如同元素之力散去后残留的斑纹。\n在「无相交响诗·离调乐段」活动中，可以用来换取贵重的物资。
- You can't see me... ｜ 看不见我…
- I've had her follow Jemma and see if we can make any inroads with her. They should be at a cafe right now. ｜ 我让她跟着嘉玛，看看能不能取得什么进展，她们现在应该在咖啡店。
- I'm glad we're only having tea today. What if I got drunk and said something nonsensical? I'd surely become an object of ridicule to someone I've just met. ｜ 还好这次是喝茶，不然万一我酒量不行喝醉了说些胡话，岂不是要让刚认识不久的钟离先生看笑话了？
- Eat a visibly terrible Charcoal-Baked Ajilenakh Cake. ｜ 吃掉一看就难吃的「椰炭饼」。
- Why, that lad didn't make it very clear in his letter, now did he? Otherwise, I would've reported it as part of my research. ｜ 都怪这小子在信里没写清楚，要不然，我早就把这当作课题申报上去了。
- Paimon's not all that interested in this studying stuff, but if we can make a little this and that off their budget, why not, right? ｜ 虽然对学术研究什么的不感兴趣，不过要是能因此分给我们一点项目经费的话，也算是赚了吧？
- But our magical journey has only just begun. I've prepared even more astonishing surprises for everyone here. ｜ 不过，我们的神奇之旅还远远没有结束。我准备了能让各位更加惊讶的瞬间。
- Elemental Burst: II ｜ 元素爆发·其二
- Inazuma Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 稻妻地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- Well then, ad astra abyssosque! I await the completion of your next feat. ｜ 那么，向着星辰与深渊。我很期待你进一步的活跃。
- It's all thanks to Razi. He has so much creativity at such a young age. ｜ 这些都是托拉齐的福，没想到小小年纪就能有那么多奇思妙想。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- The boss used up all his strength in one punch. Maybe that's the reason he managed to tear open a passage. ｜ 刚才老大那一拳，用尽了他所有力量。或许是因为这点…才能撕开那个通道吧。
- We will continue to monitor his condition, and hope he recovers soon. ｜ 他的身体状况我们会继续关注，希望他能早日康复。
- I also cannot know what course of action he might be capable of if coerced, or otherwise compelled by circumstances unbeknownst to me... ｜ 我也不敢保证，可能他受到了某种胁迫，或者有什么难言之隐…

- Composed-Looking Treasure Hoarder ｜ 看似沉稳的盗宝团
- Quick Use ｜ 快捷使用
- Pirate's Diary ｜ 海贼的日志
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Brightwood Self-Tightening Wine Buckets.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「辉木自紧酒桶」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- The vastness of the ocean was even more awe-inspiring than any book could have described. It was truly... *cough* magnificent. ｜ 大海的宽广真是比书本中描绘的还要震撼，真的很…咳咳，很美。
- But it seems that no matter where I stand, the scenery doesn't change... ｜ 但是…唉，无论我怎么取景，都没有一点头绪…
- I didn't understand at the time. How can we say that we are maintaining eternity when things are constantly moving forward and evolving? ｜ 那时的我无论如何都没法理解，为什么一切向前流动的同时，竟也算是维持着永恒？
- I'm looking for Slime Condensate! ｜ 我要找史莱姆凝液！
- Goodbye... ｜ 再见…
- Our... Uh... Our exchange only represents my personal views. If you wish it so, you can file a complaint to the Ministry of Civil Affairs. ｜ 刚才的…嗯…切磋，也只代表我个人立场，如果有意见的话，可以到总务司反映情况。
- Basin of Unnumbered Flames ｜ 万火之瓯
- #Ah, {NICKNAME}. You're back. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你总算回来了。
- Paimon's... fine, she's just... got a little... ｜ 没…没事…就是突然有点痒…
- Too sweet... ｜ 太甜了…
- A saurian with a mark on its head... There was a little Tatankasaurus in the tribe like this a good many years ago. It would rarely interact with tribespeople, or even other Tatankasaurs. ｜ 头上有印记的龙啊…在十几年前，部族里也有一只这样的小突角龙，平时也很少和部族人还有突角龙众来往。
- Season Fortune Slip ｜ 本期签文
- Message ｜ 留言
- Have you gathered the Dandelion Seeds? ｜ 您搜集到蒲公英了吗？
- Hehe, don't forget that we're here by your side! ｜ 嘿嘿，别忘了，你身边还有我们在呢！
- That was really how I felt back when I first started out in astrology but... ｜ 这些是我以前的感悟，那时我才刚接触占星术没多久。
- And I have to say, the rumors do unnerve me a little bit, but... look, they came here to support you, despite obviously being terrified of Lady Yae. ｜ 虽然还是有点担心那些传闻…不过他们明明很害怕八重大人，却还是为了你上山来了呢。
- The child would like Chongyun's popsicles. After giving all of them out, Chongyun has to find some way to replenish them. ｜ 小孩子想要重云的冰棍，重云赠出了所有之后，只得先想办法补充了。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有魔物
- Frostbiting Embrace ｜ 至冷的拥抱
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Oh, I know about the meteorites. But... we haven't seen what they look like when they're coming down. ｜ 陨石的事，我们知道哦。不过…我们都还没见过陨石落下来的样子。
- Who's our next target? ｜ 这次的目标是谁？
- C'mon! Let's go take some photos! ｜ 走，我陪你一起去留影。
- Overloaded increased ｜ 超载反应强度提高
- D—Don't worry...! I—I've got this... ｜ 放，放心…！我来…
- And if we smash it open here... We'll all be swallowed up by the lava! ｜ 而且，要是在这里打开它…涌出来的岩浆会把我们都吞掉的！
- You look much better. Even your voice sounds gentler. ｜ 确实感觉托萝莎的气色好了些，好像连说话都更温柔了。
- *whimpers* A—Alright... Let's just get back to camp. I've had enough of this... ｜ 呜呜呜…好、好…我们快点回营地吧，我真是受不了了…
- Haha, of course! Liyue's Lantern Rite specialty snacks, here we come! We mustn't miss out! ｜ 哼哼，那当然了，璃月海灯节的特色小吃…绝对不能错过！
- Help? ｜ 帮助？
- Huh, The Chasm must be quite the mysterious place, if even someone as well-traveled as Zhongli has never been there. ｜ 嗨，层岩巨渊那般神秘，纵然是钟离兄这么有见识的人都没机会去。
- Huh, okay... ｜ 这样啊…
- Maybe later. ｜ 待会儿再说吧。
- #Well, it's not really about the Mora, is it, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #倒不是因为经费啦，{NICKNAME}…
- About Zakhar... ｜ 关于扎哈尔…
- Collect {QuestGatherNum} {QuestGatherID} and give them to {QuestNpcID} ｜ 采集{QuestGatherNum}个{QuestGatherID}交给{QuestNpcID}
- "So long as the pursuit of knowledge brings you joy, I'm fine with it...\nBut won't you reconsider? Haravatat's classes are very interesting too!" ｜ 「只要乐于求知，就算不在我门下也无所谓…\n不过真的不能再考虑一下吗？知论派的课也很有意思的！」
- This means that when the crime happened, Lyney had already entered the basement via the vent. ｜ 说明案件发生的时候，林尼的确已经通过通风口，爬到了地下室当中。
- You can start when you're ready. I'll be waiting here, so I can observe your skills. ｜ 准备好了就开始吧，我在这里等你，正好观摩观摩你的身手。
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- Siraj believes this "collective consciousness" is superior to individual humans. ｜ 恐怕在西拉杰看来，这种「集群意识」正是凌驾于人类之上的存在。
- Last time, you essentially "barged into" the Night Kingdom, but now, we must make sure that it will truly accept you. ｜ #之前进入夜神之国可以理解为一种「闯入」，而现在，我们需要的是夜神之国能真正地接纳{M#他}{F#她}。
- Oh... Uh, drat! Zhongli swindled us, hehe... heh... ｜ 呃…钟离这家伙真不靠谱！
- Leaving aside their intentionality, the two Fatui Harbingers have indeed done much for us during this crisis. ｜ 那两位执行官在这场灾难中的确做出了诸多贡献，暂且不谈他们完全出于自愿的部分…
- I'm sure you're wondering how I knew. ｜ 你的眼神像在问我，我是怎么会知道的？
- Exile's Circlet ｜ 流放者头冠
- Ah, yes. "You've sure gotten slow. Didn't even notice them until they were right under your nose." That line's from a story I read recently. Made a real impression on me. ｜ 哎呀，「真是迟钝了，居然让人靠近到这种程度才发觉。」这是我最近看的故事里比较印象深刻的句子。
- He must've found it in the end! If you wish hard enough and you don't give up, your wish will definitely come true! That's what Grandpa told me. ｜ 我猜他最后一定找到了！只要愿望足够强烈，而且不放弃努力的话，就一定可以实现心愿！外公是这样告诉我的。
- Storm the front! ｜ 雷光千道！
- Though the soldier's body be tired and torn, still they fight till the very end, till they have no blood left to bleed. Such magnificent strength of will... is that not the true meaning of honor? ｜ 即使身躯残破，也要在战场上拼杀到最后一刻，要战斗到流干最后一滴血为止。这样的意志，难道不珍贵吗？
- Well, he shouldn't have gotten so carried away bragging to Jack, should he? ｜ 没办法，谁让他对杰克夸下海口了呢。
- ...*yawn* ｜ …呼啊。
- I didn't think that would actually work... ｜ 没想到你真的来了…
- Yes, that would be fine. ｜ 嗯，好的。
- (According to that Ms. Gendou, this Ms. Gendou is...) ｜ （这个玄冬小姐，按照那个玄冬小姐说的…）
- Sorry! Uh... I'm... ｜ 抱歉！呃…我是…
- You mean "Buttercup of Terror"? ｜ 啊？你是说「恐怖猫爪草」吗？
- But I will not deceive you. There are some things I cannot go into detail on. On these matters, you'll have to permit me to summarize a bit. ｜ 不过我也不打算欺骗你。有些还不能挑明的事，现阶段请容我略过。
- Take this Heatshield Potion and get a taste of what alchemy can really do! ｜ 「耐热药剂」给你，拿去感受一下炼金术的魅力吧。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- You certainly look like an expert on suspicious goings-on. ｜ 你倒是一副很有经验的样子。
- "Bring forth the fried tofu!" ｜ 「油豆腐，速速来」！
- They were just ordinary people like you and me. But when faced with mounting disasters, they used what strength they had to guard the border between life and death. Fortunately, they were aided by their knowledge of a secret art, which the funeral parlor still practices to this day. ｜ 他们本是凡人，以渺小之躯维护生死之界，困难重重，所幸习得了秘法，并代代相传至今。
- Let's think of some way to get her to Pardis Dhyai. ｜ 想办法帮她脱身去禅那园吧。
- So Stormterror came to this tower to sleep. He slept for a long, long time, and when he woke up, no one remembered him anymore. His friend, the Anemo Archon, was also gone. ｜ 「风魔龙」就在边上这座高塔里面，睡了好久好久…等到醒来的时候，已经没有人记得它了，风神也不见了。
- Yes... Paimon'll be careful! ｜ 嗯…我会小心的！
- Once I return home to my wife, I'll tell her this good news for sure... ｜ 等我回家见到妻子之后，一定要好好和她讲讲这个好消息…
- The merchant guild didn't want to give up on the business foundation that they have built throughout these years, so they forced me to stay here. ｜ 商会因为不想失去这些年在稻妻打下的商业根基，便硬是让我留在这里…
- Hold CD|{param9:F1}s ｜ 长按冷却时间|{param9:F1}秒

- I won. You didn't make it easy, but the dice were nice and obedient this round. ｜ 我赢了。和你对局可真不轻松，还好，这局的骰子比较听话。

- Prophets of Pop ｜ 流行音乐，谁先知？

- My choice of weapons follows the Marechaussee Hunter tradition. A Musket to chase away my prey, and a sword to deliver it a fatal strike.\nIn duels, of course, I typically only use my sword. Once you set foot in the Duelists' Ring, there is nowhere to run, and therefore no need to chase you away. ｜ 我的武器装备遵循逐影猎人的传统制式。铳枪用来驱赶猎物，长剑给予它们致命一击。\n当然，代理决斗时我一般只用长剑，踏上决斗场的人已经无路可逃，用不着再做驱赶。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Windtracker."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『逐风人』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。

- Even if the culprit was sent to serve time, I'm not sure the tale could be said to have a "happy ending." ｜ 即便犯人被送去服刑，也很难说是个圆满的结局呢。
- Marana has been spreading rapidly. Even the Head Mushroom's habitat has been taken over. ｜ 近来「无留陀」的蔓生频繁，「一头菇」所生长的环境也被占据了。
- Exquisite flavor, rich in fat. This cut of meat is exceptionally delicious, regardless of preferred cooking technique.\nOnly the most ancient of creatures, the sturdiest of the boars deserves to be called a king. ｜ 口感紧致，油脂丰富，无论是煎炸烹煮都味道极佳的肉。\n只有熬过了漫长年月，足够强壮的走豕才会被人们称为「王」。
- Ally at Low HP: I ｜ 同伴生命值低·其一
- Antiquity has real value. I should know, I make my living off that fact. So make the most of this very precious time of year. ｜ 历史是可以换算成金钱的哦，所以请奢侈地好好享受节日吧。
- Klee's right. Many hands make light work... ｜ 毕竟我们人多…
- Ha... Hahaha... ｜ 呵…呵呵呵…
- Of course I wouldn't, Paimon. ｜ 不会嫌弃派蒙。
- Hahaha, those two things really compliment each other... I suspect that if there were detectives in Mondstadt, their business would be booming every day. ｜ 哈哈哈，这两种特产还真是相辅相成…是蒙德城里有侦探的话，肯定天天都会生意兴隆的。

- Pierre made such a complicated operations plan, yet also exposed himself so easily to the investigating Gardes... ｜ 制定出这么复杂的计划，却又轻易地暴露了自己的嫌疑…
- To sacrifice one's own life to save others... To go beyond human means in order to do the impossible, whatever the cost may be... ｜ 为了救人，不惜害己；为了人力难为的奇迹，不惜一切追寻非人之力…

- Klee, what exactly did you say to Diona? ｜ 小可莉，你到底是怎么说的呀？
- Ah, yes, for when you do go, I will have some potions here for you. Stay safe when exploring that Domain, alright? ｜ 对了，如果你真要去的话，我还有一些特殊的药剂给你…总之，探索那处秘境的时候要注意安全啊。
- The entrance to Stormterror's Lair is just ahead, but the light seals bar the way in. You must once again face a trial in order to break those seals. ｜ 风龙废墟的入口就在眼前，光之封印阻挡了你进入废墟深处。为了解除封印，你再次面临考验。
- Hardly, no, but all this easy living will see our fighting spirit vanish in time, mark my words! ｜ 是不错，但要是每天都像这样怠惰下去，长此以往，人可是会丧失斗志的！

- Mhm! I'm starting to look forward to it as well, so let's get this show on the road and head towards the Kingdom of Water Imps! ｜ 嗯！我也开始期待了，那就不再浪费时间，各位，我们现在就动身吧！

- Are you kidding? We wouldn't miss it for the world. We've been looking forward to it! ｜ 别开玩笑啦，我们怎么会错过你的演出呢，我都已经期待好久啦。

- Sorry to bother you. ｜ 打扰了。
- DMG dealt by Elemental Skill and Elemental Burst is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color>. When an Elemental Skill hits an opponent, its CRIT Rate will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>2%</color>. When an Elemental Burst hits an opponent, its CRIT Rate will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>2%</color>. Both of these effects last 10s separately, have 4 max stacks, and can be triggered once every 0.1s. ｜ 元素战技与元素爆发造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color>。元素战技命中敌人时，元素战技的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>2%</color>；元素爆发命中敌人时，元素爆发的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>2%</color>。上述两种效果各自持续10秒，至多叠加4次，每0.1秒至多触发一次。

- After sampling every dish there was in Liyue, Xiangling's culinary skills drastically improved. Her specialty spicy dishes earned the praise of even her father, a veteran chef with over two decades of experience.\nShe created her unique and complex flavor profile through a generous helping of chili peppers mixed with fruits and herbs for increased aroma. She also created what became the signature dish of Wanmin Restaurant: Black-Back Perch Stew, which combines the richness, color and strong flavors of Li cuisine with the fresh aromas and nutritional content of Yue cuisine.\nSome have tried to copy her recipes, but try as they might they can never quite reproduce the way her cooking tastes.\n"Braise fresh Violetgrass overnight. Dry, then grind to a fine powder. Sprinkle into any dish for an aromatic boost."\nThis is one of Xiangling's secret recipes, arrived at through a painstaking process of trial and error.\nIn Xiangling's case, that means countless bouts of diarrhea, countless bruised knees bashed on rocky cliffs, and countless wasted potfuls of food that didn't quite turn out as expected. ｜ 尝遍璃月百味之后，香菱的料理技艺突飞猛进。她那一手「麻辣菜」，就连二十几年厨龄的父亲也忍不住赞叹。\n大把大把地使用辣椒，再以果物、草叶增添香气，形成独特的复合口感。一道融合璃菜油重色浓风格，以及月菜鲜香滋补特色的「水煮黑背鲈」就此成为了「万民堂」的招牌。\n有人试图偷学配方，却怎么也复制不出这地道的口味。\n「新鲜琉璃袋用蜜酿一晚，次日取出，沥干研磨至粉状，加入菜品能增香。」\n这是无数次吃坏肚子，无数次被岩壁上的砂砾划破膝盖，牺牲无数口锅才得到的——\n只属于香菱自己的秘方。

- Just give yourself up, Arataki Itto! ｜ 赶快放弃抵抗，荒泷一斗！
- Me? Well, I don't have any other talents other than mining, and you've got to make Mora somehow, am I right? Heh. Don't worry, I reckon I can still make ends meet this way. ｜ 我吗？除了做矿工也没什么别的本事，不过人总得糊口，对吧？哈哈，我还是有自信靠这一行养活一家人的。
- Let me think... I don't think you ever actually told me what the outcome was. Oh — it's probably more accurate to say that both times, you never came back the whole night. ｜ 让我想想…好像你们从未提起过出城计划的结果如何，哦，不如说，那两次出城计划的当晚你们都没有回来。
- He's been locked in the altar at the Serpent's Heart, and judging by how things look, he can't get out. That's why he sent us to look for you. ｜ 他被关在蛇心之地的祭坛…以他的状态恐怕出不来了，所以拜托我们来寻找你们。
- After treating it, the vet took it back to the tribe. ｜ 医生为它治疗后，就领着它先回「花羽会」。
- Huh? Did something happen? ｜ 嗯？发生什么了？
- I wish you luck. ｜ 保重。
- Strangers in a Strange Boat ｜ （test）愚人众WQ2
- But I don't think I stayed here too long. I might have just rested here briefly before continuing on my way. ｜ 但我应该没有在这里停留太久。或许只是偶然路过，歇了歇脚。
- Xamaran has spent too much strength. It was a pleasant conversation with you two, but Xamaran must rest now and gather the strength to fend off evil and provide a shelter for its kin to prosper. ｜ #此番消耗了太多气力，和{NICKNAME}、派蒙交谈非常愉快，但赞玛兰需要休眠，积蓄力量抵御邪气，荫蔽同族，繁衍生息。
- Let's talk a bit first... ｜ 想随便聊聊…
- Report back to Shitou ｜ 向石头回报
- *blowing* ...Liyue's tea is certainly different from that of Mondstadt. ｜ 呼…果然璃月的茶，和蒙德不太一样啊。
- Chiori ｜ 千织
- Alright, next let's see your right hand... Hmm, not bad. ｜ 好，接下来是右手…情况似乎还可以。
- Fleeting Moon ｜ 迅节之月
- You know how my family is. A lot of business secrets can't just be divulged at the dinner table. ｜ 你了解我家的，很多商业机密，不方便在饭桌上大声讲。
- Not really. I'm used to it by now. ｜ 不会，我已经习惯了。
- "Wild Dog Watanabe" ｜ 「野良犬渡部」
- That's a right shame... ｜ 真遗憾…
- ...Dainsleif!!! ｜ …戴因斯雷布！
- I imagine such a kite would make a fine decoration in your home, too. ｜ 而且，呵呵，如果把有香味的风筝挂在家里，应该也是不错的装饰吧。
- Everyone's been focused on the losses to people and property, but I'm still more concerned about the plants and flowers. ｜ 虽然大家都在关注民众的伤亡与损失，而我更在意的还是那些花草植物。
- Well, if you're Jeht's friends, I won't stop you. You may move on. The tribe's campsite lies ahead. ｜ 既然是婕德的朋友，我没有必要阻拦你们，你们可以继续前进，前方就是部族的露营地。
- Even my Jirou has... *sigh* I can only hope that he is doing well. ｜ 我的二郎也…唉，希望他平平安安的就好。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Records of Hanan Pacha (I) ｜ 哈南帕查记事·卷一
- A seed obtained from the Seed Dispensary. A quality seed full of life, just waiting to be planted in the fields of the Realm Within. After some time, it will grow into Skysplit Gemblooms. ｜ 通过「化种匣」获取的种子，富有活力，品质上佳，种植于壶中洞天的田亩后，可在一段时间后生长为「云岩裂叶」。
- If that was a Windblume treat, then Paimon wishes it could be the Windblume Festival every day! ｜ 如果这是风花节才有的好事，我希望天天都是风花节。
- This rescue mission is of the utmost importance. Director Hu must be brought back safe and sound. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，兹事体大，务必要保证胡堂主她们的安全。
- Xavier ｜ 泽维尔
- Look, Her Highness is flying along with a bunch of people... and frogs. Do you think she's found the Guardian? ｜ 看啊，公主殿下和好多人…和蛙一起飞呢。她是不是找到守护者了？
- #O Honorable Traveler {NICKNAME}, is there anything I can do for you? ｜ #可敬的旅行者{NICKNAME}，有什么需要我做的吗？
- The next time you need to leave the city, call the Special Security and Surveillance Patrol. They'll escort you half of the way, and the Spina di Rosula can take the second half... ｜ 下次出城的时候，就该叫上枫丹特巡队来护送你，然后中途交接一下，让刺玫会送你下半程…
- #{NICKNAME}, let's go and put a stop to whatever it is they're up to. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们快去阻止他们吧。

- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- A sharp-eyed and proud falcon.\nIt circles the skies at high altitude where the air is cold, waiting for the moment to swoop down and strike the squirrels and small birds hiding in the grass and trees. Hunters say that just a small amount of training can turn this bird of prey into a formidable hunting companion. ｜ 目光锐利的高傲鹰隼。\n总是在清冷的高空盘旋，伺机寻找着隐身于草木间的小小松鼠与鸟雀。据老练的猎人说，这种猛禽稍加训练，便会是优秀的猎鹰。
- Vigneire is dead! We promised each other that we would always be together — wherever she goes, I will follow! ｜ 薇涅尔死了啊！我和她约好了，无论什么地方都要一起去！这是我们一直以来的约定！
- Sounds like we all saw the same thing just now. ｜ 嗯，这么说大家都看到了。
- Chisel-Light Mirror Removal Interval|{param10:F1}s ｜ 琢光镜消失间隔|{param10:F1}秒
- 10 ｜ 10
- Talk to Viramdra and Karya ｜ 与维兰德和卡嘉对话
- I... I'm very grateful. ｜ 我对几位，实在过意不去…
- "Just one night"? ｜ 「况且就那么一晚」？
- Ah, yes. If you have some time, could you do me a favor? ｜ 对了，如果您有空的话，能帮我一个忙吗？
- ...!!! ｜ ……！！！
- Huh? You mean, you don't need us to come with you? ｜ 咦？接下来不需要我们一起跟着去吗？
- What do you think has kept Liyue going over the last millennium? Rex Lapis? ...I disagree. We mortals have to fight for survival whatever happens. He just feels the need to come down here and poke his nose into everything that's going on for some reason... Hmph, people don't like to think about this, but should we really be trusting him to be an expert in everything? ｜ 在你看来，支撑璃月走过千年，最重要的东西是什么？\n…帝君？…我不这么觉得，因为必须依靠努力才能生存下去的，终究是我们人类啊。高高在上的他却要介入一切。哼，说句不好听的，他真的什么都懂吗？
- And responsible for the upkeep of the lighthouse while at it. ｜ 顺便也承担了这个灯塔的维护工作。
- I've been wondering why you've not caused more trouble in all the years that you've been in Inazuma, if you are indeed a cursed blade that can possess its owner. ｜ 我一直在疑惑，如果你是一把能够操纵持刀者的妖刀，为何会在来到稻妻之后这么多年都没有引发骚乱。
- Hah, how presumptuous! It is the duty of us Pari to eradicate the Sign of Apaosha — an endeavor that I, Sorush, shall give my all to accomplish! ｜ 呵，何等不自量力！尔等须当知晓，熄灭「焚真之天象」乃吾辈花灵之使命，是我斯露莎要为之奉上全部的事业！
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- I'm afraid so... Its body and soul have probably been in terrible shape for some time now. ｜ 恐怕是的…它的身体和灵魂，应该早就残损不堪了。
- Records of the Ancient Oases: Part IX ｜ 古绿洲记事·其九
- Well, you folks had better be heading off, then. I'm just about finished here, so I'll be heading home very shortly myself. I'd better try and get plenty of father-daughter time in before the Weinlesefest starts, hahaha... ｜ 你们赶紧去忙吧。这边活儿干得差不多，我也得赶快回家了。趁着佳酿节还没开始，赶紧多陪陪女儿，哈哈哈…
- Yep... This seems like Uther's workspace, alright. Let's see what we can find! ｜ 看起来像工作的地方，我们在这里找找吧！
- Looks like we'll need to open that gate up there next. As per our previous experience, the pipelines here will probably have to be connected to let the quicksand drive the gate. ｜ …看来接下来就得打开上面那扇大门，按照之前的惯例，得连通这里的管道，让流沙驱动大门。
- Is it because we haven't been to get that whatchamacallit... "permit" yet? ｜ 难道是还没去得到那个什么「许可」的关系？
- Pizza From Another Land ｜ 异国的披萨
- I've heard that the peddlers often close up shop earlier on the last day because there are fewer people around. ｜ 听说最后一天客流量相对比较少，摊贩们有时也会提前收摊。
- Conductor's Top Hat ｜ 指挥的礼帽
- Haha, you got a good memory. ｜ 哈哈，记性不错。

- Yes, this will do. Now, the next step is the key to performing Dream Trawler... ｜ 嗯，如此便可。接下来是「梦游诸境法」的关键…
- A meeting hall in prosperous times where dragons once crafted innumerable arcane arts and mechanisms. When their master departed, it became a place of judgment where dragon cast down dragon. ｜ 此处原本是议事之厅，在繁荣之时，龙众在此处创造诸多秘法与机关。但在众龙的主人死去之后，此处变成了审判同族的场所。
- Immernachtreich Apokalypse: Part II ｜ 幽夜默示录·其二
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}
- Let's get some food in us, and then we'll— Whoa! ｜ 等会儿我们先去吃一顿，然后…呜哇！
- A large hunk of minced meat packaged inside a pastry. The tough pastry shell almost seems to sally out against your teeth as you bite into it. If you fight through the greasiness and only chew on the minced meat, you can sort of taste its flavor. ｜ 包裹大块肉馅的饼食。过于扎实的饼皮甚至产生了磕牙的错觉，要是能忍着油腻只挖肉馅吃的话，倒是还能品味出一丝微弱的肉香。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Please send Master Diluc my regards when you find him. ｜ 如果见到了老爷，请代我问候他。
- #{SPACE}Each stack decreases DEF by <color=#B09057FF>{0}%</color>. Select this stick multiple times to increase the amount of DEF decreased per stack. ｜ 每层会使防御力降低<color=#B09057FF>{0}</color>%。重复选择此签时，将提升每层防御力降低效果所降低的程度。
- Key, statue, key, statue, key, statue. ｜ 钥匙，雕像，钥匙，雕像，钥匙，雕像。
- Really? Maybe it's because Paimon's head is too big. Small Paimon, huge head. ｜ 是吗？可能因为派蒙的头太大了。小小派蒙，大大头脑。
- A shining, talking cat that claims to be a spirit-keeper for an ancient realm.\nThis is in fact Cassiodor, one who hails from ancient Remuria. ｜ 会发光又会说话的猫，自称是旧日国度的守灵人。\n其真实身份则是来自古国雷穆利亚的卡西奥多。
- How's my reputation in Sumeru City? ｜ 我在须弥城的声望…
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Besides, they've got this saying in Liyue, don't they? "The deal may be off, but our honor still stands." And we Inazuman samurai are the most honorable people there are! ｜ 再说了，我听说璃月有句话，「买卖不成仁义在」。我们稻妻的武士也最讲究仁义了！
- But shouldn't we wait for Curve? He's not here yet. ｜ 不过我们要不要等一下曲线呀？他好像还没来。
- ATK Increase|{param2:F2P} Max HP ｜ 攻击力提高|{param2:F2P}生命值上限

### Part 152

- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Sorry, I'm not sure I caught all that... What were the titles again? Reborn as... Kitsune Guuji? ｜ 刚刚您说的太快了…那两部轻小说分别叫什么来着？转生…成为宫司大人？
- Mehrak ｜ 梅赫拉克
- I think it's suuuuper cool! ｜ 可莉觉得超——棒！
- Yes, I did make an agreement with him. He'll help me find rare plants, and I'll help him make a sachet. ｜ 没错，我确实和他约定好了，他帮我去找各种稀奇的植物，我则帮他想办法做香包。
- So. What brings you back here? ｜ 什么风把你们吹回来了？
- Well... three, to be precise. There's one further hero who I'm hoping to get on my side, whatever it takes. ｜ 不，准确来说，是三位，还有一位我无论如何都希望能求得的援手。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Jade Heartfeather Bass ｜ 玉玉心羽鲈
- I know, I know, it's just... *sigh* We should remain strong in these negotiations. We mustn't be too ready to compromise. ｜ 我当然知道，只是…唉。至少态度要强硬一些，不能随便妥协。
- Tiny Miracle's Hourglass ｜ 奇迹之沙
- Eh? There's no reaction? ｜ 咦？好像没有反应？
- This means that no individual is truly on their own out there. When someone falls down, there's an invisible net made of human connections, waiting to catch them and get them back on their feet. ｜ 如此一来，一个人就不再只是一个人了，在他摔倒的时候，会有看不见的连结之网托着他重新站起来。
- After some discussions and a few brainstorming sessions, we finally came up with "Inspiration Eruption"! ｜ 我们进行了几次充分的讨论，在集思广益下，这个名为「灵感喷激」的游戏就完美出炉了。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- As expected, it's the Fatui! ｜ 果然是愚人众…
- First and foremost, on behalf of the Knights of Favonius, I would like to extend our thanks to you for your help just now. ｜ 总之，首先我要代骑士团向你们道谢。
- Good thing we arrived early, and had you with us, Sorush. ｜ 多亏我们来得及时，还有斯露莎帮忙。
- Cooking ｜ 烹饪
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Whoa, we accidentally hit one of those dummies in blue! ｜ 哇啊，一不小心打中穿着蓝色衣服的假人了！
- Hmmm... I... can't believe that happened... It's almost as if I've had a long, long dream. ｜ …嗯…居然有这样的事…啊，简直就像是，一场长梦一样啊。
- This time, I'm gonna hide in the best hiding place ever. You'll never find me! ｜ 这次我一定要藏个好地方，你肯定找不到我！
- Tighnari's Charged Attack CRIT Rate is increased by 15%. ｜ 提纳里重击的暴击率提高15%。
- But I refuse to accept any of that. The ignorant can be rightfully absolved from guilt, right? Well, I suspect that someone got me locked up here so they could get their hands on my goods... ｜ 但是我不服，不是有句话叫「不知者不罪」吗？我，我怀疑有人故意把我流放到这里，好贪掉我手上的货…
- "Muhe dada!" ｜ 「Muhe dada!」
- Huh? ｜ 哈？
- You bet. ｜ 当然。
- Not scared. But Ioroi said that "kitsune, idiots, and smoke like high spots." ｜ 不怕。但「狐狸、笨蛋和烟才喜欢上高处」。五百藏说的。
- Complete Margaret's commission ｜ 完成玛格丽特的委托

- According to intelligence, the target has the following special traits:\n·Invulnerable to Electro DMG\n\nAdditionally, the target has the following weakness:\n·Increased DMG from polearm-wielding characters ｜ 根据调查，目标具有如下特性：\n·雷元素伤害无效\n\n此外，目标具有以下弱点：\n·使用长柄武器的角色造成的伤害提升
- Origami Model: Hop, Skip, and a Jump ｜ 折纸模型-「蹦蹦跳」
- Jawad ｜ 哲瓦德
- I've already marked some of them out for you. Go have a look at your map first. ｜ 我应该已经帮你标记过一部分了，你先看一下手上的地图吧。
- Maillardet will be happy to see this. He's always wanted to put miniaturized gramophones inside Artificed Dancers... ｜ 梅雅德会很高兴看见这个的，他早就想在奇械舞者里加装微型留音机了。
- Hello, can I help you? ｜ 你好，又有什么事吗？
- A Little Booze Doesn't Hurt... ｜ 蒙德酒客
- Warning! Core functionality down to 8%! Warning! ｜ 警告！核心残值降至8%！警告！
- Over here... Yoo-hoo! Over here... ｜ 这边…哎，这边…！
- I'm really not sure what to say... ｜ 真是让人不知道说什么好…
- Ah, compadre! A little birdie told me you went to Aisa Bathhouse last night! ｜ 哦！挚友，听说你们昨晚去了「秋沙钱汤」对吧？
- Cannot forge any more Enhancement Ore today. Please wait till tomorrow. ｜ 今日已无法锻造精锻用矿，请等待明日。
- Huh... you kinda have a point. ｜ 也、也有道理哦…
- #You're... Wait, you're {NICKNAME}! Wonderful! You're here! ｜ #你是…等等，{NICKNAME}！太好了，你来了！
- I'll stay here with Big Brother Ku. We'll take charge of the cleanup work once you're done with the offering! ｜ 我陪阿久哥多坐一会。然后，再为供奉收尾。
- Alright, now that we're all here, let me help set the scene for everyone... ｜ 好了，各就各位。我简单说一下这场戏的要点——
- Leave Hotel Debord ｜ 离开德波大饭店
- Leave Qiaoying Village ｜ 离开翘英庄
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon's heard that everyone from the Collective of Plenty is built like a bricklayer!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Maybe you should go stay with them for a while. Grow those muscles out.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> No! Paimon likes herself the way she is now.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Okay, then what about staying with the Flower-Feather Clan instead? Their thing is flying. I bet they could help you sharpen your skills!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Huh? But... isn't Paimon good enough at flying already?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Yeah, but then you'd be able to carry me when you fly.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Nope, not happening! How would that even be possible?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well, if you had those muscles I talked about...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Oh, geez, not this again... For the last time, no! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听说沃陆之邦的人们都很健壮。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那假如把派蒙放在那里，会不会变成肌肉派蒙呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我才不要变成那个样子啦！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那放在花羽会怎么样，他们很擅长飞行，说不定可以帮忙提升派蒙的飞行技巧呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸，飞行不就是咻——的一下就好了，还需要什么技巧吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我只要求派蒙能带着我飞起来就好。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>差太多了吧！怎么想都不可能吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那你先变成肌肉派蒙不就好了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂！说到底你就是想看肌肉吧！
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Based on what I've seen, you have your own understanding of the world, and your place in it, so just believe in yourself — you're on the right path. ｜ 从结果来看，现在你对这个世界的理解和规划，就是最适合你的，要相信自己。
- Scholar's Quill Pen ｜ 学士的羽笔
- ...Or just... made it through life, with little to show for it. ｜ 又或者，我只不过是在得过且过罢了…
- Paimon, we're not doing that. ｜ 派蒙，不能这样。
- Electro Cicin's Gleam ｜ 雷萤浮闪

- Sharp spikes will periodically emerge from the ground here.\nCharacters hit by these spikes will lose a certain amount of Life Points.\nCan only be placed on the ground and cannot be batch-selected. ｜ 此机关范围内的地面会周期性地出刺出地锥。\n被地锥攻击到的角色会被削减一定数量的生命点。\n只能贴地布设，无法被批量选中。
- Dew Bubbles will burst when they are <color=#FFE14BFF>attacked</color>, <color=#FFE14BFF>releasing ripples</color>. They can be <color=#FFE14BFF>moved</color> by the abilities of the Xenochromatic Ball Octopus, so this method may be used to change their position. When the Dew Bubbles are being moved, the circle that appears may be used to preview the area of effect of their ripples when they burst. When 2 small Dew Bubbles touch, they will <color=#FFE14BFF>merge into</color> a large Dew Bubble, and when that bursts, it will release ripples with an <color=#FFE14BFF>even larger</color> area of effect. ｜ 清露泡沫将在<color=#FFE14BFF>受到攻击</color>时破裂，<color=#FFE14BFF>释放波纹</color>。它会被异色球球章鱼的能量<color=#FFE14BFF>推动</color>，因此能通过这种方式改变它的位置，并通过推动时出现的圆环预知它破裂时波纹的范围。两个小型的清露泡沫在接触时将<color=#FFE14BFF>融合</color>成更大的泡沫，在破碎时也将释放影响范围<color=#FFE14BFF>更大</color>的波纹。
- Why do you make it sound like... they are coming to see me, and not the show? ｜ 这话说的…比起看戏，怎么倒像是来看我了？
- "Come up with infallible strategies before battle, pursue full implementation with ample cautiousness amidst battle, and clean up the surroundings after battle." With data and experience obtained from the two previous simulations, once the segments comprising this chain of battle are fully perfected, one should be capable of recreating the might of a Champion Duelist soon enough! ｜ 「战前准确决策，战时贯彻决心，战中谨慎接敌，战后清扫区域」，综合前两次模拟的数据和经验，并完善「战斗链条」的每个环节，假以时日，应该能复现决斗代理人的战力！
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Arama, Arana, Araja, Arakavi... Whew, Aranara names are so hard to remember...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>The only bit Paimon's sure of is that they all start with "Ara"!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Right, so if you were an Aranara, your name would be "Arapaimon."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yup, and as for {NICKNAME}...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hmm, actually, they'd probably call you Nara {NICKNAME}...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Yeah, we're all Nara to them...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> So if there was someone whose actual name was "Nara," what would the Aranara call them?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>"Nara Nara"... I guess. Sounds kinda cute.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hehe, yeah. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>兰罗摩，兰拉娜，兰拉迦，兰加惟…唔，兰那罗的名字还真是难记…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唯一能确定的就是名字最开始一定是个兰字！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果派蒙是兰那罗的话，派蒙的名字就会变成兰派蒙呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>是呢，如果是{NICKNAME}…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这么说来，如果是称呼你的话，他们都会叫那菈{NICKNAME}呢…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那菈就是他们对我们的称呼吧…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那如果有个名字是那菈的家伙，被他们称呼的话会变成什么样？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那菈那菈…吧，感觉有点可爱。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿，确实呢。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon wonders what the previous Shogun was like.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> It appears that she was a person who understood the fleeting nature of things, and accepted the inevitable fate of departing this world one day.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> After all, realizing the fragility of things in front of you makes you treasure them even more.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> This way of thinking must've influenced Inazuma's aesthetics. This world is transient, people come and go. The fun times we shared, our companionship, and the delicious foods we got to savor — those emotions and experiences are real things that existed at some point in time, not just empty concepts.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Even though... Even though every banquet must eventually come to an end, it'd be nice to enjoy those happy moments for a little longer.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> "Shifting seasons and elusive dreams, the ephemeral and fleeting, with thine companionship, all are eternal."\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon doesn't get it!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I'm saying that I'm having a lot of fun traveling with you, Paimon. It'd be nice if we could just go on like this forever.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon'll take your word for it then. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不知道前代将军是个什么样的人呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>似乎是一个能理解花不常开的人呢，并且她也能坦然接受自己终有一日会离开的命运。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>知道眼前之物的宝贵，才能更加珍惜啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这个可能也影响了稻妻的美学吧。浮世之景里，众生流淌而过。度过的热闹时光、一起结伴而行的人、一起品尝过的美味，这些是真实不虚的，是真正重要的事物。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>虽然…虽然宴席肯定会结束，但快乐的时间能更长一点就好了。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「白露与清梦，胧幻与此生，若比君侧时，皆算久长事。」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你在说什么！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这是说，和小派蒙的旅行很开心。如果能一直这样下去就好了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你不会骗我吧。嘿嘿。

- I like it. ｜ 很喜欢。
- No one knows how exactly Dori met Alice, but they are truly a pair of business partners that could make all merchants jealous.\nAlice travels the world, so she does not stay for long every time she visits Sumeru. However, every once in a while, Alice will ask someone to send her new invention to Dori.\nDori, for her part, will sell it and find a way to send the Mora to Alice.\nSometimes, Alice sends the invention with an attached letter that tells Dori to keep the Mora for the time being because Alice is currently in a dangerous area.\nHowever, Dori insists on getting someone to send the Mora to safe zones closest to Alice's position, making sure that Alice will receive the Mora at her earliest convenience.\nThe labor, shipment, insurance... The various costs tend to amount to a fairly large expenditure, but Dori is never stingy in this regard. She even pays in advance.\n"I, Dori, never default on payment."\n"Also, Ms. Alice has expenses, too. I must make sure that she has Mora at hand whenever she needs it."\nDori often repeats these words and, despite the trouble, repeatedly makes sure that Alice's payment is delivered.\nThough Alice is no longer Dori's only supplier, Alice's payment is still a top priority for Dori.\nPerhaps it's because Dori keeps a certain promise embedded in her heart — the promise she made to Alice the day they met.\n"You want limitless Mora? Sure. I can supply you with marvelous items of all kinds. But how much Mora you're going to make will depend on how good you are at sales."\n"Don't worry. I'll sell them for a good price, earn a large sum of Mora, and deliver your share as quickly as possible... I'll be your greatest business partner." ｜ 没有人知道多莉与艾莉丝相遇的具体过程，但她们确实是一对让人艳羡的合作伙伴。\n艾莉丝周游世界各地，不会一直停留在须弥，但每过一段时间，她就会托人将自己的新发明寄给多莉。\n而多莉也会在售卖之后，想办法将摩拉送到艾莉丝手上。\n有时艾莉丝会附一封信，告诉多莉自己最近身处险地，摩拉可以先存放在多莉那里。\n多莉却执意派人携带摩拉赶往距离艾莉丝最近的安全地区，以保证艾莉丝能够第一时间拿到摩拉。\n人工费、运输费、保险费…各项费用相加并非一笔小钱，多莉却毫不吝啬，主动掏腰包提前支付。\n「大善人多莉从不拖欠回款。」\n「而且，艾莉丝女士的开销也不小，必须保证她时时刻刻有钱可用。」\n多莉总是念叨着这些话，不厌其烦地反复确认摩拉是否送到。\n即使现在艾莉丝已经不是多莉唯一的供货商，多莉仍将这视为最重要的事。\n也许在她心里，一直记得相遇那天许下的承诺。\n「你想要数不清的摩拉？可以呀。我可以提供给你各种神奇道具，卖出去多少就看你的本事啦。」\n「请放心。我会卖出高高的价格，换来多多的摩拉，以最快的速度送到你的手上…我会成为你最好的合作伙伴。」

- Ahem... I'd like to wish you a happy birthday. Though I don't have much experience with celebrations, once I realized your birthday was coming, I decided to make some preparations. I'd be happy to accompany you. A birthday only lasts a day, but you should take the chance to really enjoy it. Just make sure we can be back within three days. ｜ 嗯…先祝你生日快乐。虽然没有太多庆祝的经验，不过想到是你的生日，我还是提前做了一些准备。首先是一套我研究了几天后得到的卡组构筑，风格和你比较契合。另外我调整了这段时间的安排，你有什么想去的地方吗？我可以陪你一起去。虽然生日只有一天，但放松还是需要尽兴，行程安排在三天内即可。

- "A swordsman's blade and their heart are linked.\nTo change one's spirit is to change one's sword.\nThe sword of one who seeks to defend is calm and controlled, while a blade of fury is keen and spiteful."\n— Shifting Forms of Favonius Bladework (I)\n\nTo hold regret and sorrow within oneself is unspeakable agony, to roast your very soul.\nDo not allow your soul to be scorched, charred black by flame.\nA mind consumed by misery and agony is a lure for tragedy and destruction.\nKnow, then, to nourish your heart as if it were a flower to be cared for.\nA spring of sweet waters lies within the depths of your soul — and even amid despair, there is hope. ｜ 「剑士的剑与其人心脉相连。\n改变了心灵，便是改变了自己的剑。\n怀着守护之心挥出的剑平和克制，饱含怒火挥出的剑锋利怨毒。」\n——西风剑术流变·序\n\n怨怼与哀伤炙烤着心灵，痛苦无人可倾诉。\n切勿使自己的灵魂受火焰熏染，变得焦黑。\n陷入悲郁与痛苦的头脑易吸引悲剧与毁灭。\n请时时刻刻如养护花朵般浇灌自己的心灵。\n甘泉藏匿在你灵魂深处，绝望中亦有希望。
- Indeed it did. I'll need you to come with me. ｜ 嗯，跟我走一趟吧。
- You've probably heard before that water is filled with the strongest emotions of humanity. ｜ 你们应该听说过，水中凝聚了人类最强烈的情感…

- · After a character obtains an Elemental Shard created by the Crystallize reaction, they will gain a buff that will increase the active character's ATK. When 3 stacks of the buff are gained, gaining another Shard will unleash a shockwave that will deal DMG to nearby opponents. As such, put Geo characters into the party to more effectively oppose your foes. ｜ ·角色获取结晶反应产生的晶片后将获得增益，提升当前场上角色的攻击力；增益叠加至三层后，重复获取晶片还将释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成伤害。因此，在队伍中编入岩元素角色，可以更有效地对抗敌人。

- This cruel curse of cold spreads without mercy... O Heaven on high, tell us how we have angered you so! ｜ 冷冽的诅咒竟已蔓延至此…天空啊，你因何而愤怒！

- Boosts your Flamewind blessing to <color=#f39001>the highest level</color>. Choose between 2 diverging paths:\nFlamewind: <color=#ef5534>Searing Whirlwind</color>: When a character's current HP <color=#f39001>increases or decreases</color> enough times, <color=#ef5534>Galeblaze</color> DMG is increased by <color=#f39001>{0}%</color>. Max <color=#f39001>3</color> stacks.\nFlamewind: <color=#f39001>Howling Inferno</color>: When <color=#f39001>Windblessing: Pyro</color> is active, the current active character deals <color=#f39001>{1}%</color> increased DMG. When the current active character's HP is less than <color=#f39001>50%</color>, they will regain <color=#f39001>{2}%</color> HP. ｜ 强化火风祝福至<color=#f39001>最高等级</color>，可选择以下两种分支：\n火风·<color=#ef5534>极限焚徊</color>：角色的当前生命值多次<color=#f39001>提升或降低</color>时，<color=#ef5534>焚风</color>造成的伤害提升<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>，此效果至多叠加<color=#f39001>3</color>层；\n火风·<color=#f39001>极限燃风</color>：<color=#f39001>风之祝祷·火</color>持续期间，当前场上角色造成的伤害提升<color=#f39001>{1}%</color>，且当前场上角色生命值低于<color=#f39001>50%</color>时，将恢复<color=#f39001>{2}%</color>生命值。

- A feather left behind by the Thunderbird that once obliterated Tsurumi Island. It is filled with many memories and much power.\nThe people dwelling within the island fog worshiped the being whose light they could see even through the shroud all around them, and the feathers that fell from the Thunderbird also became the basis for the now-lost Tsurumi instrument, the Maushiro.\nDue to a change, the Thunderbird would eventually annihilate all civilization on the island, and it would later itself be slain over Seirai Island. ｜ 曾经毁灭鹤观的雷鸟留下的翎羽，其中寄宿着许多记忆与力量。\n因为透过雾海也能望见的耀眼形姿，一度成为彷徨在迷雾中的鹤观人的崇拜对象，而雷鸟落下的羽毛也是失落的鹤观乐器「木簧笛」的原本。\n最后由于变故，雷鸟在盛怒之下毁灭了鹤观的文明；一些年月之后，最终又被消灭在清籁岛。

- The Package's Contents Are Cards ｜ 货物是卡牌
- People often believe that Lynette's cat ears are a part of her performance attire, as the same blood flows in her and Lyney's veins, yet he appears no different from ordinary people.\nHowever, Lynette's ears and tail do, in fact, grow on her body — they are real as real can be.\nIt is said that these cat-like features are inherited, but that even as such a bloodline grows thin across generations, instances of "atavism" can still occur from time to time.\nWhen she was young, Lynette did not love this particular gift from her ancestors.\nThere would always be some curious kid who would, whether intentionally or inadvertently, point at them and ask her: Why are you different from everyone else? Are you and Lyney not real siblings?\nThe introverted Lynette did not know how to reply, nor could Lyney always be with her. Whenever such things would happen, she could only push her ears down, curl her tail up, and squat in a corner, by herself and beside herself with misery.\nOnly alley cats would come to comfort her, coiling around and rubbing against her ankles.\nShe could not let her brother see her like this, she knew. He already had a great many things to worry about — he did not need this kind of trivial matter on his mind as well.\nBut she could not simply pretend that nothing was wrong — to deceive the genius magician, she had to fool herself first.\nSo she hugged the cat tightly to herself, softly brushing the fur on its back. As she felt its light breath, calm slowly returned to her heart.\nBy the time the cat leapt from her arms, her face had regained its usual placid appearance.\nAmong Fontaine's nobility, there are also some novelty-seeking degenerates. During one party, a certain "important person" found themselves taken with Lynette's unusual appearance.\nOver her protests, despite her struggling, the siblings' foster father stuffed her into that person's carriage without a second thought, almost as if giving away a sofa-scratching cat.\nWhy her? Why was she born with these ears?\nIn her suffocating solitude, Lynette once again covered her ears in pain, unable to hold back the bitterness repressed over long years.\n"Stop hiding. Cowering will get you nowhere." That voice shone through the darkness with the moonlight. "Come out. The one who wished to harm you is dead."\nThat voice was cruel ice, and yet it had a spellbinding, comforting power also. Lynette lifted her eyes, and there she saw the person she would in later days call "Father."\n"You have good ears. Learn to use them."\n"Father" kneaded Lynette's ears. That touch was not gentle. Indeed, they were as cold as the moon's light.\nAnd like that light, it illuminated a corner of the darkness.\n...\n"When a cat's ears are folded backward, that often indicates fear or vigilance, and if they stand up and point forward, that usually indicates a good mood..."\nWhenever Lyney tells new members of Hotel Bouffes d'ete about the habits of ordinary cats, he will often steal a glance at his younger sister nearby.\nLynette's ears are straight, they face the front, and they occasionally flutter outward.\nIt has been a long time since she last folded them back. ｜ 常有人以为，琳妮特的猫耳也是演出服的一部分。因为哥哥林尼与她流着同样的血，外表却与常人无异。\n可琳妮特多出的一对耳朵一条尾巴，却是实打实的长在身上，真得不能再真。\n据说这种类似猫的性状，往往会伴着血缘遗传，即便后代血脉日渐稀薄，偶尔也会出现「返祖现象」。\n年幼时的琳妮特，并不喜欢这份来自先祖的馈赠。\n总有好事的孩子，或有心或无意，指着它们问琳妮特：为什么你跟大家不一样？你跟林尼是不是亲生的兄妹？\n内向的琳妮特不知如何作答，林尼也不能总陪在她身边。每逢这时，她只能压着耳朵、卷起尾巴，蹲在角落里独自伤心。\n只有街头巷尾的流浪猫们会来安慰琳妮特，绕着她的脚踝轻蹭。\n不能带着这幅表情去见林尼。她心里很清楚。哥哥要操心的事已经很多了，不该再为这点幼稚的事情困扰。\n但强装无事也肯定会被他看穿，想要瞒过天才的魔术师，必须先瞒过自己。\n琳妮特抱起脚边的小猫，轻抚它背上的毛发。感受着它的呼吸，琳妮特的情绪渐渐缓和下来。\n小猫跳出了她的怀抱，她的脸上也已恢复了往日的平静。\n枫丹贵族中还有一些以追寻新奇为乐的败类。一场宴会上，一名「大人物」就相中了琳妮特的不同寻常。\n当时的养父不假思索地将她塞进了「大人物」的车里，不管她的反对，不顾她的挣扎，仿佛只是送出了一只会挠沙发的宠物猫。\n为什么是自己？为什么自己会长这对耳朵？\n令人窒息的孤独中，琳妮特终于压抑不住心中多年的积郁，痛苦地盖住了耳朵。\n「别再躲躲藏藏了，胆怯是无用的。」直到一个声音，与月光一起映入黑暗，「出来吧。想害你的人已经死了。」\n那声音冷酷而肃杀，却又有一种令人安心的魔力。琳妮特抬眼，望向日后的「父亲」。\n「不错的耳朵，可以用来监听。从今往后，学会利用它们吧。」\n「父亲」揉着琳妮特的耳朵，手法并不温柔，言辞并不温和，与那夜的月光一样清冷。\n也像月光一样，照亮一角黑暗。\n……\n「猫的耳朵向后翻折，往往是在恐惧或者警戒，向前竖起多半表示心情愉快…」\n林尼向布法蒂公馆的新成员科普猫的习性时，总会忍不住偷眼去看一旁的妹妹。\n琳妮特的耳朵正朝前竖着，偶尔向外扑闪。\n它们已经很久没再向后翻折了。

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Windborne Hymn." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「风带来的圣歌」。

- A machine created from the union between Fontaine's intricate device and special energy technologies. Based on whether it's imbued with <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia or pneuma</color> energy, the machine will operate differently in battle. When either energy is annihilated upon being <color=#FFE14BFF>attacked by its opposite</color>, an Overloaded state will be induced, causing the machine to lose energy and necessitating the use of emergency power to sustain low-end combat actions. ｜ 基于枫丹的精密装置技术与特殊的能源技术，制造出的机械。基于其外显的<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性或芒性</color>能源特征，在战斗中能采取不同的行动；而这种能量特征在被<color=#FFE14BFF>对立性质的攻击</color>湮灭后，将会因为供能过载而失能，并在之后以应急能源进行低限度的战斗行动。

- Lyney claims that he headed to the chamber containing the Oratrice core upon entering the tunnel and did not witness the crime taking place, and thus did not hear the thud. \n<color=#60B4D2>As a member of the magic troupe, Cowell must have known in advance that Lyney would leave, and he may have thusly judged that he had enough time to commit the crime.</color> ｜ 林尼在进入地道后就通过通风口前往了存放「谕示机」核心的房间，因而没有目睹地道中案件发生的过程，也因此没有听到那一声闷响。\n<color=#60B4D2>作为魔术团的成员，考威尔想必提前知道了林尼会离开，他也由此判断具有充足的作案时间。</color>
- But this was not in vain! For it was only so willing to sacrifice itself, because it believed in the two sages from the bottom of its heart! ｜ 但这一切努力不会白费，它会这样主动冒险，当然是因为深信着两位智者！

- Namecard style.\nAlchemy is a discipline that studies the conversion from one substance to another, but using alchemy to make potions reduces the quality by a drop. I don't know, perhaps that missing drop is converted into making everyone's mood a bit lighter. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n炼金术是研究物质互相转化的学科，但是用炼金术制作药剂质量却会少一截。可能是变成大家快乐的心情了吧，我不知道。

- Now that the Stormterror crisis has passed, it's clear skies above Mondstadt once again.\nHowever, the memory of facing Dvalin in the sky amidst the storms is ever so vivid.\nRelive your memories and once again partake in the battle. Maybe you'll learn something new. ｜ 如今风魔龙的危机已经解除，蒙德的天空终于放晴。\n但面对特瓦林，与暴风共舞的记忆再次鲜明地浮现。\n在回忆中重新演练这场战斗，或许能有新的收获…

- "A game of cards is great every once in a while — let's unwind and forget all our worries!"\nKaveh's deck contains large numbers of Location Cards with high costs. He can play Location Cards normally to obtain advantages, or he can use "Kaveh"'s Skills to discard high-cost cards from his Deck to deal lots of DMG. ｜ 「偶尔打打牌，放松一下，忘掉所有烦心事吧！」\n【提示】卡维的牌组包含了大量高费用的「场地」卡牌，既能正常打出场地牌积累资源优势，又能通过「卡维」的技能从牌库中弃置高费卡牌来造成高额伤害。

- I've heard people say that mitachurls are a more powerful variety of hilichurls, but I never really realized just how strong they are until I ran into one just a few days ago. If I hadn't known any better, I would have guessed that the hulking creature had been chiseled from solid rock. Even its shadow looked immovable as a boulder. I saw it when I was {0}. I bet even the city's strongest would look like mere children in comparison! ｜ 以前听说过丘丘暴徒非常强壮结实，但前几天在外头碰到的时候才确实感受到…啊，像石头砌成的大厦一样壮硕，还提着坚不可摧的岩石盾牌，简直是不可动摇的高大身影。我当时{0}，就看到了它。真是充满了男子汉气概！

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Summary</color>\nDuring the event period, Travelers can complete challenges related to the meteorites, collecting Fading Star's Might and Fading Star's Essence and exchanging them for goods at the Shop.\nTravelers must reach Adventure Rank 20 in order to participate in the "Unreconciled Stars" event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event period, Fading Star's Might and Fading Star's Essence may be exchanged here for precious materials. Once the event shop closes, all Fading Star's Might and Fading Star's Essence in your possession will automatically disappear, and the relevant Event Shop page(s) will also close. \n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Character Boosts</color>\nDuring the Meteorite Remains Salvage and the Fallen Star challenges, the following characters will receive additional boosts: ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n活动期间，旅行者可以完成与陨星相关的挑战，获取「熄星能量」与「熄星精粹」，换取活动商店中的物资。\n冒险等阶达到20级后，才能参与「未归的熄星」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动持续期间，可以在活动商店中，用「熄星能量」与「熄星精粹」兑换珍贵的物质。活动商店结束后，持有的「熄星能量」与「熄星精粹」会自动消失，同时相关活动商店页签将关闭。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【角色强化】</color>\n「回收陨星残骸」与「天降之星」挑战中，以下角色获得额外提升：
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- A storage chest made from high-quality Linden Wood with a sturdy outer casing that can be reliably sealed, making it the number one choice for Fontaine's residents.\nThanks to the efforts of the Maison Gardiennage, the Court of Fontaine enjoys excellent public security, and most residents thus do not require storage boxes with excessive security. As such, the convenience associated with this class of storage has always seen it placed at the top of furniture sales rankings. ｜ 以品质上好的「椴木」板材制作的储存箱，有着坚固的外壳与可靠的密封性，是枫丹居民存放不耐潮物品的最佳选择。\n得益于执律庭的努力，枫丹廷城内的治安状况极佳，多数枫丹市民并不需要极为牢固的保险箱。因此，凭借较为轻便的特性，这款储存箱长期在家具销量榜的前列占有一席之地。

- Housein Vegetables ｜ 侯赛因蔬菜铺
- Grilled Fish doused in delicious sauce. The fish is scored, stuffed with spices, then baked. Once cooked, a thick mint sauce is generously drizzled over the top. The refreshing aroma of the fish is enough to whet anyone's appetite. ｜ 裹满酱汁的烤鱼。鱼身打上花刀，往肚子中塞上香料，烤熟后淋上厚厚的薄荷酱。鱼肉充满清香，让人胃口大开。

- It needs to be second nature when we're in the ring. Let's take turns practicing: While one of us throws, the other will watch and check their accuracy. ｜ 在赛前保持手感也是很重要的。之后我们就轮流训练吧，其中一个人练习投掷时另外一个人在一旁检查动作是否标准。
- When the attacking side <color=#CA6445FF>captures a stronghold</color>, the following buffs will apply: Characters' <color=#CA6445FF>Phlogiston consumption decreases by {0}%</color>; after Chasca <color=#CA6445FF>hits enemies with a Charged Attack</color>, a <color=#CA6445FF>vortex</color> will be generated at the enemy's position, pulling in nearby enemies, that lasts for <color=#CA6445FF>{1}</color>s. This effect can trigger once every <color=#CA6445FF>{2}</color>s. Enemies affected by the vortex will have their All<color=#CA6445FF> Elemental RES reduced by {3}%</color> for 3s. \n\nAfter the attacking side <color=#CA6445FF>breaks all enemy barriers</color>, Chasca will release a shockwave at the enemy's position when dealing Charged Attack DMG, dealing True DMG. A shockwave can be released in this way once every <color=#CA6445FF>{4}</color>s. ｜ 进攻方<color=#CA6445FF>占有据点</color>时，将获得以下增益效果：角色<color=#CA6445FF>消耗的燃素降低{0}%</color>、恰斯卡对敌人<color=#CA6445FF>造成重击伤害</color>后，将在敌人的位置生成<color=#CA6445FF>风涡</color>，持续牵引附近的敌人，风涡持续<color=#CA6445FF>{1}</color>秒，此效果每<color=#CA6445FF>{2}</color>秒至多触发一次。受风涡影响的敌人的所有<color=#CA6445FF>元素抗性降低{3}%</color>，此效果持续3秒。\n\n进攻方<color=#CA6445FF>破除了防守方的全部结界</color>后，恰斯卡对敌人造成重击伤害时，将在敌人的位置释放冲击波，造成真实伤害，每<color=#CA6445FF>{4}</color>秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。

- They're mainly sea monsters. A group of mysterious creatures that live in the sea and occasionally attack residents of coastal areas. ｜ 其实主要是海兽啦，那是一群生活在海里的神秘生物，时不时袭击沿海的居民。
- Character DMG is increased by <color=#FFCC33>{0}</color>%.\nWhen the current on-field character's Pyro/Hydro/Electro/Cryo attacks hit, the character's ATK will increase by <color=#FFCC33>{1}</color>% for <color=#FFCC33>{2}</color>s. The effects and durations of these enhancements <color=#FFCC33>are calculated independently</color> for each Elemental Type. ｜ 角色造成的伤害提升<color=#FFCC33>{0}</color>%。\n当前场上角色的火/水/雷/冰元素攻击命中时，该角色的攻击力提升<color=#FFCC33>{1}</color>%，持续<color=#FFCC33>{2}</color>秒，每种元素类型触发的增益效果分别<color=#FFCC33>独立存在，独立计时</color>。
- The bottom of the roots? ｜ 根系下层？
- I can only assume that with you serving the customers, the wine tasted all the sweeter. ｜ 都是因为有你的招待，才让美酒变得更加香醇了吧。
- Exit the dream to complete follow-up quest ｜ 离开梦境以完成后续任务

- Why of course, I'd personally recommend our freshly caught seafood! It's been pouring these past few days, so the fishing boats haven't been able to sail at all. But the weather finally cleared up today, so we have some fresh catch. ｜ 那当然是刚捕上来的海鲜了！前几天海上雨很大，很多渔船都没出航，这些都是今天天气变好了才有的。
- Endora... still small! Endora... still learning. ｜ 嫣朵拉，还小！嫣朵拉，在学习。
- Who're you talking about, huh? What do you mean, "not on caring for them"? So you're an expert, is that it? After studying Sumpter Beasts for just a couple days? Huh? ｜ 谁不会养？你说谁不会养！你会养，你上了几天学你就会养？嗯？

- Unleashes a shockwave at Thelxie's position, dealing Physical DMG to nearby enemies. ｜ 在「特尔克西」的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成物理伤害。
- "Seems the advantage is mine. Naturally, of course." ｜ 「嗯…我占优势才正常。」
- But just so you're aware... Hu Tao's not really been herself lately. Whenever I invite her to hang out, she either finds an excuse not to come, or spends the whole time staring into space. ｜ 你们不知道，最近胡桃总是心神不宁。我叫她出去玩，她要么就推脱，要么来了却在发呆。
- Thank you. But, Marana is scary. Nara will die. ｜ 谢谢你们。但是，无留陀很可怕。那菈会死的。
- Paimon wonders what story these murals record... ｜ 这幅壁画，到底记录着什么故事呢…
- *cough* *cough* Something's amiss. There weren't monsters here before. Does this strange black substance attract nearby creatures? ｜ 咳咳…咳！抱歉…太邪门了。上次来的时候还没有怪物的…难道这些黑色的怪东西会吸引附近的生物吗？

- What can I do to help? ｜ 我能帮什么忙吗？

- Ha, this painting depicts the stages of evolution. Evolving out of the primordial elemental creatures and into the dragons, then into humans after a few more steps, until one walks upon the stairway to heaven itself... A puerile notion. ｜ 哈，这上面画的乃是进化之阶，由原始的元素生物进化为龙众，再一步步演化为人，直至踏上登天之梯…真是幼稚。
- Phew, that's great! It didn't go missing this time. ｜ 嗯，太好了，这次没有弄丢。

- Hmm... I will pass. ｜ 嗯…还是算了。

- A heavily armed ship of unknown origins has stopped outside Guyun Stone Forest. You hop right on board to investigate... ｜ 在孤云阁旁，停着一艘不知来历的庞大武装舰船，而你却冒冒失失地闯了进去…
- Although we don't boast the same reputation as those classic brands like The Jade Mystery or Mingxing Jewelry, the quality of our products is definitely on par with theirs! ｜ 虽然名号不如「解翠行」、「明星斋」那样的老字号响亮，但质量一点都不比他们差！
- An ancient memento. It still looks as alive as the being that preserved it several centuries ago. ｜ 古老的纪念物，恰如数百年前将它保存的生灵一般鲜活。
- Face the Kamera ｜ 面向镜头
- Although Ako Domeki's fleet was also hit by the storm and was nearly wiped out as a result, the fleet that the Shogunate sent was also all but lost with all hands, with the remnants being forced to retreat to Narukami Island. It would be quite some time before the fleet was ready again. ｜ 虽然赤穗百目鬼的船队也被雷暴波及，几乎全灭…但幕府派来清籁岛的船队也几乎全军覆没，被迫退回鸣神岛，过了一段时间才重整好了船队。

- Phew... Looks like this method worked on you. ｜ 呼，成功了…看来这个方法对你是有效的。
- You and Paimon follow the address on Mizuki's invitation and find your way to the Aisa Bathhouse. However, before you take the chance to enjoy a pleasant soak, it strikes you that business at the bathhouse isn't going so well... ｜ 你和派蒙使用瑞希赠送的邀请函找到了那家名为秋沙钱汤的店，但在享受服务之前，你们发觉这家店的经营情况似乎很不乐观…
- That's a storyteller's duty. I love my work... And amongst all the tales I tell, I love the stories of these heroes the most. ｜ 因为这就是说故事的人的职责，我很喜欢这份职责…而且在这些故事里，我也最喜欢那些英雄们的故事。

- But since you're alive and kicking, we'll still be friends and let bygones be bygones, right? ｜ 但既然你还活得好好的，我们就还是朋友，这点恩怨就已经是过去了，你说对吧？

- A traditional Sumeru dessert. This puff pastry contains chopped nuts and has been baked after having butter drizzled atop it — and not forgetting some syrup once it comes out of the oven. Some researchers will specially order this veritable "fortress of sweetness" to replenish their energies before an exam. This is also why this dish has great pride of place as the Akademiya's favorite dessert. ｜ 传统的须弥甜点。在酥皮中间裹上碎坚果，淋上热黄油进行烤制。出炉后别忘了浇上糖浆。有些学者在考试前会特意点上这么一份「甜蜜城堡」以补充能量，它也因此占据了教令院最欢迎甜品第一名之位。

- ...Let me... Give me time to consider. ｜ …我考虑一下。
- ...It's beautiful. ｜ …好漂亮。

- However, I'm working on some research that will help you "merge into a collective." That way, your life won't be so dolorous. ｜ 其实我现在正在做一个研究，能够帮助你「彻底融入到群体中」，这样你就不必活得那么辛苦了。
- A <color=#FFE14BFF>green-glowing Frenzied Marvelfish</color> will appear in the fishing zone. For 15s after catching this fish, your small/medium nets will enter a Frenzy state. During this period, when you successfully catch fish of these sizes with the corresponding net, <color=#FFE14BFF>action points gained will continue to increase with each successive catch</color>, up to a maximum of 4x/3x their original value.\nWhile this effect is active, catching the Frenzied Marvelfish again will not provide any more buffs. ｜ 捕鱼区将出现有着<color=#FFE14BFF>绿色光效的狂捕奇效鱼</color>，捕捉该鱼后，持有的小型渔网或中型渔网将进入持续15秒的狂捕状态，在此期间，使用对应种类的渔网成功捕鱼时，<color=#FFE14BFF>获得的行动点将随着连击数量的增加而不断提升</color>，至多分别提升至原本的4倍/3倍。\n效果持续期间，再次捕捉狂捕奇效鱼，将无法再获得增益效果。
- I'd like to buy a weapon. ｜ 想买些武器。
- He was holding onto something. Must've been heavy, because he couldn't glide in a straight line to save his life... Maybe that's why he fell. ｜ 抱着个什么东西，飞得歪歪扭扭的…嗯，一定是因为抱着这东西他才掉下来了。

- We have something for you! ｜ 我们有东西要交给你！
- A mobile stall with a mounted copper hot pot. The difference between this and other mobile stalls is that it does not need to go anywhere. So long as the soup base keeps boiling and the ingredients get into the pot, potential patrons will follow the aroma to find it. ｜ 设有铜火锅的移动摊位。和其他移动摊位不同的是，只要汤底沸腾，食材下锅，就会有顾客循着香气找过来，无需商贩四处转移。
- "Playing cards with old friends in a rowdy tavern... What could be more fun than that when you're on the road?"\nHint: Thoma's deck revolves around Weapons and Normal Attacks, using Weapons and Character Skills to enhance Normal Attacks before dealing massive damage. ｜ 「在热热闹闹的酒馆和老朋友打牌…旅行途中，应该没有比这更有意思的事了！」\n【提示】托马的牌组以「武器」和「普通攻击」为主题，擅长通过武器和角色技能提供强化，然后通过「普通攻击」造成大量伤害。
- Hmph. What a fishy guy... ｜ 哼…好可疑——！
- But now, if Paimon is hungry, don't come to the nursery to eat but go eat the mushrooms. There are way too many mushrooms in Vana. It will be good to eat some. ｜ 不过现在，派蒙要是饿了，不要来苗圃吃，去吃蘑菇。桓那的蘑菇太多了，要吃掉一些才好。
- Floral Sidewinder ｜ 飞叶迴斜
- Bing-Bang Finchball ｜ 哐哐当当雀雀球
- A streetlamp that can be found in Port Ormos and other areas. The post has a unique arc that was originally intended to prevent it from being knocked over by Sumpter Beasts, but as it turned out, Sumpter Beasts would still crash into the suspended lamps themselves when laden with goods. As such, they found that not only did this lamp post design not work, but in fact blocked roadside space. The related staff within the Akademiya have sought to replace the base of these lamp posts for remedial work, but these plans have not worked out due to budget constraints... ｜ 可见于奥摩斯港等地的路灯，灯杆有着独特的弧度，原本的意图在于避免被路过的驮兽撞倒，但是驮兽装载货物后，依然会撞到悬吊的灯体，这种灯杆的设计并没有什么用，反而挤占了路边的空间。教令院的相关人士正计划为这种路灯配备底座，进行补救，但碍于预算限制，这一计划并未成功落实…
- Sounds good! Paimon's sure he'll be relieved you're okay. ｜ 嗯，这样也好，总之他需要知道你还平安！

- "In the end, all people, good or evil, will find themselves ground beneath the wheels of fate, and the sapphire city would fade, dissipating like tears beneath the scorching sun." ｜ 「最终，一切良人与恶徒，都平等地被命运的磨盘碾碎，蓝宝石之城邦失色分崩离析，恰似泪滴在烈日下干涸。」
- For some time now. Khedive says that he's found a researcher from Sumeru who can help him out, but that researcher seems to need help themselves... ｜ 有一段时间了，虽然海迪夫说他找到了愿意帮忙的须弥学者，但是那名学者也需要协助…
- Sigewinne was convicted, and thus the Fortress of Meropide gained a tiny new doctor. The more patients she treated, the more her sentence was shortened, and she stayed within the Fortress until she had finally served her time. One day, she received an invitation from an elderly lady. It turns out that she was the young girl that Sigewinne had treated all those years ago. The woman told Sigewinne that she still remembers that it was Sigewinne who saved her back then, and that regardless of whether Sigewinne looked more human or Melusine, the warmth of her palms was ever the same. ｜ 希格雯被判决有罪，梅洛彼得堡从此多了一位小小的医生。她救治的病人越来越多，她的刑期也越来越短。直到刑期结束，她依然继续留在了梅洛彼得堡。某一天，她收到了一位老妇人的邀请。原来，她就是希格雯当年救治的那位小女孩。老妇人告诉希格雯，她记得当年是希格雯救了她。因为无论希格雯的外表是美露莘还是人类，她掌心的温度始终没有变。
- #When the moon hangs highest, Azariq tells a rather coarse joke about a crocodile and a Sumpter Beast, which loses him his blanket-sharing privileges.\n{M#Jeht tells you about many trivial but funny things...\nShe seems to have lived well amongst the Tanit since your last parting.}{F#Jeht tells you about many trivial but funny things...\nA light scent of spices wafts from her, and it seems to you that all the stories she has to tell since your last parting seem tinged with this sadness.} ｜ #月上中天的时刻，阿萨里格讲了一个关于鳄鱼和驮兽的粗俗笑话，让他失去了与你们分享毛毯的资格。\n{M#婕德又为你讲述了许多好笑的琐事…\n自从上次离别后，她在塔尼特的生活一定很充实。}{F#婕德又为你讲述了许多好笑的琐事…\n她的身上散发着淡淡的香料气息，似乎上次离别后的所有故事，都氤氲着这样忧伤的风味。}

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Those Onikabuto bugs look so scary! The patterns on their backs are terrifying!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Do you mean those demonic patterns? It's because they don't like to fight, so they purposely evolved their patterns in a way that scares their enemies away.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>That's really smart. We should try to learn a thing or two from them!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>We could borrow Xiao's mask. If a hilichurl saw you wearing it, do you think they'd run in fear?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Uh... I don't think Xiao would agree to that...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yeah... Hmm, how about we ask Sayu to steal his mask for us?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>She knows ninjutsu that allows her to vanish into thin air. She can steal it for sure! Problem solved!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Uh... If we are afraid of Xiao evening the score with us, how about we steal Childe's mask? We've kicked his butt many times before!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I don't think stealing other people's belongings is a good idea. Also, what if Sayu doesn't agree to all of this?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Th—Then let's... Let's visit Albedo first.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>If Albedo can develop a growth serum for Sayu, she'll help us for sure!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Brilliant, now we just need you to come up with a way to make Albedo help us.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Ugh! Paimon's head is going to explode. Let's stick to festival masks for now. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呀，这些鬼兜虫看起来好厉害，背纹好可怕！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>你说那些恶鬼样式的背纹吗？因为它们不喜欢争斗，所以才进化出了这种鬼怪的图形，用来恫吓敌人。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真是智慧呀，我们是不是也可以学习学习！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不如把魈的面具借过来怎么样？这样丘丘人看见你会被吓呆吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>呃…魈恐怕不会同意吧…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>也是哦…那要不我们——拜托早柚去偷？！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>她不是会倏的一下就消失的忍术吗！一定能偷到！真好啊！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唔…如果怕魈事后算账的话，不如去偷「公子」的吧！反正你也打得过他。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>偷东西不太好吧，而且万一早柚不同意呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那、那我们就先去找…先去找阿贝多！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>要是阿贝多能研究出让早柚长高高的药剂，早柚一定愿意帮忙！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那么就该想想怎么让阿贝多帮忙了？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇！头开始痛了，我们还是去祭典上买一个吧。

Thankfully, I'm no stranger to roughing it out in the field and managed to escape in the nick of time... ｜ 实在可惜！那天我{0}，发现了一幕堪称绝美的景致——两台警卫机关正在悠闲地徘徊，似乎融入了周围的自然环境…可还没等我找好角度，架好留影机，它们就发现了我，并朝我冲了过来。那时我才意识到，两台警卫机关正属于报道之中的「故障个体」。还好我习惯了跋山涉水实地采访，及时逃走了…

- A small settlement that makes an effort to recapture the scenery in Merusea Village, with unique and rather eye-catching buildings.\nThe Melusines dwell within Elynas, beneath the waves, and few normal people visit their village, though those who do all sing its praises upon their return. Some artists have tried to draw the place based on the descriptions and information gained from interviewing Melusines in the Court of Fontaine. However, there was always a "color difference" between their work and the real colors of the village that was hard to ignore. This problem was only solved once Kamera-taken images of Merusea Village became widespread, thus more or less solving the problem...\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Freminet, Sigewinne ｜ 力求还原海沫村景观的聚落，颇具特色的建筑令人眼前一亮。\n美露莘们生活的村子位于厄里那斯一带的水下，鲜有普通人造访该地，少数访问者归来后，大多对海沫村独特的色彩赞不绝口。曾有几位画家根据他们的描述，结合采访枫丹廷内的美露莘获得的情报，试图画出海沫村的景观。可惜他们的作品与海沫村的实际色彩之间总存在着难以忽视的「色差」，这一问题困扰画家们许久，直到相对客观的留影机画片大量流传开来，才基本得以解决…\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：菲米尼、希格雯

- Sure, why not? ｜ 嗯，我没问题。

- Oh, Paimon can't just leave them here to suffer and endure alone like this! ｜ 对啊，什么独自受苦，听上去也太可怜了！

- Al-Ahmar's throne is right before us. Aren't you obsessed with it too? ｜ 阿赫玛尔的御座就在眼前，你不也满眼都是御座，再也容不下其他东西了么。
