- Former Senior Researcher, Fontaine Research Institute ｜ 前·枫丹科学院高级研究员
- A well-known Fontainian meat dish. The meat is first fried in oil until the skin is a delicious crispy brown, then stir-fried with onions and other condiments, before adding fermented fruit juice and stewing — and don't forget to add cream once the soup thickens. When ready, every last piece of meat is wrapped uniformly in cream, giving it that warm, familiar flavor that Fontainians love. ｜ 家喻户晓的枫丹肉肴。先用油将肉块煎至表皮焦脆，炒香洋葱与其他配菜，加入发酵果实汁一起炖煮，等汤汁收浓后别忘记加入奶油。出锅之时，奶油均匀地包裹着每一块肉，是枫丹人最为熟悉的温暖味道。
- Complete <color=#00E1FFFF>"Chasm Spelunkers"</color> and speak to <color=#00E1FFFF>Jinwu</color> at the <color=#00E1FFFF>campsite in The Chasm's Underground Mines</color> to accept and then complete <color=#00E1FFFF>"The Heavenly Stone's Debris"</color> to initiate this quest. ｜ 完成「<color=#00E1FFFF>方入巨渊初探勘</color>」后，在<color=#00E1FFFF>层岩巨渊·地下矿区的营地</color>与<color=#00E1FFFF>瑾武</color>对话接取并完成「<color=#00E1FFFF>九霄之石悬残片</color>」以进行任务。
- #Yeah, {M#he}{F#she} just wants to meet the God of Wisdom and ask her about something important. We've been in Sumeru for a while now, but we still haven't found a way. ｜ #嗯，{M#他}{F#她}只不过是想求见智慧之神，向她询问一些重要的事情而已。但我们在须弥待了这么久，还没有找到办法。
- If you look closely, you might notice that a lot of clockwork meka have a helical gear shape printed on them! ｜ 如果仔细观察的话，您或许会发现，许多发条机关的外壳上都印制了一个螺旋齿轮的形状呢！
- Gain a total of 12 stars in the Spiral Abyss ｜ 累计获得深境螺旋12星通关奖励
- Obtained from the initial deck ｜ 初始牌组中获取
- Haha, you might not know this, but here, even warriors who fail have a chance to start over. ｜ 哈哈，你可能有所不知，在纳塔，失败的战士也有重新来过的机会。
- "What? You're saying you've been trapped on this island for... for generations!?" ｜ 「什么？你说你们几代人都被困在这个…这个破岛上？！」
- We sell all sorts of fresh flowers and plants here — looking to buy a few bouquets? ｜ 本店有各种鲜艳的花卉在售，想买几束吗？
- Pause Performance ｜ 暂离演出
- Set incomplete ｜ 该套装尚未集齐，无法摆放。
- "...The wilds consume the woodsman's home, mist and rain shroud the fishing boat..." ｜ 「…蓬蒿没樵宅，烟雨暗渔舟…」
- I remember the two brothers from the Kujou Clan. They were understanding and very well aware of the commoners' situation. I didn't think they would support this war... ｜ 我还记得九条家的两兄弟，印象里他们都明事理、懂民情，所以我总觉得他们不该是支持战争的人…
- Sara decided she wanted to import Liyue chili peppers recently. Allegedly, they're hot enough to reduce even Mondstadt's die-hard spice lover Barbara to tears. ｜ 哦，莎拉最近想进口点璃月原产辣椒，据说是能让蒙德最爱吃辣的芭芭拉都辣哭的品种。
- ...Ahh, it's you... Thank you. ｜ …是你啊，谢谢。
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- Just an ordinary, everyday hourglass. Turn it upside down and sure enough, the dry sand starts trickling down like water. ｜ 看上去是寻常的沙漏，干涸的沙砾随着翻转运动像水一样流动。
- Short-Range Rapid Interdiction Fire ｜ 近迫式急促拦射

- Timmie is sulking again. This time, it's not about a pigeon being scared away... ｜ 提米又在生闷气，但这次似乎并不是鸽子被吓走了这么简单…
- Cellar ｜ 地窖
- Huh, funny. Shouldn't she make some retort at this juncture? This feels like we're departing from her character profile somehow... ｜ 奇怪，这个时候，她应该冒出来这么说才对。感觉有点偏离人设了…
- No mischief, okay? Or I'm telling your parents. ｜ 不准惹麻烦哦，不然我会去和你的爸妈告状。
- Kamisato Ayaka ｜ 神里绫华
- Perhaps, I believe, you should deliver him to the Children of Echoes. They will deal with the matter appropriately. ｜ 或许你应该把它交给回声之子，他们会妥善处置它的。
- Uhh... Alright then. Let's just touch that perch first, shall we? ｜ 唔…好吧。总之，先触碰栖木对吧？
- As the dust begins to settle in Sumeru, a certain researcher organizes a fabulous Beast Tamers Tournament with the aid of a wealthy, enigmatic sponsor, and this competition has attracted a sizable number of contestants and audience members alike... ｜ 在一切趋于平静的须弥，某位学者借助着神秘富商的支持，举办了一场奇妙的「驯兽师大赛」，正吸引着大量选手与看客…
- Then we'll just have to leave Liyue Harbor and live an adventurer's life. ｜ 那只能离开璃月港，像冒险家一样生活了。

- Big fish swim ahead, bigger than Paimon, bigger than Quijano. ｜ 有大鱼，很大很大，比派蒙大，比西哈诺还大。
- Search for suspicious places based on the hints ｜ 根据提示探查可疑之处
- Who said anything about buying them? You're really gonna carry a huge fish around all day while we're out visiting Pauleau and Vilmant? ｜ 谁说要买了，难道你打算拎这么大一条鱼去见波洛和维尔芒，再回去吗？
- But I will help Nara... ｜ 但我会帮那菈…

- Please allow me to end this boring and useless conversation. Oh, and Mr. Jurieu, I don't want to see your face here again anytime soon! ｜ 请允许我结束这个无趣的话题，并且短期内都不要再在这儿遇见你，朱里厄先生！
- A formal pose. ｜ 端正的姿势。
- But again, I think a thief who can only sneak around won't have the nerve to make any drastic moves. ｜ 不过，我想这种只会偷偷摸摸的盗贼，应该也没有做出什么激烈举动的气魄。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- It's been a few days since the battle. Hopefully the tribes are getting back to normal... ｜ 距离上次的战斗已经过去好多天了，不知道那些受灾的部族有没有恢复正常…
- I'm not drinking today. But thank you for offering. ｜ 谢谢，今天不喝。

- But you didn't do all that much from the start, and anyway, Zurvan said that we shouldn't give the Great Songs of Khvarena away carelessly. ｜ 不过那先朱那根本就没怎么出力吧，而且祖尔宛也说不能把灵光绝唱随便交给别人。

- So... what you're trying to say is that you fell here... from another world? ｜ 所以说，你们是从世界之外…漂流来的？
- "The Rusty Rudder" ｜ 「锈舵」
- Nice! Looks like my strength is on the rise! Now, how about a friendly game of beach volleyball? I won't hold back! ｜ 手劲在噌噌噌往上涨，想来一场精彩激烈的沙滩排球友谊赛吗？
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装

- Mr. Michica. If you do not mind, I would like to sign a freight contract with you. ｜ 米齐卡先生。如果您愿意的话，我想要和您签订一份货运合同。
- Oh, you're still here! Haha. So... what did you think? ｜ 您还在这呢，哈哈哈，我这书…您觉着怎么样？
- Y'know... that red, burny friend of yours? ｜ 那个「红色的、很烫的，女孩子」…
- You'll meet good friends one day, I'm sure of it... That is my wish for your future. ｜ 在不久的将来，你一定会交到好朋友的，这是我对你的祝福。
- Thanks to you, we can finally write to each other now. I really appreciate your help. ｜ 之前多亏有你，我们才终于能互通信件，真的非常感谢。

- Sure, no problem. ｜ 嗯，没问题的。
- Very good, you're right. More to the point, however, it has a certain special ability. ｜ 不错，确实如此，不过更关键的是，它有一种奇妙的能力。

- Two—! ｜ 二——！

- When characters trigger <color=#ffcc33>Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, Burning, and Bloom</color> reactions against opponents, or deal DMG to opponents through <color=#ffcc33>Dendro Cores</color> (including Burgeon and Hyperbloom), the opponents' DEF will be decreased by <color=#ffcc33>{0}%</color> for <color=#ffcc33>{1}s</color>.\n<color=#ffcc33>Hydrograna</color> will be present during the challenge. ｜ 角色对敌人触发<color=#ffcc33>原激化，超激化，蔓激化，燃烧，绽放</color>反应后，或通过<color=#ffcc33>草原核</color>的爆发对敌人造成伤害（包含烈绽放、超绽放）后，该敌人的防御力降低<color=#ffcc33>{0}%</color>，持续<color=#ffcc33>{1}</color>秒。\n挑战中，存在<color=#ffcc33>「水种子」</color>。
- This unique street lamp has vines coiling all over it, with the lamp itself seeming like a heavy fruit on a branch, laden with gently-shining fluorescent substances that often attract little animals of similarly soft temperament. It is said that this design comes from a certain plant within the rainforest, and that the uneven curvature of the vines and the lamp post highlights nature's beauty well indeed. There are still children who believe a certain fairy tale surrounding these lamp posts — which is that they are not man-made structures, but are instead "lamp-trees" that grew from seeds that the Forest Rangers planted. ｜ 盘绕着藤蔓的别致路灯，灯体如同枝头沉甸甸的果实，饱含荧光物质，散发的光彩明亮而柔和，时常召来性情温和的小动物。据称这种路灯的设计来自雨林中的某种植物，藤蔓与灯杆那错落有致的弧度的确彰显着自然之美。如今还有孩子们坚信着有关它们的童话故事——这种路灯并非人工建造的产物，而是巡林员们撒下的种子生长而成的「灯树」。
- I'm feeling inspired. ｜ 有灵感了。
- Yeah, a tree hollow! Do you know Tanger's stories? The Aranara living in the forest will patiently listen to every word children say. ｜ 对呀，树洞！你听过丹吉尔先生的童话么？居住在森林里的兰那罗们会耐心地听小朋友说完每一句话。
- It's like this... ｜ 事情是这样的…
- We should be fine leaving them here for a bit, right? We've gotta hoof it back to the Stadium and tell Tenehua... ｜ #让他们暂时在这里等等应该不要紧吧？{NICKNAME}，我们得回圣火竞技场，把这件事告诉特纳华先生才行…

- Prank-prone rascals with a slim and agile form.\nThese weasels are red from head to toe and are highly proficient in hunting bugs and lizards. Red-Tailed Weasels are very visible, but many predators who fear fire keep their distance due to the similarity between the weasels' coloration and the flames of Pyro. In the Realm Within, where animals live in harmony, the intimidating color of the weasels coats has afforded them a higher status. ｜ 身材细长灵巧、钟爱恶作剧的捣蛋鬼。\n通体赤红的鼬鼠，擅长捕食昆虫与蜥蜴。身上赤红的颜色十分显眼，由于红尾鼬的和火元素色彩相称，许多惧怕烧灼的捕食者会敬而远之。而在动物们和睦相处的壶中洞天，这种鼬鼠反而凭借吓人的毛色获得了较高的地位。
- Second, purely out of curiosity, I did investigate the case later from within the Police Station. My conclusion was that the suspect Sango had caught was in fact the real murderer. ｜ 第二，出于兴趣，我倒也仔细在奉行所内查过那个案子，结论是——珊瑚抓住的犯人就是真凶。
- Violet Ibis ｜ 菫鹮
- Collecting <color=#FFCC33>purple</color> Orbs of Inspiration as they emerge will <color=#FFCC33>subtract a fixed amount of points</color>, while collecting <color=#FFCC33>orange</color> ones as they appear will <color=#FFCC33>grant a fixed amount</color> instead. As such, you need to watch your timing while in motion.\nAdditionally, collecting <color=#FFCC33>Orbs of Technique</color> will <color=#FFCC33>greatly expand the range of Challenge Coin collection</color>, so make good use of their special abilities. ｜ 收集呈现<color=#FFCC33>紫色</color>的灵感球，将<color=#FFCC33>扣除一定的评分</color>；而收集呈现<color=#FFCC33>橙色</color>的灵感球，则能<color=#FFCC33>获得一定的评分</color>。因此，需要注意移动的时机。\n此外，收集<color=#FFCC33>特技球</color>后还可以<color=#FFCC33>扩大收集挑战币的范围</color>，可以多多利用这一特性。
- Yuegui: Throwing Mode Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 月桂·抛掷型持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- When she uses the Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Dawnfrost Darkstar</color>, Citlali gains the "Opalstar Vestments" effect until Itzpapa leaves the field. During this time, she will obtain 10 stacks of Stellar Blade. When a nearby active character other than Citlali deals DMG using Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks, or Elemental Skills and Bursts, 1 stack of Stellar Blade will be consumed to increase the DMG dealt by 200% of Citlali's Elemental Mastery.\nAfter nearby party members trigger Frozen or Melt, Citlali will gain another 3 stacks of Stellar Blade. This effect can trigger once every 8s.\n\nUsing the Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Dawnfrost Darkstar</color> will reset Stellar Blade stacks.\nAdditionally, when Citlali is using her leap, or is Aiming or using her Charged Attack in mid-air, her Phlogiston consumption is decreased by 45%. ｜ 施放元素战技<color=#FFD780FF>霜昼黑星</color>时，茜特菈莉将获得「白星之裙」效果，持续至伊兹帕帕退场：持续期间，茜特菈莉获得10层「星刃」，除茜特菈莉外的附近的当前场上角色的普通攻击、重击、下落攻击、元素战技或元素爆发造成伤害时，将消耗1层「星刃」，提升造成的伤害，提升值相当于茜特菈莉元素精通的200%。\n队伍中附近的角色触发冻结反应或融化反应后，茜特菈莉将额外获得3层「星刃」，该效果每8秒至多触发一次。\n\n施放元素战技<color=#FFD780FF>霜昼黑星</color>时，「星刃」的层数将会刷新。\n此外，茜特菈莉进行腾跃、或是在空中进行瞄准或重击时，消耗的燃素降低45%。

In the long stretches of leisure following that, Genius Invokation TCG became a way to while away all that free time.\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: After the battle begins, all characters from both sides gain 1 Energy.</color> ｜ 酒吧老板很忙，要为顾客准确提供「好酒」，在此之后的闲暇时间里，七圣召唤成了一种无须离店就能打发大把时间的高效消遣。\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】战斗开始后，双方所有角色获得1点充能。</color>
- (Touch his horn...) ｜ （抚摸龙伙伴的角…）

- A common fruit stand with a white roof.\nTo the everyday folks of Mondstadt, white represents sincerity. In Liyue, the same color has traditionally come to symbolize genuine goods at a fair price.\nOf course, for the majority of merchants in Mondstadt and Liyue, honesty and transparency are the name of the game. ｜ 寻常的水果摊位，采用了纯白的顶棚。\n在蒙德平民的观念中，白色代表真诚；璃月传统则认为，白色有「货真价实」的寓意。\n在要价公道，绝不欺客这一点上，蒙德和璃月的大部分商人，都是默契的。

- Anyway, don't sweat the small stuff, Sorush. You're not really doing anything that especially needs praising right now, are you... ｜ 斯露莎也是，别这么小气啦。再说了，到现在斯露莎也没做什么特别值得夸赞的事情吧…

- Absolutely. How many other people in the world have what it takes to knock the wind out of Stormterror's sails and put the Overlord of the Vortex back under the sea, eh? ｜ 当然。能挫败风魔龙，镇压漩涡之魔神的凡人，普天之下又有几人？
- This fruit contains great power. Something amazing might happen if it was made into wine...\nThe pint-sized bartender's jade-green eyes blink a few times. "And so you'd like me to mix you that drink?" ｜ 这是蕴含着力量的强大果实，酿成酒的话，或许能产生奇妙的反应…\n小小的调酒师眨了眨翠色的眼眸，「你是想邀请我来调酒吗？」
- ... ｜ ……

- You guys are incessant... Fine, I guess I'll do that for a change. Where do you want me to fish? ｜ 真是受不了你们…行吧，就当是换个心情了。你要我在哪里钓鱼？
- Are you tired, Paimon? Do you want to take a break? ｜ 派蒙累了吗？要不要休息一下？
- I'll go find them myself later. Still, thank you for the trouble. Please take these as your payment, Traveler. ｜ 我等一下自己出去找它吧，辛苦你帮我跑这一趟了，这些报酬请你收下吧，旅行者。
- I would have done it, but... I dropped my Kamera while descending into the mines, so I can only rely on you now, hehe! ｜ 说来丢人…下矿时我的留影机不小心摔坏了，所以只能仰赖前辈高超的摄影技巧啦。
- It's not that, it's... I mean, I'm just your typical commoner, I've never met someone as high up as the Yuheng before in my whole life! ｜ 不不，我这种小老百姓…还是第一次见玉衡星这样的大人物。
- ...You were right, Miss Emilie, there were four of us at the beginning: Myself, Lucien, Edgar... and a researcher from Sumeru in charge of flower cultivation... Vijava. ｜ …你说得没错，当初我们团队里的确有四个人，除了我们跟艾德加…还有负责花种培育的须弥学者，维佳雅。
- All right, let's not dilly-dally any longer. Let's make us some Imported Poultry! ｜ 好了，不耽搁了。我们一起来做渡来禽肉吧！
- <i>Whose statue is that atop the castle again...</i> ｜ <i>城堡顶端的神像是谁来着…</i>
- But that's when the thought came to me. If we could help everyone turn over a new leaf, they would no longer have to lead such gloomy existences. ｜ 我就在想，与其在这里也像过去那样浑浑噩噩，为什么不让大家有机会改变呢？
- Eh? Um, well... Paimon was thinking that maybe someone accidentally knocked over an oil lamp, and um... ｜ 欸？我…在想是不是有人撞翻了油灯，把仓库点燃了…
- If all goes well, you will not only be well compensated but your reputation in Inazuma will be enhanced. ｜ 顺利解决了问题的话，不仅能获得报酬，您在稻妻城中的声望也会提高。
- What's the matter? ｜ 怎么了？
- It does look a little like that one. ｜ 确实有点像。
- Although the path was blocked, we still stationed some guards there to stop anyone from approaching. They were instructed to only open the door once Miss Clorinde had returned. ｜ 那条路虽然走不通，我们还是请了看守一直等在那里防止别人靠近，克洛琳德小姐一回来他们就把门打开。
- The Phantasmal Conches scattered throughout the Golden Apple Archipelago have recorded voices and images of the past within them. Collect these conches to bear witness to all manner of stories... ｜ 散落在金苹果群岛各地的「幻境海螺」记录着过往的声音与影像。收集「幻境海螺」，即可得知各式各样的故事…

- Thanks for letting us know all this. ｜ 谢谢你能告诉我们这些。

- Hmm, how can we make the lava rise up? Paimon feels like we triggered some mechanism earlier... ｜ 唔，要怎么让岩浆涨上来呢，总觉得之前触发过什么机关…

- *cough* H—How could you besmirch the search for inspiration with the phrase "eating and drinking"? If I'm drinking anything in, it's the festive atmosphere! The sights and the sounds, the humans and youkai at play... ｜ 咳咳…找灵感的事情，怎么能叫吃喝玩乐呢！我这是在体验祭典的氛围！喧闹的祭典、欢快的人类跟妖怪…
- Hard to turn a guy down after a speech like that... ｜ 都说到这个份上了…
- Ei ｜ 影
- While it is a doctor's duty to save others, the doctor is also themselves a person who deserves to be saved. If we wish to preserve lives, we should strive for an outcome where everyone will live to see another day. Those who willingly give themselves up for others are worthy of our respect, but we should not accept their sacrifice as predestined or an inevitable part of life. ｜ 医者普救世人，但我以为医者自身也在世人之列。身为医者，既要救人也要救己，舍己为人固然值得钦佩，但没有人生来就是要为他人牺牲的，不该这样。
- Geo Specter ｜ 岩飘浮灵
- I think I'm good at asking the right questions and giving good answers, but I've come to realize that a lot of people just convince themselves they don't understand. The answers to their problems don't help them. It seems to me that as people grow older, they lose the courage to question things and accept the truth... ｜ 我自认为我擅长提问和回答问题，但我渐渐明白，有很多人是揣着明白装糊涂，问题的答案并不能帮上他们的忙。是不是随着年龄增长，大家都会失去面对质问和答案的勇气呢…

- Help Needed:\nRoaming the outdoors, doing battle against fierce beasts, seeing wondrous sights... Such is the romance of being an adventurer.\nStill, the <color=#3399CC>Ruin Drakes</color> are just way too much. How are we supposed to get away from one without serious incident, let alone beat it?\nThe last one I saw was not all that far from <color=#3399CC>Caravan Ribat</color>. I was lucky enough to see it from afar and flee early, hence saving my life.\nSuch threats to public safety should be dealt with by the professional Corps of Thirty, I reckon! ｜ 求助：\n虽然前往野外，与强大的野兽搏斗，见识壮丽的风景，是所有冒险家的浪漫。\n但是<color=#3399CC>遗迹龙兽</color>也太过分了吧，那种程度的怪物谁能打得过！碰到的话，绝对就遇难了。\n我上次遇到的遗迹龙兽就离<color=#3399CC>喀万驿</color>不远，还好我远远看见它就立刻逃跑了，这才捡了一条命。\n这种涉及居民生命安全的事，我觉得交给专业的「三十人团」处理更好，拜托了！

A character can equip a maximum of 1 {SPRITE_PRESET#3003}Weapon) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>角色造成的伤害+1</color>。\n角色如果在$[K6]角色状态或$[K6]出战状态的保护下，则造成的伤害额外+1。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色使用「元素战技」后：</color>如果我方存在提供「$[K6]」的出战状态，则为一个此类出战状态补充1点「$[K6]」。（每回合1次）\n（<color=#FFFFFFFF>「{SPRITE_PRESET#3204}长柄武器」角色</color>才能装备。角色最多装备1件「{SPRITE_PRESET#3003}武器」）

- A street lamp crafted from sturdy and reliable "White Chestnut Oak Wood" found within the "People of the Springs." It is relatively short in height and features a unique lampshade shaped like a harpoon.\nIt is said that this design originates from a past custom of resisting Abyssal invasions — some guards would patrol at night with torches on harpoons or spears. Thus, the lampshade is shaped like a spearhead, and its hanging height is conveniently within reach of most adults, reminiscent of those times. ｜ 由结实可靠的「白栗栎木」制成的路灯，可见于「流泉之众」内部。其高度相对低矮，采用了形似鱼叉矛头的特殊灯罩设计。\n据说，这样的设计源自过去人们抵抗深渊入侵时的一种习惯——部分守卫会用鱼叉或长枪在夜间挑灯巡逻。因此，这款路灯的灯罩被设计成了矛头的形状，而且悬挂灯罩的高度恰好能让多数的成人触手可及，就像以前那样。
- Look, how about this: There's no rule saying we're obliged to stand up while we wait, so why don't we borrow some chairs from the guild nearby? ｜ 我看不如这样：既然没规定我们一定要站着等，那我们不如去附近商会借几张椅子？
- It might be the Guild's money, but we'll have a tough time explaining to our boss why we spent so much in one go. ｜ 虽然是商会的钱，但钱花多了也没办法和老爷交代啊。
- That's just what a scholar from Sumeru said when the orchard first opened. ｜ 这是果园刚刚开垦出来的时候，一位须弥学者留下的话。
- Indeed, I often ask myself how I might describe the charm of my country to others, even with my limited knowledge and vocabulary. ｜ 我时常质问自己，仅仅凭借我贫乏的知识与词汇，要如何才能向他人传达我美丽的故乡…的魅力呢？

If you continue to act in violation of the aforementioned rules, the name of "Little One" on this account will be reset again. In case of serious violations, the account may be in danger of being banned. Please follow and respect all corresponding rules. ｜ 亲爱的旅行者： \n系统发现当前帐号为「小家伙」起的名字，违反了游戏内的【改名规则与声明】，本次改名未通过。同时我们已返还旅行者使用的道具「重立名约之契」，旅行者仍可使用其进行改名。如旅行者后续仍出现相关违规行为，当前账号中「小家伙」的名字会被再次重置，情节严重者，其账号可能会面临封禁风险，还请旅行者遵守相应规范。

- When you are standing over an Elemental Matrix on the ground during the battle's first phase, you can activate the matrix's effect(s):\nPyro: Clears the Raw Frost effect from the ground.\nCryo: Clears the Remnant Flame effect from the ground.\nAnemo: Creates an Upcurrent with which you can dodge some of Shouki no Kami's attacks.\nHydro: Creates a continuous healing effect.\nElectro: Suppresses Shouki no Kami. Activate it again while a suppression effect is active to overload and paralyze him. ｜ 战斗一阶段时，当角色处于地面上的元素矩阵中时，能激活矩阵的效果：\n火元素：清除地面上的霜寒状态；\n冰元素：清除地面上的余火状态；\n风元素：产生上升气流，以躲避正机之神的部分攻击；\n水元素：产生持续的治疗效果；\n雷元素：压制正机之神；期间再次激活将使其过载瘫痪。

- Ah, right! I mustn't look at you too long, or I'll be drawing more attention to our difference in status... Oh dear, I've already stared at you for quite a while. ｜ 哦，对了，视线不可以在对方身上停留太长时间，进一步凸显地位差距…糟了，好像我已经看了很久了。

- ...Okay, then we'll take care of things here! ｜ …这里就交给我们了！

- Uh... Sure, I guess? ｜ 不愧是你…也、也行？
- That's not the topic for now... Without food, the last four left of the Ninth Company could be gone at any moment. ｜ 那是后话了…但如果没有食物，第九连队最后的编制成员就危在旦夕了。
- In fact, it looks like your parents brewed this bottle themselves. ｜ 小狼狼，看来这瓶酒是你的父母亲手制作的。
- It's been pretty fun! Paimon isn't sure if it's because there was this market during Weinlesefest, but we got all sorts of decorations. ｜ 挺有意思的！而且不知道是不是因为佳酿节期间开设了美酒集市的关系，我们还获得了各式各样的装饰品呢。
- A shelf made from Athel Wood. Its surface was treated using a special technique, making the whole shelf water absorbent to some extent. Not only is it resistant to moisture in the rainforest, it also has an increased service life when placed in the desert. These shelves are mainly used for storing pottery, and are sometimes placed indoors as display shelves. ｜ 以「柽木」打造的置物柜，得益于特殊的表面处理工艺，柜体有着一定的吸水能力，不仅能在雨林地区抵抗潮湿的侵袭，还能在沙漠地区延长使用寿命，常被用于放置陶器，有时也会作为陈列柜摆设在室内的醒目位置。

- This was once a decorative feather in someone's hat. Being dark green, it is quite eye-catching indeed. ｜ 原本在礼帽上的装饰鸟羽。墨绿的颜色想必相当吸引眼球吧。

- Okay, you'd best get back. You may have just beaten the living daylights out of her comrades, but if she's traveling alone she shouldn't get word of it right away. ｜ 好了，你快点回去吧，虽然你刚才把她的同伙打跑了，但是她既然一个人单独行动，那她的同伙肯定也没法把你的事马上告诉她。

- A dense vine frame, upon which fruit shall be hung, all of which have hopes of someday becoming fine wine and being sold for a pretty price...\nBut before that, these grapes must have the fortune to avoid being turned into juice by the Dawn Winery's master and thus coming to an ignominious end. ｜ 茂密的葡萄藤架，每颗果实都有希望汇入将来的美酒，卖出高价…\n但在此之前，葡萄们要有足够的运气，避免被晨曦酒庄的主人做成果汁，就此结束平凡的果实生涯。

- Is Dragonspine so dangerous that even an adventurer like you couldn't keep one container from... ｜ 雪山真有这么危险吗？连你这样的冒险家都会失手，连一盒花都…

- It's my own decision to stay in the Arataki Gang. It can be pretty annoying having to clean up their mess all the time, but in return, they treat me with a sincerity that is irreplaceable... They always save the best things for me and never leave me feeling down. When I announced my decision to stay in the gang, they all cheered for me. I know outsiders don't think very highly of the Arataki Gang, and the members themselves don't really care what others think. But, I still want to strive to change the impression we leave. I might complain about them from time to time as my family, but I'll never let anyone badmouth them. ｜ 留在荒泷派是我自己的选择。收拾烂摊子难免令人火大，但他们也给了我无可替代的真诚。最好的东西都先留给我、从不泼我冷水、在我宣布决定后闹哄哄地鼓掌吹口哨…我知道外面对荒泷派的评价不太好，他们自己也不在乎，但我还是想努努力，改变别人对我们的印象。因为，对待「家人」，自己可以偶尔抱怨，但就是不想其他人说他们的不好。
- Explore the Realm of Khab ｜ 探索「呿波境」

- I enjoy sorting medicinal ingredients and using each ingredient's unique properties to produce pills or ointments. I know this process like the back of my hand. People think that the process of making medicine is difficult and complicated, but to me, it brings endless enjoyment. Amazing, isn't it? That we can condense the bounties of heaven and earth into a tiny, unremarkable pill, and use it to bring people back from the verge of death. ｜ 分拣药材，再依其各自特性炮制成药丸或是药膏，这其中的过程我再熟悉不过。世人都觉得制药过程繁难，但在我看来，其实乐趣无穷。试想，竟有人能将天地造化之功凝聚于小小一剂药中，挽救苍生性命，不是很奇妙吗？

- An ancient ruined city that was once used by a now-bygone secret order as an ad-hoc site of assembly.\nNow, all that remains to rule the roost are beasts bereft of language or intellect. Defeat them, and you may claim precious artifacts. ｜ 一度被过去的秘密社团用做临时集会所的古代废都，它曾是更古老的团体所使用的据点之一。\n如今占据这里的只有不具语言与智慧的魔物。将它们击败，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物吧。
- This booth forms the core of the charity stall and has all manner of materials available within.\n"At the request of Logistics Division member Bernhard, the charity stall representing the Knights of Favonius at Weinlesefest has been named 'Favonian Goodies' by Paimon, 'Teyvat's premier guide.'"\n"The funds from the charity sale will be pooled by the Knights and donated to old folks and children in need, and as such, is a most important..."\n"Paimon said that 'This isn't some super serious job, so you don't have to use all these serious words. This isn't a report, you know! We're here to make people happy, so even our notes should sound happy!'"\n"'Paimon stated that 'You don't have to write this stuff down. Just cross it out or something...'"\n"Ten minutes after we opened for business, Paimon accidentally knocked a plate of Ham over, cleaned it up, before eating it herself. We shall just have to charge this to her account..."\n"Regardless, since this is the first time we are running a shop, we must all make use of our previous experience and work together to accomplish our aims!" ｜ 承载义卖店铺核心功能的摊位，各种物料一应俱全。\n「受后勤小队成员伯恩哈德所托，在佳酿节上代表西风骑士团举办义卖活动所用的店铺，由『提瓦特最好的向导』派蒙命名为『西风呼呼义卖铺』。」\n「义卖所获的资金会被骑士团汇总，捐赠给有需要的老人和孩子，意义重大…」\n「派蒙说『又不是特别严肃的工作，没必要用这种公文报告式的严肃措辞啦！既然是能让大家露出笑容的活动，店主手记的口吻也要开开心心才对！』」\n「派蒙说『这句不用记下来，快点删掉它…』」\n「开店十分钟后，派蒙就不小心打翻了一盘火腿，洗干净后自己吃掉了，这盘火腿的成本就记在派蒙自己的账上了…」\n「总之，这是我们第一次经营店铺，是时候好好运用以前的经验了，就和派蒙一起加油吧！」

- It's alright, it just means that the author writes very well. ｜ 没事的，说明作者写得好…
- I'm not. ｜ 我没有。
- Let's skip right to talking about this deal, shall we? ｜ 话不多说，来谈谈这次的交易吧？
- In truth, one had more than a few misgivings about your chosen partner. As an exorcist, his talent was lacking. One could hardly say his skill with sigils was any better. ｜ 说实话，你挑的那年轻小辈本仙不太满意。作为天衡方士，他的悟性明显不足，驱使符箓毫无技巧可言。
- I was always too afraid to skip Mother's fighting lessons. ｜ 母亲教我们武艺的时候，我总是战战兢兢的，不敢开小差。
- Hello. Are you interested in doing some work for the Ministry of Civil Affairs? ｜ 您好！有兴趣为「总务司」做点事吗？
- I'll keep waiting for him here. Thanks for helping me out, by the way. Here, these are for you. ｜ 我会继续在这里等他的，谢谢你帮我忙，这些东西请你收下吧。
- Life is too short... ｜ 人生真是短暂啊…
- "...If I do return empty handed, that old geezer is going to nag at me till I go insane... Come to think of it, Soraya is also doing research in Liyue, and she's staying at the Wangshu Inn. If she could help me out a bit..." ｜ 「空手回去，我非得被那个老头子念叨疯了不可…索拉雅小姐好像也在璃月做研究，似乎是住在『望舒客栈』，她要是能帮帮我的话…」
- And the renowned Paimon! ｜ 还有传说中的派蒙！

- Yes, nicely done, hehe. Just make everything a total mess. ｜ 没错，就是这样，嘿嘿…让每一步都变得糟糕起来吧。
- Maybe she just wants to be left alone. ｜ 也许是她不喜欢被人打扰。
- It's a shame there's no coffee around here. ｜ 可惜现在喝不到咖啡。

- No, I didn't design any one specific building. Most of my work here concerned structural renovation. ｜ 倒没有具体的建筑…我在这里做得最多的是修缮工作。

- "What, someone got published by Yae Publishing House before I did? That's going to hurt my credibility as a light novel authority..." ｜ 「什么，竟然有人抢在老夫之前在八重堂出版了小说，这下本人轻小说研究权威的身份岂不是…」
- This power rips and tears their bodies, turning them into something altogether different from regular Saurians... It drives them berserk, and causes them to lose their sanity. ｜ 那份力量会撕扯他们的身躯，让它们变成有别于正常龙众的东西…变得狂暴，失去理智。

- Enemies must be destroyed. We will "clench our left hands"! ｜ 敌人，必须，消灭。必须，「握紧左手」！
- Wow, what a coincidence! Ayaka and I were just talking about you on the way here. Are you also here for the film? ｜ 哇！好巧！我和绫华路上还聊起你们！你们也是来拍映影的吗？
- Oh ho. What a commendable imagination. ｜ 呵呵…想象力倒是不错…

- This Sword Cemetery is ancient. Presumably, it was left by soldiers on an expedition against monsters some time back in history... ｜ 这座剑冢很久以前就在这里了，大概是过去讨伐魔物的战士们留下的遗物…

- From your style of dress, friend, you must also not be a Liyue local. Am I right in saying so? ｜ 看你的装束，运货的这位朋友，你也不是璃月本地人吧。

- Help Tlazolli retrieve the goods ｜ 帮助特拉佐莉拿回货物
- So, as the audience, which do you prefer? ｜ 怎么样，作为观众的话你会喜欢哪一种结局呢？
- Hmm... Sounds like a good idea. Maybe that's something I should do. ｜ 应该这样做吗？好像…是个好主意。

- "Why do you want to learn the language of human?" "So I can befriend humans when I become one."\nThe child-like voice says, in the sea of dandelions. The Fox in the Dandelion Sea, Part 6. ｜ 「你为什么要学说人的话呢？」「为了变成人以后，能和人交朋友啊。」\n蒲公英海中，稚嫩的声音不知传到了何方。童话故事《蒲公英海的狐狸》，第六卷。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- A Fatui mage who can command a Hydro Mirror in battle. Her posture is highly dignified, as if she is one who worships a god.\nThe Hydro Mirror she manipulates lures those enchanted by her to willingly fall for her illusion. Nothing seems to escape her ears. No one knows what those covered eyes have seen, nor what kind of obsession might be reflected in them... ｜ 操纵着水镜进行战斗，有着仿如侍奉神明般的端庄姿态的愚人众仕女。\n优雅自如地操控着水镜的力量，让为之所炫的人，心甘情愿地坠入她的幻境。似乎一切都逃不过她的耳朵。被蒙住的双眼，不知见识过什么景象，也不知其中会倒映出怎样的执妄…
- You're not wrong... But even a samurai has a right to some free time. You outlanders wouldn't understand! ｜ 你说的没错…但就算武士也有权享受自己的闲暇，你们外国人是不会懂的！
- I hear, the more envelopes you receive, the more luck you have in the new year. Do you know why? ｜ 我听说，有些人在制作祝柬时，会特意将信纸放在熏香上吹一吹，让纸带上些香味，你知道是为什么吗？
- Pengyi, please redraft our plans, make a summary report, and send it to the Ministry of Civil Affairs. ｜ 朋义，劳烦你重新做个规划，总结成书面报告递交到总务司。
- A mysterious shard engraved with a pattern of stars. It seems to be the key to solving a certain mechanism puzzle somewhere. ｜ 刻印着星空纹路的神秘碎片，似乎可以用来解开某处机关的谜题。
- He can transform a rusty blade into a powerful weapon simply by saying its new name! ｜ 哪怕手握生锈的废刀，只需报上相应的名号，就能将它转化成神兵利器！
- Setaria runs away. ｜ 塞塔蕾跑开了。
- A dragon ruin from antiquity. Within it are hidden large devices that can affect the Ley Lines. You must make every second count if The Captain and Ororon's radical plan is to be stopped. ｜ 远古时期留下的龙之遗迹，其中隐藏着能够影响地脉的大型装置。只有抓紧每分每秒，才有机会阻止队长和欧洛伦的激进做法。
- About the customers' feedback... ｜ 关于客人们的反馈…
- Yeah, you can't just fake it and hope to make it. ｜ 确实，不能滥竽充数…
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- It has an eerie feel to it, can you teach it to me? Maybe I can find some inspiration if I sing it while I'm writing my novel. ｜ 听上去很有恐怖的氛围，也教教我吧。赶稿的时候哼一哼，没准能灵感爆发呢。
- #You even tried to hurt {NICKNAME}. Did you have even the faintest inkling of who you were asked to deal with? To think that he could have trained someone as clueless as you... I've really got to have a good conversation with him... ｜ #竟然还想害{NICKNAME}。你也不看看你找上的标的是什么人物？啊？居然能带出这样的蠢货，事后我可要找他聊聊…
- We mustn't let those lazy Akademiya scholars know about the progress I'm making. If they catch wind of this, they'll stop at nothing to make my life even more of a hassle. I'll reject anything they send my way, of course, but the communication required to do so is a huge waste of my time. ｜ 不能让教令院那些喜欢偷懒的家伙知道我又在进步，否则他们会想方设法把麻烦事推给我。我当然不会接了，但沟通起来总要浪费些时间。
- (We can ask them about the mysterious creatures while at it.) ｜ （可以顺便问问神秘生物的事。）
- Hmm? Didn't you use to be on good terms with the adepti, though? You sure they didn't tell you anything about this? ｜ 咦？长生你不是说，当年连仙人们都得给你面子吗？难道你没听说过这里的事？

- A folding screen delicately crafted by the most skillful artisans. Its frame is made from Sandbearer Wood with a vermillion finish, and the finest silk was selected as its fabric. Among the multitude of splendid decorations at the Lantern Rite, this folding screen can be considered a rare masterpiece. The painting on it depicts a misty mountain view, as if one is standing atop the peaks in Minlin and gazing into the distance. ｜ 以朱红漆面的「却砂木」为框架，上好绸缎为布面，由手艺顶尖的工匠精心制作而成的屏风，放眼海灯节诸多华美的装潢，亦是难得的佳品。屏面绘有雾气弥漫的山景，如置身珉林的峰峦之上，极目远眺。
- No one wants to have to go up against Ningguang... ｜ 无论是谁，都不想成为凝光的对手…
- This delicate, quaint, and propitious folding screen uses precious Sandbearer Wood as the core around which the finest brocade is wrapped, and can be seen around Liyue during Lantern Rite.\nThe brocade on the screen depicts a scene showing the world coming back to life with the coming of spring, the scissor-tailed swallow and the sparrow singing in harmony. According to legend, this scene was painted at the interstice of winter and spring, and the painter imbued it with their hopes for clement weather, peace, and an auspicious new year. No matter when or where, beautiful wishes are the best gift, and during a festive season, such wishes embroider the festival with a radiant rainbow of joy. ｜ 古雅精致，意趣吉庆的折屏，以珍贵的「却砂木」芯材与品质上佳的锦缎制成，可见于海灯节期间的璃月。\n屏面的锦缎上刺有万物复苏，剪尾鸢和团雀遥相和鸣的景象。相传，此图景成画于冬去春来之时，寄托着作者希冀来年风调雨顺，平安吉祥的祝福。无论何时何地，美好的祝愿都是最好的礼物，而在佳节时分，这样的祝福则更能为节日的喜悦添彩。

If there are fewer than 2 opponents nearby, ATK is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>. ｜ 身边至少有2个敌人时，获得<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>攻击力提升与<color=#99FFFFFF>28%</color>防御力提升；身边的敌人少于2个时，获得<color=#99FFFFFF>42%</color>攻击力提升。

- When the Sun Is Out ｜ 阳光很好…
- "I'm a useless shelf," he thought sadly. "Bereft of those jewels and paintings, I am of no worth." ｜ 「我是一个无能的架子。」架子悲伤地想到：「没了那些珠宝和画作，我就没有价值。」
- When It Snows ｜ 下雪的时候…
- The scent of wine always lingers in the air in Mondstadt.\nIf one were to follow the scent to its source, one would invariably arrive at Diluc's Dawn Winery.\nA wooden plaque proudly announces the winery's name, and beneath it is written the winery's motto:\n"Shine True."\nMost interpret this to mean that the wines are brewed for consistency of taste, with time-honored techniques and that same healthy dose of sunny optimism that the dawn brings.\nMeanwhile, the more pragmatic Knights of Favonius are reminded of the long history of mutual support between the winery and the city.\nThe winery holds festivities from time to time. These events are routinely attended by enthusiastic fathers, eager to introduce their wonderful daughters to the young and single winery master.\nThis is all highly entertaining to the other guests, who watch on and comment, mockingly:\n"We'd much rather Master Diluc stays married to the winery, given how good this wine is!"\nDiluc deals impeccably with all situations, no matter who or what comes his way.\nDiluc is a fine young gentleman in every conceivable respect.\n ｜ 蒙德的空气里总是弥漫着酒香。\n如果追寻源头，香气会将你领到迪卢克老爷的「晨曦酒庄」。\n果木制成的牌匾骄傲地昭告着酒庄之名，下方还标有几个小字：\n「莫忘始终」。\n人们对这句格言的理解是，酒庄佳酿的美味始终如一，如同拂晓晨光般充满希望。\n更加务实的西风骑士们则会想到，许多年来酒庄与蒙德城互相帮扶的历史。\n庄园内偶尔举办酒会。衣香鬓影中，总有人为尚未完婚的贵公子引见自家热情的少女。\n结果往往是引来一片欢笑：\n「多亏迪卢克老爷以事业为妻，我们才能喝到这样的美酒啊！」\n无论来者为何，无论有何事务，他的应对永远滴水不漏。\n从各种意义而言，迪卢克老爷都是无可挑剔的杰出绅士。\n

- The wild winds converge, drawing in opponents within a certain radius for 6s and dealing Anemo DMG.\n45s CD. Has 2 initial usages. ｜ 积聚狂风，在6秒内牵引一定范围内的敌人，并对敌人造成风元素伤害。\n冷却时间：45秒，初始拥有2次可用次数。

- Unlike my work as a duelist, being a Game Master in Tabletop Troupe gives me the freedom to stay outside of the story itself. and observe people's reactions without getting personally involved in all the drama. I create and control the world in which they operate... Hmm? Like watching a caged animal caught on a hunt? That's an interesting angle... I'd never thought of it like that before. But I would never give the players a hard time — I just want them to enjoy the story. So it's quite different from hunting. ｜ 与代理决斗不同，「桌上剧团」主持人的身份，能够让我游离于故事之外，在不卷入人情冷暖的情况下观察人们的种种反应，为他们搭建出一个受我掌控的世界。嗯？你说听起来像看着笼子里的猎物？有道理…是我没有思考过的角度，不过我从来不会为难玩家，尽量都让他们开心地体验故事，这点和打猎还是很不一样的。
- You know that these crystals aren't easy to sell, don't you? ｜ 你知道晶矿不好卖吧？

- You wouldn't know anything about that, would you? ｜ 你们知道是怎么回事吗？

- Huh? Uh... This is pretty normal, really. I do go to work every day, after all. ｜ 啊？这个…一般开心吧，毕竟每天还要工作呢。
- "30,000 a minute? Even Freminet doesn't charge that much, and he's the best! What kind of scam are you running?" ｜ 「每分钟三万？最好的潜水员菲米尼都不至于这么贵！你是来诈骗的吧！」

- Even with their daughter so ill, they kicked you out? Stubborn as always... and prejudice isn't a disease I can cure, either. ｜ 即便自己女儿病情严重也要把你拒之门外吗？这帮顽固的家伙…人心里的成见，也是我治不好的一种病啊。

- Oh... Isn't she that... big boss lady who's surprisingly small... but still has infinitely deep pockets? Oof... she's a fierce haggler... Every time she comes to buy fruit from us, she manages to slash at least thirty to forty percent off the selling price, and that's on a good day! On the plus side, though, at least she buys huge amounts — multiple cartloads at a time. And she lets me pet her Shaggy Sumpter Beast. It's so fluffy, and such a big cutie... ｜ 那位个子小小，但是钱包深不见底的大老板吗？呜呜…她好会砍价…每次卖她水果，都要被砍掉三四成…甚至更多钱！幸好她买的量很夸张，会把整车整车的水果包下来，还会给我摸她的牦牦驮兽。好绒好绒，好乖好乖。

- A mysterious girl who calls herself "Prinzessin der Verurteilung" and travels with a night raven named Oz. ｜ 自称「断罪之皇女」，与名为奥兹的漆黑夜鸦同行的神秘少女。
- If you do a good enough job, I'll make the regular acting scenes into silhouette shots. There weren't even many lines to begin with... ｜ 如果你们的表现出彩，我就把文戏部分都改成剪影好了，台词本来也不多——
- Round and short pelvic fins, a plump body, and a plain face make up most people's first impression of the pufferfish. This is by and large an accurate assessment of its character as well: dull, slow, and lazy. However, few people know that this rather silly exterior hides a killer technique — this fish is capable of sucking water into its body before expelling it like a cannon from its mouth with such force and pinpoint accuracy that even fishermen might be stunned by it. Truly, it is a first-rate killer in the water.\n"Pufferfish ahead? Watch for spittle!" — Angler's Atlas, Pufferfish Chapter ｜ 圆润短小的腹鳍、肥硕敦厚的身躯和老实巴交的脑袋构成了人们对炮鲀的第一印象。这准确地反应了它的大部分个性——呆板、迟钝、缓慢。但少有人知的是，这样的傻瓜外表下却隐藏了一项绝杀秘技——将水流快速吸入身体，然后像炮弹一样从嘴里射出去，精准，强力，即使是渔夫挨上这么一下也免不了七晕八素，是一等一的水中杀手。\n「前有炮鲀出没，小心躲避口水。」——《野钓手册·炮鲀篇》

- My next commission was to observe the monsters around the Thousand Winds Temple, so I confirmed my tasking and left. ｜ 我接下的委托是监视千风神殿附近的魔物，确认好了之后，我就出发了。
- You want me to explain anyway? *sigh* There's an unspoken tradition in my tribe. Shaman masters deliberately foster rivalries between their students and a rival master. That way, if the students want to defeat that master without getting obliterated, they need to work hard to surpass the previous generation. Most of the shamans in the tribe belong to the school founded by my friend. They chose me as the evil witch to defeat, so what can I do? I'm not trying to make their lives difficult! It's not my fault none of them can put up a fight! *sigh* Anyway, the rumors about me being a terrifying old hag... That's how it all started. ｜ 你还是想听我解释吗？唉。「烟谜主」有一个秘而不宣的传统：为了敦促后辈进步，老师会故意算计徒弟，让他们和师叔们结下梁子。为了不挨长辈的揍，后辈就必须拼命努力反超长辈。如今「烟谜主」大半都是我朋友的谱系。他们所有人都喜欢找我来当这个坏人巫婆。怎么办呢？我根本没想为难后生，可这么多年没有一个人能赢过我！唉！于是关于我多恐怖、脾气多差的谣言就根深蒂固了。

- We met at... I forget, but it was either a theater or a tea house. Anyway, I was an adventurer, darting off all over the place, and she was a performer there... ｜ 我们是在…某个戏院还是茶馆？总之就是在那里认识的，我是一个四处磕磕碰碰的冒险家，而她则在那里唱戏…

- "Due to the continued incidents at the Chasm, however, Miss Ruoyu says she may still go investigate the situation personally." ｜ 但由于层岩巨渊情况仍有反复，若雨女士称不排除亲往调查的可能。
- Even though I didn't manage to get a good look at his face, his physique and the way he moved were identical to the Card Snatcher I saw last time. I'm sure it's the same guy. ｜ 虽然我没看清那人的面貌，但身形举止和我上次见到的「卡牌怪盗」十分相似，应该就是同一个人。
- About Charlotte ｜ 关于夏洛蒂…

- This means that the clockwork meka used by the public can't do too much heavy work, but maybe it's a good thing! ｜ 这就导致一般民众使用的发条机关不能承受太繁重的工作，这也算是件好事。

- The circlet of a sage who traversed a sea of fire. It once shone brightly from their ancient silhouette as they stood strong amidst the flames. ｜ 渡过火海的智者之冠，曾经映照着在热浪中挺立的古老身影。
- I'll go first. ｜ 我打头阵吧。

- Rather than alleviating each other's loneliness, we were enjoying the loneliness together, a solitude we both shared. ｜ 比起消解彼此的孤独，我们不如说是在共同享受孤独，享受相通的孤独。
- #Oh! Are you... {M#Young Master, are you the son of the Feiyun Commerce Guild's manager?}{F#Young Lady, are you the daughter of the Feiyun Commerce Guild's manager? Strange, all the rumors I heard spoke of a young master...} ｜ #哦哦…你…{M#小少爷是飞云商会的公子爷吗？}{F#小姐是飞云商会的小姐吗？奇了怪了，听过的都是公子爷的传闻才是…}
- Pipe down, everyone. We need to move on to the next scene! ｜ 大家静一静，我们要开始下一场了！
- On second thought, perhaps Caterpillar was right, and one only seeks the world's salvation to prove that they themselves deserve it. ｜ 不，或许卡特皮拉说的对吧。拯救世界，只是为了证明自己值得被拯救。

- #Night, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #晚安，{NICKNAME}。
- Talent Level-Up material.\nConflict is considered reason in the Nation of Pyro.\nConflicts can always be resolved by greater powers. This fact means that they can always be managed, as opposed to developing into something uncontrollable. Conflict is also a kind of limitation, preventing people from endless shirking of responsibilities without weighing the costs. It demands that participants settle their scores decisively and efficiently. ｜ 天赋培养素材。\n火之国土的事理是纷争。\n纷争永远能够被更高层面的力量介入并解决，而非不可收拾，这让一切都得以进入可控的境地。纷争亦是一种局限，禁止不计成本地推诿下去，而是要求参与方更干净利落地得出结果。
- <color=#FF5E41>Yet... At the last moment...</color> ｜ <color=#FF5E41>居然在最后的时刻…</color>
- The aquabus operator bears no responsibility whatsoever for any injury or loss incurred as a result of such accidents. ｜ 「巡轨船」运营方对此类意外事故与财务损伤概不负责。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- This is an emergency. Please be assured that the Knights of Favonius' first priority is to guarantee the safety of everyone in the city. ｜ 现在是紧急事态，请相信我们西风骑士会保障大家的安全。
- Guardian Pillar: Exalted Heroes ｜ 守护岩柱-「诸英杰」
- There's no way I can continue my research now... *sigh* And after all the money I spent on them, too... ｜ 呜…这我还怎么研究啊，那可是我花了好多钱买的…
- Not for now, at least. You should be familiar with these words, yes? "The area ahead of us" and such? ｜ 至少现在完全没必要。白飘飘应该很熟悉这句话吧？「前面的区域」…

- So, this guy was a famous perfumer in Fontaine... But then, he came to Sumeru to... teach people from Fontaine? Sounds confusing... ｜ 在枫丹活动的调香师…来须弥又当了枫丹人的老师？好复杂…

- It's gone... Let's ask Julien about this later. For now, though... Paimon wonders what's under this sand pile. Should we take a look? ｜ 它跑掉了…我们待会儿问问于连吧。不过现在…不知道这个沙堆下埋了什么，我们检查看看？
- So next I need to train my voice? ｜ 我接下来也要练嗓吗？
- What Paimon meant is... Shouldn't we, y'know, wake him up and ask him what he's doing here...? ｜ 我是说，我们是不是应该让他清醒过来，问问他在这里干什么…
- They can. Several strict conditions must be met, but if they couldn't be forged at all, then the number of them in circulation would have long dwindled to zero. ｜ 嗯，条件比较苛刻，但如果完全不能造，那流传的「古名」注定会越来越少。
- Mix up all the good ingredients, and you shall end up with a dish most dubious. This happens distressingly often, does it not? ｜ 把所有好的食材混在一起，最后反而做出了黑暗料理，这种事也是常有的吧？
- Joining Party: III ｜ 加入队伍·其三
- Definitely. ｜ 确实。
- It's no big deal. More importantly — is there a reason why you were looking for a Knight of Favonius? May I be of any assistance? ｜ 没关系的。话说回来，沙寅先生找西风骑士，是有什么事吗？我能帮上什么忙吗？
- #{M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME} and Ms. Paimon! Are you guys here to talk to Mr. Leroy? ｜ #{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，还有派蒙姐姐，你们是来找勒鲁瓦先生的吗？
- Gretchen ｜ 格蕾欣
- We'll find out when the people we sent earlier come back! ｜ 等我们派去的同胞们回来，就全都知道啦！
- I have to say, my daily life is not without its inconveniences. For instance, I often find myself stepping on my robes as I sit down, or squashing my coiffure against the chair. And if I lean my head too far back, sometimes my hair even gets caught in the ornamentation. Nevertheless, I must wear these garments to maintain the dignity of a Chief Justice, and endure whatever inconveniences this entails. Incidentally, the world at large appears to operate on this general principle, too. Everyone is faced with an identity that they must accept, endure, understand, and eventually learn to co-exist with. This has been my experience all along. ｜ 不得不说，我时常遇到一些令人无奈的事，例如坐下的时候踩到衣摆，偶尔压到头发，往后靠头部也可能被座椅装饰品卡住。为了维持最高审判官的威严，我保持这类装束，自然要忍受它带来的麻烦。世间几乎也遵循着如此的道理——接受一种身份，忍耐它，理解它，与它共存。这正是我一直在做的。
- Broken Isle ｜ 破破岛
- Recipe: Volcano Cake ｜ 食谱：火山蛋糕
- Yes, good idea. Ah, you've just reminded me... Two calligraphers from Liyue arrived today. We have worked with them before, so I'll go and ask them to help out, too. ｜ 那样最好。对，你这倒是提醒了我，今天有两位从璃月来的书法家，都和我们有过合作，我们也去拜托一下他们。
- If they weren't artificially restricted, some models would be even more powerful than old Gardemeks! ｜ 最近有些型号的性能，在不额外进行限制的情况下，甚至能够超过比较老旧的警卫机关呢！
- The Bell ｜ 钟剑
- Viparyas ｜ 毗波耶
- There's a sakura tree in Hanamizaka where I go to feed them. Let's meet there in a short while. ｜ 平时我投喂它们的地方，在花见坂附近的一棵神樱树下。等等我们在那里集合吧。
- Isn't the "power of water" just the power of water? ｜ 哥哥，「水之力」难道不就是水的力量吗？
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Do I have to spell it out for you, Morris? Everything that took place just now was staged to get you to confess the truth. ｜ 还没明白吗？莫里斯。刚才发生的一切，都是为了让你在镜头前招供而演的一出戏啊。
- We can certainly check the various ports for that information. It's possible, however, that Pierre's associate also used a small boat for the transport and docked along the shore rather than at a large port. If that's the case... It's unlikely there would be any record left behind. ｜ 可以去各个港口看看。不过万一对方也和皮埃尔一样用了小船，在浅滩登陆的话…留下记录的可能性不高。
- Check potion requirements... ｜ 查看药剂需求。
- Have you been eavesdropping on my conversations with Kazuha? ｜ 你偷听我和万叶说话了？
- A hut that may be found in Aaru Village. It has a rather unique shape and features a shed on either wing.\nDesert huts are not often built to block out the rain, but rather to provide people with shade. Even the desert folk, who are accustomed to the blazing sun, can be rendered dizzy and faint by its heat, never mind visitors from abroad. Putting a roof over workspaces is a formula for much decreased woe, even if many trivial things should happen during that time. ｜ 可见于阿如村的棚屋，形状特殊，两翼还有较小的侧棚。\n沙漠中的棚屋大多不是为了避雨而建的，而是要给人们提供荫蔽。即便是习惯了烈日的沙漠子民，一直在阳光直射下劳动，也有可能头昏眼花，更不必说外地前来的客人了。将工作的地点用棚屋遮蔽后，无论劳动过程中遭遇了多少琐碎小事，都无需担忧。
- Why is Miss Aratani acting so weird too? Has Souka passed her weirdness on to her...? ｜ 怎么荒谷小姐也开始神神叨叨了，是左右加小姐的气质感染了她吗…

- Yes, yes, I know. The name "troubleshooter" is simply too gauche and unbecoming of the standards of a publication such as ours. ｜ 啊，我知道我知道，「烦恼杀手」这个词的格调不高，不符合我们报纸一贯的品味。
- Yeah! Three seals... It feels like we have so much to do! Let's get moving! ｜ 嗯！三重封印什么的，感觉接下来还有很多事情要做呢！要打起精神才行！
- (Gain the initiative? Steer the conversation? No! No! None of these seem correct. Maybe... We should go back to the universal formula...) ｜ （「先声夺人」？「话题引导」？不对不对好像都不对。要不然…还是万能公式吧…）
- Our kind expresses love by merging water bodies together. This way, many minds can coexist without division. ｜ 我们族群表达喜爱的方式，是把双方的水体融汇在一起。这样多个意识就可以无隔阂的相处。
- Dangerous whirlpools can appear near monster encampments. Waveriders that are sucked into these whirlpools will take continuous damage... ｜ 魔物的海上营地附近，可能会出现危险的漩涡，一旦「浪船」被吸引至漩涡中心，就将持续承受伤害…
- Oh, come on. Don't tell me you don't get it? ｜ 脑筋，脑筋！那么难转过来吗？
- Finding suitable parts would be like trying to find a single gear in the vast desert, to say nothing of the difficulty in making those parts from scratch. ｜ 想找到可以替换的部件，就像在沙漠里找一个齿轮。从零制造，更不现实。
- That's right. Chauvigne is presently a flower in a pot. ｜ 是的，肖维涅现在是一株住在盆里的花。
- ... ｜ ……
- ...Hah. What am I saying? I'm in no position to criticize you for this. ｜ …哈，我又有什么资格说你呢？
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- to turn off the device ｜ 关闭装置
- Hehe... the captain seems to have high hopes for this tournament. I have not seen her so excited in quite some time. ｜ 呵呵，大姐头对这场比赛的期待颇高，我很久没见她如此兴奋了。
- Hello, are you... a Vanara? ｜ 你好，请问…你也是林行者吗？
- I mean, "Pretty Please, Kitsune Guuji?" is the tale of a loser Shogun and the Kitsune Guuji who can do it all. ｜ 毕竟《拜托了我的狐仙宫司》就是讲述废柴将军大人和万能狐仙宫司的故事。
- She's right. Hey, Lavender Melon, you okay? Want me to carry you? ｜ 也是，走吧走吧。喂堇瓜，没事吧？要不要本大爷背你啊？
- You were talking about a key... ｜ 关于钥匙…
- You've got this, Traveler! ｜ 加油，师父！
- Look for "that person" ｜ 找到「那个人」
- Hmm, hold on. There's a note over there at the side. It might just hold some clues! ｜ 欸，等等，旁边还有一张纸条呢，上面说不定会有什么线索。
- Relax. We're not bad guys. Your friend sent us! ｜ 放心吧，我们不是坏人。是你的同伴让我们来的哦！

- At Beidou's invitation, you take part in the "Spear of the Crux" sailor training. Time to get a taste of the side of sailor life that few know about... ｜ 在北斗的邀请下，你参加了「南十字之矛」的船员培训，就用这种方式，稍微领略一下船队不为人知的另一面吧…
- Gloom ｜ 阴沉

- Anzai. Yes, that's me. ｜ 没错，我就是安西。

- Really? I would love that! ｜ 可以吗？太好了！

- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- Maybe even the most powerful treasure in all of Mondstadt! ｜ 说不好，还是全蒙德最厉害的宝物！
- Faruzan ｜ 珐露珊
- I—is there something you n—need today? I h—heard you went to Gurabad... I—it is a shame that the J—Jinni can no longer speak. ｜ 请问您今天有、有什么事吗…听说您去、去了居尔城…镇灵再、再也没法说话，那还挺、挺可惜的。
- Certain occasional events arranged by the Speaker's Chamber to make the Trial's battles more lifelike, by simulating how unpredictable a real battlefield can be. ｜ 由「话事处」安排的某些偶发事件，其目的是为了增加演武的真实性，毕竟战场上的风云突变总是难以预料。
- We were also really worried, so we asked around! The kids said that they were in the woods, and the next thing they knew, they were in Vimara Village. They couldn't remember anything that had happened before that. ｜ 我们也很担心，所以打听了一下！孩子们说，开始是在林子里，然后回过神来，就已经在维摩庄了，根本不记得发生了什么事。
- Ooh, that's a good metaphor. That'll come in handy when I'm explaining my ideation process later... ｜ 不错的比喻！我记下来，回头就这么给大家讲解我的设计思路…
- Alright then. Let's head for the next floating Shadow Pin. I want to fix this issue and start writing by nightfall! ｜ 好了，我们到下一根浮起的「小缝影针」那边去吧，快些解决问题，我今晚就能开始动笔啦！
- Jumpy Dumpty DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 蹦蹦炸弹伤害|{param1:P}
- Okay, someone from Liyue definitely wrote this one. ｜ 这一看就是璃月诗人写的。
- Stormterror? One moment, let me try to recall the Knights of Favonius Handbook... ｜ 龙灾？请稍等，让我回想一下《骑士团指导手册》…
- If you head toward the western desert from Caravan Ribat, you should pass by Aaru Village if you don't stray too far from the path. ｜ 从喀万驿出发往西边的沙漠走，只要不过于另辟蹊径，应该会路过阿如村的。
- Wishes Left Today: {0} ｜ 今日剩余总次数：{0}

- But the main character of my novel will be strung up by their hands by the villagers and left in the wild for a whole night, awaiting the Xuanwen beast's judgment. ｜ 但我小说里的主角，要在这里被村民们吊起双手，待在野外一整晚，等待着「玄文兽」的审判。
- She told Ashvattha that there were many smart, beautiful, yet lonely Nara in the woods and that the children of the forest must increase so that they might become friends with the Nara. ｜ 她对觉王树说，在森林有好多那菈，他们很聪明、很美丽，但又很孤独。所以，要增加森林的子民，与他们成为朋友。

- The seal is lifted here! ｜ 这里的封印解除了！
- He is a graceful gentleman. ｜ 他是个优雅的绅士。
- Defeat the monsters that have been awakened ｜ 击败醒来的怪物
- Of course. Step this way, and stay safe. We wish you an enjoyable trip. ｜ 好的，请往前走，注意安全，祝您旅途愉快。

- Is this how it feels to be freeloaders? Wait a second, we did do plenty of work, after all... ｜ 这就是不劳而获的感觉吗？噢不对，我们也做了很多事的呢…
- ...Isn't that a bit unfair? ｜ …是不是有些不公平？
- "The Visible Winds" ｜ 「看得见的风」
- Don't say that. You know I don't have your strength. ｜ 别说这种无情的话嘛，我可没有你这种实力。

- I suppose you're short one judge, then. ｜ 你们一定缺一个裁判。
- Huai'an! Yanxiao! ｜ 嘿，掌柜的！还有言笑！

- The Feline Firm (II) ｜ 猫咪事务所· 卷二
- Uh... Oh, you're just looking for... for me? ｜ 那…难道是来找我的？
- Four! You can have four! But come on, that's as far as I can go! ｜ 四个！四个！这可是底线了！
- Yup, we actually grew up together. I even taught her fishing songs. ｜ 是啊，其实我和她是一起长大的，我还教过她唱渔歌呢。
- What is a creature like that doing out here in such a calm place? ｜ 那种生物…本来不会在只有微风的平原上出现的呀！
- Head to Heyu Tea House ｜ 前往和裕茶馆
- Don't worry. I've asked around at the Outlander Affairs Agency before. As it turns out, it might be easier to get a permit if you apply under me, since I'm a businessman here in Inazuma. ｜ 放心吧。我已经去远国监司问过许可的事了，有我这个在稻妻做生意的人做保，办许可应该会容易不少。
- But then again, I wonder... Is the appearance of a species like this a result of the hot spring, or is it the Tyrant's presence that caused the springs to boil? ｜ 不过话说回来，究竟是因为有了热泉才演化出了这样的物种，还是帝皇的存在让泉水也为之沸腾呢？
- Ugh, this game is far too complicated. ｜ …这卡牌游戏也太复杂了吧。
- Complete the quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom" ｜ 完成[巨龙与自由之歌]任务
- Stop wasting time. The Boss ain't gonna wait all day. ｜ 别再浪费时间了，老大耐心有限。
- Autumn, time for us to leave. ｜ 秋，我们离开吧。
- Huh, there's a pavilion here on this mountain! ｜ 山上居然有个亭子！
- Oh, it's you. Why are you still wandering on the upper levels of The Chasm? ｜ 哦，是你们啊，你们怎么还在层岩巨渊上层逗留…
- Sorry to make you worry, everyone! I'll head back and help once I'm done learning this dance. ｜ 抱歉让大家担心了，等我学会这支舞，就回去给大家帮忙。
- That's what I believe. I will persist no matter what... and I'll do my best not to be a burden to you. ｜ 这是我的信念，我会坚持下去。而且…我会尽可能不拖累你们的。
- Illuminationism ｜ 梨多梵谛学院
- *sigh* It can't be helped. If you were clever enough to realize those problems, then you would've been aware that the Hive changed when Ilyas returned to this collective consciousness of yours. ｜ 不过这也没办法。假如你敏锐到能发现那些问题，也就应该能意识到，伊利亚斯回归集群意识时，你的蜂巢已经产生了某种变化。

- Next, Oceanid, you touch the sword. ｜ 接下来，纯水精灵，你去触碰剑。
- I refused his request in the end, because I didn't want the flowers to be trampled... Man, what a weird person... ｜ 但我才不想让他踩坏那些花呢，就拒绝了他，真是个奇怪的人…
- Well... We haven't found Shibasuke yet... ｜ 这个嘛…其实还没找到…
- Ahem... you guys... It's certainly not good taste for you two to be teasing me like that. ｜ 嗯咳…真是的，你们两个就不要趁机揶揄我了。
- She's really freaking out! What's going on? ｜ 它真的好着急，到底怎么了…
- Don't have energy... ｜ 能量不足…
- Look for the source of the voice ｜ 查找话语声音的来源
- You can start your investigation from them. ｜ 你可以从他们那里开始调查。
- The Mystery of the Girl in Red's Treasure ｜ 「红衣女孩宝物」之谜

- Cooking it into a delicious dish for Nara Varuna is the final goal of my cooking training. ｜ 能把它做成美味的菜肴，让那菈法留纳品尝，是「烹饪修行」的最终目标。

- So, what's our plan? ｜ 你打算怎么做？
- Beautiful memories are the only eternity in this world. There are no others. ｜ 世界上的永恒，就是美好的回忆。除此无他。
- That's okay. You should be able to find lots of ingredients when <color=#00E1FFFF>exploring the wilderness</color>. Don't forget to look carefully. ｜ 没关系哦，<color=#00E1FFFF>野外探险</color>时可以搜集到很多食材，你们也可以多多留意。

- Will these flowers do? ｜ 这些花足够吗？
- Huh? What's this got to do with me? ｜ 啊？还有我的事？

- Deep Gallery's Echoing Song ｜ 深廊的回奏之歌
- I never knew you had such a talent. ｜ 没想到你还有这方面的才能。
- But I do remember that we found him near Mt. Xuanlian. He was still clutching a bottle of water. ｜ 不过老头子记得，他出事的时候，大家是在悬练山附近发现他的，那时候他手里还攥着一瓶水。
- My outlander friend, have you ever experienced this before? Feeling like your whole world has become brighter after meeting someone? ｜ 这位异乡的朋友，你有没有过这样的经历，当你遇见了一个人之后，便感觉整个世界都被点亮？
- A reward on the road. ｜ 旅途中的收获。
- I'll tell you more about the old times next time we meet. ｜ 下次有机会，我可以再给你讲一讲往事。
- Although I'm not nearly as learned as Master Sucrose or Master Timaeus, and so far behind Captain Albedo I can't even see his shadow on a winter's morn, I do have my own expertise and have designed many explosives for engineering use! ｜ 虽然我不如砂糖老师和蒂玛乌斯老师那么博学，更是远远望不到阿贝多队长的背影，但我术业有专攻，设计过许多工程用炸药！

- This is a prayer I used to hurl my ego into the sacrificial depths. It comes from an ancient tragedy, though I do not know how it survived until our time. ｜ 这是让自身沉入舍弃自我深渊的祷词，出自一出悲剧。不知经过何人之手流传此世。
- Let's go — remember to tread lightly. ｜ 我们过去吧，步子落得轻一些。
- Earrings made from amber gold that shines with a strange light. ｜ 琥珀金打造的耳饰，其上镶嵌着宝石，闪烁着奇妙的光芒。

- I—I've never seen a wolf in my life before today, it was terrifying... ｜ 这，这还是我第一次见到狼，真是太吓人了…
- Every time <color=#FFD780FF>Icetide Vortex</color>'s Grimheart stacks are consumed, Eula's Physical DMG is increased by 30% for 6s.\nEach stack consumed will increase the duration of this effect by 6s up to a maximum of 18s. ｜ 消耗<color=#FFD780FF>冰潮的涡旋</color>的冷酷之心效果后，优菈的物理伤害加成提高30%，持续6秒，\n每消耗一层冷酷之心，都会使这个效果的持续时间延长6秒，最多不会超过18秒。

- Entirely so, I fear. ｜ 他就没打仗。

- Why are our legal systems and court processes the way they are? ｜ 枫丹的法律体系和庭审流程，为什么是这样的？
- When making a purchase, look to haggle.\nThis is a common understanding among the people of Liyue. No matter what high heavens the store owner praises their product to, no matter its ancient history or classical value, prices are always flexible. Half the stated cost is a good place to start.\nBut when Zhongli pays up (or rather, calls for someone else to pay up on his behalf), he never looks at the price tag. As long as it catches his eye, Zhongli will pay as much as the owner asks. Indeed, he will even buy it at a premium sometimes.\nBut for some reason, Zhongli always forgets to bring money.\nFor small purchases, he has friends to help him out, and large bills he somehow finds ways to have written off.\nTo those merchants who secretly pride themselves on their powers of flattery, Zhongli is a man of strange proclivities: in truth, he knows a great deal about the value of money and finance, and he also understands the suffering of the people. However, he seems to not understand that poverty is part of the human condition.\nOr perhaps it might be said that he cannot imagine himself being poor.\nHow has such a person not died of hunger yet? ｜ 买东西是要砍价的。\n这是璃月人的共识，无论老板把手里的商品吹得如何天花乱坠，是上引经典还是下据史料，价总是不能不砍的，一般以见面砍一半为宜。\n但钟离付账（或者说喊人付账）时，从来不看价格。只要是他看上眼的东西，老板喊多少，他就付多少，偶尔还会报出更高价格，一口拿下。\n然而不知为何，钟离总是忘记带钱。\n小钱有朋友帮他垫付，大钱则会想办法找借口报销。\n在口中奉承、心中暗爽的商人们看来，钟离似乎有一种奇怪的特质：他分明懂得金钱的价值与金融的意义，也很明白人间疾苦，却似乎不能理解「穷」也是一种可能出现在自己生活中的境况。\n换句话说，他只是根本不能想象一个没有钱的自己。\n真是绝了，这种人怎么还没饿死。
- Anyway, the qualifying rounds are about to begin. I'll leave you to your preparation. ｜ 总之，预选赛即将开始，你可以先去做一些准备，商量一些对策。

- This is the day of your birth, and as is tradition, this calls for a bowl of longevity noodles. I got Xiangling to teach me how to make it, and I managed to put all the noodles in the water without breaking a single one! I also put a big plump egg in there, hee-hee! Come on, let's go, you've got to eat it before it goes cold. Wishing you a happy, healthy birthday and a long and prosperous life. ｜ 今日是你的生辰，按照习俗，这样的日子要来一碗长寿面，我找师姐学了一手，一整条面都没有断哦！还打了个很圆很圆的鸡蛋进去，嘿嘿。快跟我来吧，要趁热吃才好。新的一岁，愿你身体健健康康，生活圆圆满满。

- A pair of siblings have inherited the Kamisato Clan, one of the three most respected and prestigious clans in Inazuma City.\nThe elder brother, Ayato, is the head of the clan and is in charge of government affairs. While his younger sister, Ayaka, known by all as the Princess, takes care of the clan's internal and external affairs.\nAyaka often appears at social occasions and has more interactions with the common folk. As such, she is better known by the people and has gained a higher reputation than her elder brother. This has earned her the elegant title of Shirasagi Himegimi.\nAs is known to all, Ayaka, the daughter of the Kamisato family, is a figure greatly admired by the people for her beauty, dignified demeanor, and noble character. ｜ 继承稻妻城中至为尊崇的三家名门之一——神里家族的，是一对兄妹。\n哥哥绫人出任「家主」一职，掌管政务，妹妹绫华贵为「公主」，平日主理家族内外事宜。\n绫华常出现在社交场合，与民间交集也较多。因此，更被人们所熟悉的她反而获得了高于兄长的名望，被雅称为「白鹭公主」。\n众所周知，神里家的女儿绫华小姐容姿端丽、品行高洁，是深受民众钦慕的人物。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nGotta try... to do battle like the greatest champion luchadors do! Varesa launches up to 3 strikes, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to headbutt opponents in front, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> and using the momentum to leap into the air.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color> upon impact. If Varesa is in a combat state upon landing, or if the shockwave from her plunging attack hits an opponent, she will gain 25 Nightsoul points. She enters the Fiery Passion state upon reaching maximum Nightsoul points through this method.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Fiery Passion</color>\nIn this state, Varesa's Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks will gain corresponding buffs:\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nFight like a superstar champion luchador! Launches up to 3 fierce strikes, dealing greater <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to slam into her opponents, dealing greater amounts of Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> and using the momentum to leap into the air.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nConsumes all her Nightsoul points and slams down on the ground from mid-air, dealing DMG to opponents in her path and dealing greater amounts of Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color> upon hitting the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n要…要努力像厉害的摔角冠军那样战斗！进行至多三段的搏击，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，以头槌向前撞击敌人，造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>，并借势腾跃而起。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>；若此时瓦雷莎处于战斗状态，或本次坠地冲击命中了敌人，则瓦雷莎获得25点夜魂值；通过这种方式使夜魂值达到上限时，瓦雷莎将进入「炽热激情」状态。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>炽热激情</color>\n在这种状态下，瓦雷莎的普通攻击、重击和下落攻击将得到对应的强化：\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n如同明星摔角冠军那样无畏战斗！进行至多三段的猛烈搏击，造成伤害更高的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，猛烈前冲撞击敌人，造成伤害更高的、具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>，并借势腾跃而起。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n消耗全部夜魂值，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成伤害更高的、具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>。

- As Nahida closes her eyes, many voices enter her consciousness: Some are young, some are old, some are angry, and some are helpless... - A small stage designed specifically for impromptu performances during gatherings and parties. It was made using high-quality Cypress Wood and adorned with cute decorations, and can promote a relaxed and enjoyable atmosphere.\nFontainian parties often involve lively performances, and this lightweight, compact, and easy-to-set-up stage has been designed to meet such demands. Therefore, this stage, along with the decorations on it and the other signs of use, has witnessed countless moments of Fontainian joy. ｜ 专为聚会派对时的即兴表演所设计的小型舞台，使用了品质上佳的「香柏木」，饰以小巧可爱的装潢，足以烘托出轻松愉快的氛围。\n枫丹人的派对往往少不了热闹的表演，这种轻便、占地面积小且易于搭建的舞台正是在这样的需求下催生的。也正因此，这款舞台与其上的摆饰和使用痕迹一道，见证了无数属于枫丹人的欢乐时光。

- Hmph, it's only a few monsters. Stand back and watch. We'll be all like "pew-pew" and they'll be gone in no time! ｜ 哼，不就是魔物吗，看我们「咻咻—」一下就把它们处理掉。基莫西说得对，由我们出手，肯定更省「时间」！

- An aftershadow that should not exist wanders the House of the Hearth's halls.\nShe flits between the shadows the light does not touch, bringing goodwill but also hastening ill deeds.\nIf any ask about her past, she will speak of that buried history.\n...But more than that, she wants to know her own ending. ｜ 不应存在的残影游荡在壁炉之家。\n她穿梭在火光照不到的地方，带来善意，也催生恶行。\n若有人问起她的过去，她会讲述那段被掩埋的历史。\n…但她更想知道自己的结局。
- ...Wait, but this is a fight, not a performance... right? ｜ 但我们要去的地方不是舞台吧？

- "Even if my body and all memories of me were to disappear, I'll continue to live on as long as the roses remain. Too bad I didn't have the time or opportunity to ask the villagers to grow these roses on a large scale." ｜ 「哪怕我的肉体，一切关于我的记忆都消失了，但她们依然活着，我的生命就不算结束。可惜我没有时间，也没有机会去向村民们呼吁，请他们大规模种植这种蔷薇。」
- Well, let's not talk about such things now. On to our final process. ｜ 不说这些了，开始最后的工序吧。

- Hey! Mouthy as always, huh!? ｜ 喂——！你这家伙，会不会说话呀！
- There's been a situation. We're still waiting on the delivery of a whole batch of ceremonial items. I'm beginning to worry that they've been stolen... ｜ 有件事要向您汇报，我们有一批祭祀用具迟迟没有送到，我担心是被劫走了…
- An ancient golden cup that is both marvelously and luxuriously wrought. Murmurings can be heard within its empty innards. ｜ 一尊古老的金杯，形制奇妙华丽，空空如也的腹内回响着呢喃之声。
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- How have things gone? Do you have any news? ｜ 怎么样，带来什么消息没有？
- I've heard people say she thinks a "blessing from the stars" is the reason why all of her outstanding schoolwork gets magically finished while she's asleep. Ah, she has absolutely no idea. ...Oh, but seriously, don't tell her, okay? ｜ 我听别人提过，她好像以为所有写不完的课业总能在一场梦之后自动完成，都是「星空的赐福」。她呀，完全搞错了哦。…不过，你可别告诉她哦。
- Let me think... ｜ 我想想…
- How should Paimon put it... Let's come back later. This seems to be an important place. ｜ 该怎么说呢…之后再回来看看吧！说不定是很重要的地方呢！
- But I've heard that Dragonspine's a very dangerous place, and I couldn't find any adventurers willing to help me on such short notice... ｜ 但我听说雪山上很危险，一时半会也找不到愿意帮我的冒险家…

- ...Yeah, take it as a compliment. ｜ 我觉得是，你就当表扬收下吧。

- But let us get back to business, shall we? Things right now in the Institute are... rather complicated. The matters you'll be dealing with are also urgent, so I won't keep you for much longer. ｜ 让我们继续说正事吧。因为现在院内情况…有些复杂。需要您处理的事务也比较紧急，我就不耽误您的时间了。

- Last but not least: Get 'em some good grub! The way to a Saurian's heart is through the stomach, after all! What do you think? Solid plan, huh? ｜ 最后，也是最重要的！好吃的！只要你跟龙分享好吃的，你们就是好朋友啦！怎么样，我厉害吧！

- Lollipops are pretty much the best things ever. The candy tastes awesome, but also, it looks really cool just having a stick hanging out of your mouth. It gives me, like... a real punk kind of vibe. Here, you try it! ｜ 棒棒糖全身都是宝，不但糖好吃，棍子叼在嘴里还很帅，为我增添了一丝不羁的气质，来，你也试试吧。

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>Revelry</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>狂欢值</color>
- Legends say that this kind of stone used to only appear in arid regions such as the deserts of Sumeru, but it can now easily be found all over Liyue.\nConsidering nobody would have manually transported it to Liyue from so far away, some otherwise-serious scholars came up with the rather audacious theory of "ley line shift," simply for everyone's amusement. The theory was inspired by the situation with Chasm's Doorstep. ｜ 传说这种石块原本只出现在缺水的地区，譬如须弥的沙漠，但在璃月各地都能找到相应的岩石。\n鉴于没人会从千里迢迢之外将岩石搬运而来，只为戏弄民众取乐，一些较真的学者结合临渊石的现象，提出了「地脉迁移」的大胆假设。
- Let's go get a breath of fresh air. ｜ 去清醒一下吧。
- In Natlan, we believe a person's birthday decides their fate. Sharing a birthday with a great hero means being blessed with their protection and inheriting their character.\nI'm not sure the people out there who share your birthday know how lucky they are... Happy Birthday. ｜ 在纳塔，有种说法是，一个人的出生日期决定了他的命运。如果他的生日和某位大英雄是同一天，那他就会得到这位英雄的庇佑，拥有和他一样的品质。\n我想，和你共享生日的人一定很幸运。生日快乐。

- The trouble caused by the Statues of Her Excellency, the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, God of Thunder has come to an end. ｜ 「御建鸣神主尊大御所大人像」引起的风波，逐渐走向尾声。

- ...Let me handle this alone. ｜ …还是让我自己去吧。

- But, Paimon thought guides from the People of the Springs could understand Koholasaurs. ｜ 哎？我还以为你们「流泉之众」的向导都能听懂鳍游龙的语言呢。
- We don't speak all that much, but we do go quite a way back. I've always admired her for taking on so many responsibilities at such a young age. ｜ 我跟她聊天不多，但也算是认识挺久了，一直很钦佩她年纪轻轻就肩负起了那么多责任。
- #{NICKNAME}. ｜ #{NICKNAME}。
- Rana is amazing, and I want to be just like her when I grow up, a Forest Watcher who adventures in the forest! ｜ 拉娜姐姐可厉害了，我以后，也想跟拉娜姐姐一样，成为巡林官，在森林里到处冒险！

- Fishmonger? Are you trying to suss me out or something? No need, let me tell you how it is, plain and simple. ｜ 鱼？如果你是想试探我的话，那大可不必，让我们打开天窗说亮话吧——

- An "experimental drink" created by Heinry. A "sweet bubbly tea" bursting with bubbles. It tastes... not all that bad? ｜ 安里制造出来的「实验饮品」。富有很多气泡的「甜味气泡茶」。喝起来…感觉还不错？
- Wonderful! By the way, we're actually running a special Lantern Rite promotion. Buy three boxes, get ten percent off. Four boxes will net you twenty percent off... ｜ 好咧，这位客人。小店正在搞海灯节促销，三盒九折，四盒八折…

I just find the bones in the wild! ｜ 每个布偶里都有小动物的骨头，仔细想想确实也有点瘆人吧。用这样的秘术，被其他人所恐惧，可能有十分之一的责任确实在我。但是这都是我游历野外时收捡的，我可没有伤害小动物！你可不能误会我！

- After you have mastered these, I will impart more of the secret wonders hidden deep within this world. ｜ 等你学成之后，我就把更多蕴藏在世界深处的奥秘分享给你吧。

- Have you ever had that feeling, when you don't need to think about anything but defeating monsters? It's amazing. ｜ 那种除了打倒魔物之外，什么也不用想的全身心投入感，你有体会过吗？那可是很爽快的喔。

- Let me see... Hmm, looks like she's basically gathered all the information she needs. It won't take long to wrap this up. ｜ 让我看看…其实她已经把信息都收集得差不多了，我帮她完成最后的收尾工作吧。

There is a thin layer of dust over this object due to a long period of disuse. ｜ 某个设定中被灌注了神奇力量的法杖。能与未来星的存在共鸣，从而指引出未来星的方位。\n当然，在其他的设定中，它也可能是一个名叫教令院的组织的库藏物品，而它登记在册的名字是「阿叶夏混沌勘探器」。因为长期无人使用而落上了薄薄一层灰。

- Anyway, Paimon is sure your brother wouldn't want to see you in danger, Blanche. So, just wait here for our return, alright? ｜ 总之，布兰奇，你哥哥肯定也不希望你遇到危险，所以你就好好等着我们回来，知道吗？

- Normal Attack DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>32%</color> and Elemental Skill DMG is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>48%</color>. After a nearby active character deals Geo DMG, the aforementioned effects increase by 100% for 15s. Additionally, the wielder's DEF is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. ｜ 普通攻击造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>32%</color>，元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>48%</color>；队伍中附近的角色在场上造成岩元素伤害后，上述效果进一步提升100%，持续15秒。此外，装备者的防御力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。

- Ah, yes! We did promote some "Tidalga" perfume previously. It has a unique algae scent. I do recall Ms. Linorea taking quite the interest in it. ｜ 哦对了！我之前还推出了一款「汐藻」，这种香水有着独特的水藻香气，莉诺蕾娅小姐也很感兴趣呢。
- Absolutely. ｜ 当然没问题。
- To keep Xingqiu from spending his whole day at Wanwen Bookhouse in Feiyun Slope, his father agreed to let him learn martial arts from the Guhua Clan. Much to his dismay, Xingqiu quickly discovered that Guhua was a dying art that had been in constant decline for years. There was no proper tuition and it turned out the luxury dojo he had signed up in didn't even belong to the clan — they had just rented it temporarily to keep up appearances.\nXingqiu's father was, of course, fully aware of this state of affairs in advance. To him, the whole thing was just for fun. He thought Xingqiu would be content to learn a spot of bladework for show, not for serious self-defense.\nHe hadn't counted on the prodigiously intelligent and extremely well-read Xingqiu being as outstanding a talent in Guhua as he was in every other discipline he had turned his hand to. A combination of his own intuition and extensive knowledge of ancient literature meant he was able to completely revitalize the dead art.\nXingqiu was disappointed by Guhua's martial arts program at the beginning, but he found the other tricks they taught to be exactly what he had hoped for.\nQuicklime, smoking sand, paper fish, sword-swallowing, fire-breathing... Xingqiu was spoilt for choice.\nHe decided on the spot that he would learn them all, no matter how long it would take him. He reasoned that they would be useful to have in his repertoire during his future exploits as a chivalrous hero. ｜ 为了不让行秋成日泡在绯云坡的书店「万文集舍」里，老爹允许他前往「古华派」学武。不过，行秋很快发现，「古华派」只是没落已久的小门派，压根给不出像样的教导，就连报名用的豪华道场也是临时租借而来，根本不归门派所有。\n老爹当然也知道这一点。他只是想让行秋学一些华而不实的剑术，聊以娱乐。\n出乎意料的是，博闻强识、通读古书的行秋已经达到一法通万法通的境界。他在「古华派」修习，凭借自身知识辅以古籍记载，彻底振兴了衰退已久的古华武术。\n初入门的行秋曾对古华派武术感到失望。然而，门人善使的「小术」完全符合他的渴望。\n灰粉、烟雾砂、纸鱼游水、吞剑吐火…生在商贾之家，行秋就是喜欢这种琳琅满目的选择感。\n当即决定花上十天半月，将古华派一百门江湖奇术学全。行秋认为，这对行侠仗义而言，也是种极有力的补充。

- A tea pastry containing egg yolk. The loose and delicate texture of the grainy egg yolk mingles with a faint fragrance of tea. One small mouthful brings earthy happiness enough to make you swoon. You could pop several in your mouth at once, and woe betide any who should seek to steal a single crumb from the corner of your lips. ｜ 内藏蛋黄的茶酥。沙沙的蛋黄带着松散细腻的口感，夹杂着自空谷而来的幽幽茶香，仅仅一小口，就带来了扎扎实实的幸福感，足以让人沦陷。一口气能连吃好几个，最后连粘在嘴角的酥皮都不想放过。

- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Yelan spends much of her time patrolling and roaming The Chasm, where she often stares into the darkness deep below.\nHer family's history dates far back into an ancient age, and her ancestors once fought in The Chasm against a great cataclysm.\nWanton death was dealt during that battle, and even a yaksha met their end there. Only a few survived the grueling bloodshed.\nOne of her ancestors died, while the other went insane, constituting a huge blow to her family.\nYelan has always wanted to find out what happened back then. Despite her better judgment, she can't help feeling attracted to The Chasm.\nIt almost feels like something that runs in her blood — something inexplicably ominous — has been summoning her to The Chasm.\nPerhaps she will plunge into that darkness one day, and the ill fate that once befell her ancestors shall find her too.\nThe ominous calling that runs in the family shuts down her fear and turns on her craving for danger. This may be the reason for the peculiarities in her character, Yelan presumed.\nShe had never doubted it until she came of age, until the seal on The Chasm was lifted.\nWith the help of her companions, she unveiled the hidden past of her ancestors.\nThat moment marked a new chapter in her life:\nIn the past, she was a wild beast driven by pure instinct. Drawn to danger, she walked into darkness.\nFrom that moment on, she has found the true meaning of her instinct.\nThat which hides inside her, that constant calling, is not only a source of worry but also a light of guidance.\nIt is the blood of heroes which has been howling for 500 years.\nShe has no fear, for the courage within her makes her strong. She craves danger, for the heir of heroes is meant for a great adventure.\nSome day, she will embark on the path her ancestors once took.\nShe is the descendant of heroes, and she shall become the hero for many who will come after her. ｜ 夜兰常巡游徘徊在层岩巨渊一带，凝视最深处的黑暗。\n她出身于古老世家，她的祖先曾在此地抗击巨大灾厄。\n那一战，令千万人泣血，更有仙众夜叉埋骨于此。恶战过后，幸存者寥寥无几。\n两位祖先一死一生，活下来的那个竟也变得疯癫，这给夜兰的家族蒙上了一层阴霾。\n夜兰一直想知道当年究竟发生了什么，虽然理智告诉她不该靠近那里，但身体却愈加被吸引。\n仿佛血脉中藏着一种说不清道不明的不详，它在召唤她前往巨渊。\n或许未来有一天，她会坠入那片黑暗吧？当年缠绕在祖先身上的灾厄，也将降临在她身上。\n她想，大概这就是自己性格稍显怪异的源头。血脉里那份不详，令她感觉不到恐惧，让她渴望危险。\n她一直这样想着，直到长大成人，直到层岩巨渊封印解开的那天。\n在诸多伙伴的帮助下，祖先的事迹清晰展现在她的眼前。\n那是一个堪称分水岭的时刻——\n那之前，她仅仅是一只凭借被危险吸引的本能迈入黑暗的野兽。\n那之后，她才真正找到了这本能的真正意义。\n那些潜伏在她血脉中，不停召唤她的东西，令她忧虑，却也指引她。\n它是怒吼了五百年的英雄之血。\n不会恐惧，因为勇气令她坚定；渴望危险，因为英雄骨血不甘平庸。\n终有一天，她将走上和祖先相同的道路。\n她是英雄的后人，亦将成为后人的英雄。

- Speaking of our fireworks. Have you heard of Naganohara Fireworks? They are the oldest and one of the best fireworks shops in all of Inazuma. They're also the organizer of the Naganohara Fireworks Show. ｜ 说到稻妻的烟花，你听说过「长野原烟花店」吗？那是我们稻妻老牌的烟花店，工艺一流，「长野原烟花会」便是由他家主办的。

- Nara friend, come play with Aralila! Aranishat is very weak. Don't play with him. ｜ 那菈朋友，来和兰梨娄玩耍吧！兰难世，弱得很，不要和他玩。
- My garland keeps breaking, though. So I keep having to pick new flowers. ｜ 不过蒙蒙老是编坏，所以只好再来采花了。
- Played by Kamisato Ayaka ｜ 神里绫华饰
- Well, he had a large backpack on his back, and nobody was allowed to look at it... But... it was very strange. It was warm, and it kept on buzzing... ｜ 东西？我就看见，他一直背着一个大包，谁也不让看。但是…但那个包裹很奇怪，一直热乎乎的，还嗡嗡直响。
- How might one eradicate the threat that forbidden knowledge poses to Irminsul?\nNahida used to believe that she was the one who had the answer, but never did she realize that she was also the answer herself.\nOne who takes action will certainly leave one's traces behind. When one wishes to eradicate oneself, a paradox would thus occur.\nThat is why it is inevitable that one must depend on others to accomplish this goal.\nBy the time Nahida had figured this out, time was running out, leaving her no room for further consideration. The knowledge accumulated through the years could not even help her find a solution to the pressing dilemma before her.\nBut just as ████ said, as one with wisdom, one should feel joy upon the discovery of the answer.\nShe was not born just to accomplish such cruel deeds. Only after eradicating forbidden knowledge could she focus on Sumeru's future and plan for the prosperity and happiness that her nation could call its own.\nWill a nation walking into the future still remember a name that no longer exists? It does not matter.\n"Does it really not matter?"\nNahida would have definitely proposed otherwise. Shame, then, that their time was too short. In that blink of an eye, ████ did not even leave her a chance to retort. ｜ 要怎么样才能完全消除「禁忌知识」对世界树的威胁呢？\n纳西妲曾以为自己是这个问题的解答者，却没想到她同时也是「答案」本身。\n由一个人做出的事，必定会留下那个人的痕迹。而当那个人想要消除自己的时候，一切就会连接成悖论。\n所以，就算要达成这个目标，也必须经他人之手。\n当纳西妲完全理解这一切，时间已经所剩无几，她来不及思考，常年累积的学识竟也丝毫未能支撑她想出解决眼前困境的办法。\n但就像「████」说的那样，作为智者，应该为探寻到答案而高兴。\n她并不只是为了做残酷的事情而诞生。唯有「禁忌知识」被彻底解决，她才能放眼须弥的未来，真正去展望独属于这片国度的美好图景。\n一个即将走向未来的国度是否能记得一个不复存在的名字？已经不重要了。\n「已经不重要了吗？」\n纳西妲一定会提出不同的意见。只可惜时间过于短暂，在那擦肩的一瞬，「████」连反驳的机会都没有留给她。

- They do night shifts all the time, they must know something. ｜ 经常值夜班的他们很可能见过些什么吧。
- With the Naganohara Fireworks Show just around the corner, everyone is getting excited and the fireworks girl is getting busy.\nBut what is the place of a transitory flicker of flame in a nation that champions eternity?\nIf you have a moment to spare, pray stop and see for yourself. Some things may exist for only an instant, but their meaning endures for all time. ｜ 「长野原烟花会」举办在即，万众期待，而烟花少女仍在奔忙。\n在永恒的国度，转瞬即逝的烟花之中究竟承载何物？\n若有片刻闲暇，请驻足一观吧，此乃须臾，亦为隽永。

- Well... we'll just have to figure it out. ｜ 唔…那我们也只能去看看了。

- We've brought on Mr. Lyney as a consultant in the past. He was instrumental in helping us crack a case involving a perpetrator who used magic tricks to commit crimes. I was hoping he'd be able to provide some valuable insight this time around as well. ｜ 我们之前请林尼先生做过顾问，来破解一些堪比魔术的犯罪手法，这次也希望借助他的知识。

- "Thank you" are the two words that Barbara hears most often.\nWhen she feels lost, she will suddenly find that there is someone wanting to hold her hand.\n"Thanks for being here with me. I feel so much better."\nTo Barbara, the greatest reward is seeing the smiles on people's faces.\nTherefore, whenever she is massaging her swollen calves or drinking tea to care for her sore throat, Barbara recalls all those who have been kind to her.\n"It's the encouragement I receive from others that keeps me going."\nJust maybe, the smiles she receives are proof that her songs really can heal people.\nHer ambition to surpass her sister and become the most popular person in all of Mondstadt hasn't been abandoned by Barbara, it is simply buried deep inside her heart.\n"If only I excelled more, perhaps I could be of help to Jean."\nThis is what she believes.\n"Okay... Go Barbara, go!" ｜ 「谢谢。」这是芭芭拉听到最多的话。\n感到迷茫时，有人握住了她的手。\n「你的陪伴，让我感觉好多了。」\n对芭芭拉而言，大家脸上重新洋溢出的笑容，就是她最好的奖章。\n所以，在夜里按摩着肿疼的小腿，或者咕嘟咕嘟喝着护嗓子的杏白茶时，芭芭拉都会想起每一个向她投以善意的人。\n「我也是在大家的鼓励下前进的！」\n而且，那个笑容说不定正是健康的证明——歌声也许真的能够将人们治愈。\n至于那份想要超越姐姐，成为全蒙德的人气第一的小小好胜心，并没有被芭芭拉摒弃，而是被她藏进了最深的心底。\n「如果能够变得更加优秀，也许就能为姐姐分担一点责任了吧。」\n她是这样想的。\n「唔唔…芭芭拉冲呀！」

- "Yet mistakes are normal. Nothing is truly perfect. A north wind seeking to carry out its duty should never have been so focused on avoiding making any mistakes at all."\nJust as the "Brave Northerly Wind" states, whether one's angle of attack is accurate or not, whether one's air speed is correct or not, whether one's flight is graceful or graceless... Such details are cluttered with variables. Even if a perfect solution cannot be found, one need not fear, and simply fly toward one's final destination. Forward, then, with confidence! ｜ 「错误本就是世间的常事，没有事能真正被做到完美无缺。一股真正想要履行自己职责的北风，从来都不会光想着如何避免所有错误。」\n正如《勇敢的北风》所说，速度的朝向精准与否、绝对的空速得当与否、飞行的姿态优雅与否…都是充满变数的细节，即便无法面面俱到，也无需畏惧，只要飞行的方向仍锁定在最终的目标上，就充满信心地继续前行吧。
- Yet, as you regard the city in front of you, it appears to be little more than an empty shell. Its hollow gates are open to you, beckoning you to come forth and bring salvation back to the town. ｜ 但在你们眼前的城市却徒有其表。此刻，空洞的大门朝你们敞开双臂，渴望着你们的拯救。

- A bench made from Fragrant Cedar Wood. It has a simple design and takes up little space, making it easy to place and store. Legend has it that performers of the Yun-Han Opera Troupe would sit on these benches to take a break after everything was ready, or to watch the performance from behind the curtain. More often than not, however, these benches are reserved for enthusiastic guests — there are usually not enough seats around the round tables when it comes to formal performances. In such circumstances, Yun-Han Opera Troupe will add such benches at its discretion to make the most of the venue and allow more people to enjoy the opera without disturbing each other. ｜ 垂香木所制的长凳，构型简明，占地面积较少，摆放和收纳都相当方便。传说「云翰社」的伶工们在一切准备停当后，会坐在这种长凳上稍事休息，或从幕后观看台上的演出。不过更多时候，这种长凳是为热情的宾客们准备的——每逢正式的演出，圆桌圆凳的宾位通常是不够用的。「云翰社」会酌情增加这种长凳，充分利用场地，在互不打扰的前提下让更多人享受戏曲的熏陶。

- The fact that we, as Pari, do not have such a celebration of our own makes me troubled. Do you not feel the same way, Elder? ｜ 花灵没有自己的节日这件事让我耿耿于怀，前辈难道不这样觉得吗？

- A vibrant plant that has also been named the "lycoris" by the poets. It was once thought extinct in the Inazuman archipelago, only to re-emerge now upon the battlefields. It is said that it blooms most enchantingly where much blood was spilled. ｜ 在诗文中也被称为「赤蕊」的鲜艳植物，一度在稻妻列岛绝迹，如今在战场上再度重现。传说在血腥的战场上，它们开得格外妖艳。

- I can feel that you are indeed the one who has forged a Lau{RUBY#[S]connection}pa with a Pari. ｜ 我能感受到，你确实是与花灵建立了「劳{RUBY#[D]连结}帕」之人。
- This is far back enough, right? I'm not in the way or anything? ｜ 咱躲的够远吧？应该不碍事吧？

- I believe you'll succeed, Ellin. ｜ 她一定会成功。
- Ah! Watch out for the monsters! ｜ 啊，小心，有敌人！

- Gosoythoth falls in utter exhaustion. Holding the sword together, you and the Pyro Archon deliver the final blow. ｜ 「古斯托特」力竭倒下，你与火神一起握剑，合力斩出最后一击。
