- Naku Weed Seed ｜ 「鸣草」的种子
- After that, you met Paimon, and wandered together for some time.\nYou learned that this world has seven deities who rule the seven nations as the Seven Archons.\nYour first stop was the free city of wine and song, Mondstadt, a city built by the Anemo Archon.\nAs you stepped into Mondstadt as an outlander, it was, as the other nations were, beset on both sides by non-human and human threats.\nThe non-human threat was comprised of the confederacy known as the Abyss Order.\nThe human threat, on the other hand stemmed, from the ambition of the Tsaritsa, god of Snezhnaya.\nThe Abyss Order had corrupted an ally of the Anemo Archon, the Dragon of the East of the Four Winds of Mondstadt.\nThe envoys of Snezhnaya, for their part, used this opposition to the Abyss as an excuse to put pressure on Mondstadt.\nThese threats from without and within caused the return of the Anemo Archon, who took on the form of a bard and joined you in your journey to save the dragon.\nYet there was something then that you did not see — for as the dragon fell to the Abyss, a certain figure had been reflected in its eyes...\nThe one who rules the Abyss.\nShe had once traveled with you, and you had once crossed many worlds together. ｜ 在那之后，你遇到旅伴派蒙，一起流浪了一段时间。\n你得知此世的神灵共有七位，以「尘世七执政」之名统治七国。\n你们将驻足的第一站定为诗与酒的自由城邦，蒙德，那是风神建立的国度。\n你作为异乡人踏足蒙德时，它正与其它国家一样，遭受着来自人类之外与人类内部的双重威胁。\n人类之外的威胁，是非人之物构成的「深渊教团」。\n人类内部的威胁，则是至冬国的神灵，冰之女皇的野心。\n深渊教团腐化了风神的眷属——蒙德「四风守护」中的东风之龙。\n至冬国的使团借口对抗深渊，对蒙德层层施压。\n内外交困，因而引来神的回归。风之神化身吟游诗人，与你一同行动，解救巨龙。\n然而此时的你尚未见到，在陷入深渊的巨龙瞳中，倒映出的那个人影…\n统领深渊之人。\n那位少女也曾远渡重天，与你一起跨越诸多世界。
- The guards have reported seeing some ores nearby. Condessence Crystals, apparently, and no small amount of Magical Crystal Ore either... Not exactly headline news though. ｜ 有守卫报告说在附近看到了些矿石，除了萃凝晶外，还有不少魔晶矿…倒也不是什么大事。

- The standard interior walls of a lofty tower, built from a time-tested brick-and-stone structure for both durability and ease of maintenance. The designer intentionally left a blank space in the center which has been surrounded by relief carvings and metallic ornamentation, offering the homeowner a canvas for their own creative freedom. After all, expressing one's unique take on current trends and fashion through graffiti or other decorative means is an indispensable part of the Natlanese lifestyle... ｜ 「昂扬高塔」的标准内墙，采用了久经考验的砖石结构，颇为耐用且易于维护。在墙体的中心部分，设计者特意通过浮雕和金属装饰勾勒出了一片空白区域，用于方便屋主自由装饰。毕竟在纳塔，通过涂鸦或其他装饰手段来表达个人对于潮流和时尚的独特理解，是一种不可或缺的生活方式…
- Precisely! But considering it mostly deals with insurance claims and lawsuits and the like, I was rather hoping it wouldn't come to that. ｜ 正是如此！但考虑到里面写的内容有不少是关于保险赔偿、法律诉讼的问题，我还是希望事态不要发展到那一步。

- Place the conches that you have gathered to the proper area in the center of the campsite. Perhaps this might bring Yakov back to his senses... ｜ 将收集到的海螺，放在营地中央正确的位置，说不定这样做就能够唤醒雅科夫…

- This far out from Mondstadt, at this hour? Even if you set out right now, I'll wager you'd still miss the opening ceremony. ｜ 按现在的时间算，就算你立刻赶回蒙德城，估计也赶不上活动开始的时间了。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Scarlet Torii Gate: Door of Silence.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「朱木鸟居-『真静之扉』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- *sigh* I'm sure you've heard of the peace negotiations between the Shogunate and Sangonomiya, right? ｜ 唉，你也听说了幕府和珊瑚宫谈和的事情吧。
- Please help me out and get me one of those dishes... I just need my stomach to stop *GROWL* for the day... ｜ 拜托你了，带一份菜品给我吧咕…吃完的话，至少今天肚子就不会叫了吧咕…

- Hehe, probably because we've answered that question before. Mr. Arataki Itto came to ask us about it a while back. We'd certainly love to help, if we can. ｜ 呵呵，是因为荒泷一斗阁下早就前来打听过了。其实我们也很想帮忙。
- The auction finally begins. ｜ 在这之后，拍卖会终于开始。

- Let us do so. ｜ 那就这样好了。
- A stone statue depicting the form of the God of the Stove, Marchosius.\nAccording to legend, "the ancients found the Stove God's shrine, but there was no statue — only a huge, smooth slab of stone." During the Moonchase Festival, the same giant stone reappeared in Liyue Harbor, and as if responding to the people's wishes, it opened when the festival was in full swing and revealed this statue inside.\nTo quote the Stove God himself, "Dining is the profoundest of customs in the human world." Currently, the amicable Stove God has taken on another form as he continues to witness the smoky fireplaces and steaming hearths of this world. He now lives without a single worry and takes all the naps he wants — a truly carefree life indeed. ｜ 雕刻着「炉灶之魔神」马科修斯尊容的石像。\n传说「古人曾找到过灶神的神龛，然而其中没有神像，仅有一块表面光滑的巨石」。逐月节期间，与典故描述相符的巨石重现于世，并在节庆最为热闹之时，顺应人们的心愿绽开，展现出其中深藏的这尊雕像。\n「吃喝原是人间盛事」，如今，最亲近人的炉灶之魔神正以另一种身姿见证着世间缭绕的炊烟，抛却烦恼，好好休息，真正做到了无忧无虑。

- Singing Voice from the Shore ｜ 岸上传来的歌声
- "Bigfish" ｜ 「大鱼」
- Hehehe... Let's just say I'm blessed with certain linguistic powers. ｜ 呵呵呵…你们可以认为是我在「语言」方面的天然才华吧。
- I'm a master of the game. Do you dare challenge me? ｜ 我可是很强的。敢来挑战我吗？
- The Alley Hunter <size=24>etc.</size> ｜ 暗巷猎手<size=24>等</size>
- Huh, you and I are both travelers from another world. That our paths have crossed here is no accident, but the will of fate. ｜ 我与你同为异世界的旅人，在此相遇。错不了，想必是命运的意志吧。
- The true name of the Raiden Shogun is "Raiden Ei."\nIn her long road, she has witnessed the price that Inazuma has had to pay for progress over the hundreds and thousands of years.\nThe happiest years of her life had passed her by, and those she once considered friends became her foes. In the end, she even lost the reason for which she had wielded her sword.\n"Where there is progress, there must be loss."\nEi believed that this was the iron-clad rule of the world, with time as its merciless enforcer.\nThe greatest and most prosperous nation of men collapsed overnight, and even that most ancient Liyue Harbor would say farewell to its Geo Archon. The winds of parting came whistling in from the outer edge of time.\nHowever resounding the Raiden Shogun's name, centuries later, millennia later... Someday, Inazuma would lose the protection of its deity.\nAs a warrior, she was wary of all foes. Even if that enemy was a crisis as intangible as time's passage, she had to find a countermeasure, a weapon she could use to defeat it in time.\nHer answer? "Eternity." Only Eternity could freeze all things under the sky, make Inazuma truly deathless.\n"Then, while things are still good, let us have stillness... Let us march towards Eternity." ｜ 雷电将军，真名为「雷电影」。\n她从过去一路走来，亲历了稻妻千百年来为前进而付出的诸多代价。\n最为快乐的岁月已然逝去，昔日的友人化身为敌。到最后，就连握刀的原因都失却了。\n「只要前进，便会有所失去。」\n影认为，这正是以时间为载体作用于整个世界的钢铁法则。\n最为繁荣兴盛的人之国一夜之间土崩瓦解，最为古老长久的璃月港也辞别了岩神。离别之风，从时间另一头吹来。\n「雷电将军」的名声尚且响亮，但几百年、几千年…终有一日，稻妻将会失去神的庇护。\n身为武人，她警惕一切对手。哪怕敌人是如时间般虚无的危机，她也要赶在那一日到来之前，找到反击的武器。\n她的答案是「永恒」。唯有「永恒」能令万物停驻，能令稻妻长生不灭。\n「那么，趁着一切还美好，就这样静止吧…去往永恒。」

- Childe? What, so we're supposed to dote on you? ｜ 哇…性格好糟糕，救过我们一次就把我们当仆人？
- Yes. ｜ 已经全部消灭了。
- I never would've imagined that he'd lost his memories and become a madman who only knows how to wield a sword. ｜ 没想到他竟然失去了记忆，沦落成只会挥刀的狂人了。
- It's not like we have any other options. ｜ 也没有别的办法。
- #Anyway, there's no time to lose, kind {M#sir}{F#lady}! Please come with me to the Fontaine Research Institute to find my supervisor and request the key to the central processing station! ｜ #总之，事不宜迟，好心的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您陪我回枫丹科学院，找主管申请中枢处理站的钥匙吧！
- (Maybe it's worth a try...) ｜ （…嗯，或许是个办法。）

- You could say that... Haha, or maybe I've just been alive longer than the rest of them, and picked up a few tricks that they didn't want to touch... ｜ 嗯哼，可以这么说吧…啊哈哈，虽然也可能只是活得太久，学会了别人不想学的东西而已…
- Bye then! I won't be much longer myself... I just want to have a few more duels! ｜ 嗯，我稍后也会离开，但在那之前…我想要与人再多切磋几局。

- Self-control... ｜ 要控制住…
- I just hope the sword isn't really broken... ｜ 希望…那把剑不要真的碎了…

- If she knew that there's another Layla who is capable of doing everything, she may think even less of herself. ｜ 如果被她知道，另一个「莱依拉」能把所有事处理得很好，那她会觉得自己的存在更加无足轻重。
- A dining chair whose backrest and seating cushions are like trays of jelly. These are common seats seen at The Cat's Tail. According to what Margaret heard from Sara, if the backrests of seats have more flexibility, then when clients are savoring a dish, the additional movement might allow them to resonate with the flavors more. So, regardless if the customers order Mondstadt Grilled Fish or any assortments of snacks and desserts, sitting on this chair will improve their dining experience! ｜ 坐垫和靠背质感如果冻般的餐椅，常见于猫尾酒馆的普通餐位。据玛格丽特从莎拉那里听来的说法，若是餐椅的靠背更有弹性，客人在就餐时，就更能对料理中的味道产生共鸣。所以，无论客人点了主打菜蒙德烤鱼，还是各式冷盘和甜品，坐在这种椅子上，都会有更棒的用餐体验！
- There's still something I need to do. ｜ 我还有要做的事情。
- I'm Francis, yours truly, and nothing has ever had such a grasp on my heart, or stomach, like the Liyue cuisine does... ｜ 鄙人弗朗西斯，已经彻底被璃月港的菜肴征服了…
- Hence why I dislike small talk. ｜ 所以我才不想花时间寒暄啊。

- Spores of Repose will become attached to you when you <color=#FFE14BFF>indwell special Spiritsconces or use special Coilgrass Sigils</color>. <color=#FFE14BFF>Within a certain radius</color>, you can use each Spore to create a Leaf of Repose when jumping or attacking in mid-air.\nBe careful though, for Leaves created this way will disappear after a while... ｜ 在<color=#FFE14BFF>魂附特殊魂烛或使用特殊「卷叶符印」时</color>，会令身上黏着「托身叶孢子」，那么在<color=#FFE14BFF>附近一定范围内</color>，于空中跳跃或攻击时，每一枚「托身叶孢子」都能为你展开一片托身叶。\n不过要小心，这片托身叶会在很短的时间后消失…

- Say you buy 500 bottles of Slime Condensate from me for 50,000 Mora. This is a spot deal. ｜ 今天你花五万摩拉从我这里买入五百瓶史莱姆凝液，这种就是现货交易。
- Then... Then will we see each other again? At the end of the story, the characters in it all disappear... I don't think they see each other again... ｜ 那…那之后我们还会再见吗？故事结束的话，故事里的那些角色就都不见啦…我想，他们一定是再也见不到对方了…
- We here at Orchestre Jak are a collective of people from all walks of life who carry out operations based on our personal abilities. ｜ 而我们雅克管弦乐团吸收了各界各阶层人士，自发基于个人能力进行活动。
- An insignia given to those who complete the special training conducted by the Adventurers' Guild. It can be considered a symbol of one's strength. ｜ 完成冒险家协会特训后获得的纹章。也可以看作是一种实力的证明。
- Enable ｜ 开启

- If they hear that a café employs an uncertified coffee maker, then they might also think the café is an unlicensed establishment. ｜ 如果他们听说某家咖啡店里有非正式的咖啡师，难免也会认为这家咖啡店也是不正式的。

- Neuvillette got the milkshake. Clorinde received lipstick instead. ｜ 给那维莱特的是奶昔，给克洛琳德的是唇膏。

- Have you thought of any kind of answer? ｜ 想出什么答案了吗？

- You've always been genuine with me, it truly warms my heart. ｜ 你对我那么真诚，让我心里特别温暖。

- The signature line has been scrubbed out, and is impossible to read. ｜ 下面的落款被涂掉了，完全看不出写的是什么。

- Hmm... Let me see... Actually, based on the number of chests and Moonchase Charms you've obtained... ｜ 嗯…我看看，根据你找到宝箱和逐月符的数量计算…

- Within <color=#CA6445FF>{0}</color>s of receiving the buff, after the current on-field character <color=#CA6445FF>creates a shield</color>, a shockwave will be released at the character's position, dealing True DMG and <color=#CA6445FF>interrupting</color> enemies. A shockwave can be released in this way once every <color=#CA6445FF>{1}</color>s. Additionally, characters protected by a shield will gain a <color=#CA6445FF>{2}%</color> All Elemental DMG Bonus and <color=#CA6445FF>taunt</color> nearby enemies, attracting their attacks. ｜ 获得增益后的<color=#CA6445FF>{0}</color>秒内，当前场上角色<color=#CA6445FF>创造护盾后</color>，将在角色的位置释放冲击波，造成真实伤害，并<color=#CA6445FF>打断敌人</color>，每<color=#CA6445FF>{1}</color>秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。此外，处于护盾庇护下的角色，将获得<color=#CA6445FF>{2}%</color>的所有元素伤害加成，并<color=#CA6445FF>嘲讽</color>周围的敌人，吸引敌人攻击。

- Anyway, we should be more careful when talking to Aranara in front of others... ｜ 不管怎么说，在人面前和兰那罗交流的时候要注意一点才行…
- People from Sumeru often tell travelers that there is no dearer stage to miss than that of Zubayr Theater, and that Nilou is their greatest dancer.\nOne might compare her presence on stage to that of a pure lotus steeped in a dreamlike world — a vision of mesmerizing beauty.\nNilou puts on no airs in her day-to-day life, however. Indeed, she is a gentle yet passionate soul, innocent and good-hearted.\nAs such, feel free to greet her if you meet her offstage. That would definitely make her very happy! ｜ 须弥人常对旅人说，最值得一行的舞台莫过祖拜尔剧场，最不容错过的舞者当属妮露。\n当她在台上起舞，就像一朵一尘不染的莲花，落在一个如梦似幻的世界，美得令人恍惚。\n不过生活中的妮露并不高高在上，反而十分温柔热情，纯真亲善。\n所以，如果在舞台下遇到妮露，不必顾虑，大胆和她打招呼吧，她会很开心的。

- Eventually, they would forsake their tribal lands and ways, and growing used to city life, would join the Lord of Geo in his dwelling, creating and selling porcelain for a living, forsaking their old militant roots. ｜ 后来呀，待到褪尽蛮荒，习惯了城市生活的部民便随岩王爷迁入城中，专以制造和贩卖瓷器为业，不再顾兵戈之事了。
- The ability of poetry to awaken historical consciousness was precisely why it was banned all those years ago by the aristocracy. ｜ 而唤醒历史意识的作用，也正是千百年前大贵族们禁止诗歌的原因。

- What about the soldiers who gave their lives on the front line, or the hardship endured by the people? Do they deserve no mention!? ｜ 前线那些阵亡的将士，人民在此间经受的困苦，全都不值一提吗！
- Indeed. I once met someone from the Palais Mermonia. He's usually a polite, patient, and meticulous fellow. ｜ 没错，我见过一个在沫芒宫工作的先生，平时这先生待人彬彬有礼，既耐心又细心。

- Moeava ｜ 摩亚瓦
- Ohh, what am I going to do... If I can't understand this notation, then I won't be able to play a beautiful enough song for Mamere... ｜ 呜呜，怎么办…要是读不懂这张乐谱的话，就没办法演奏出足够美妙的音乐送给玛梅赫了…

- Kid Xinyan ｜ 小辛焱

- Photo ｜ 留影

- "A crane brings <color=#00E1FFFF>1</color> fresh flower in its beak to decorate my hair, while a white rabbit sews a hemline from <color=#00E1FFFF>4</color> rays of moonlight. In the blink of an eye, I am standing on the path that leads to her house." ｜ 「鹤衔来<color=#00E1FFFF>一</color>朵装饰发梢的鲜花，白兔将<color=#00E1FFFF>四</color>片月光缝成裙摆，我打扮得当，<color=#00E1FFFF>向着东方</color>喊了<color=#00E1FFFF>七</color>声椿的名字，转眼便站在去往她家的小径上。」

- Don't worry, Ayaka, no misunderstanding here. ｜ 绫华不用担心我误会。
- I wouldn't go that far. ｜ 倒也没那么顺利。
- We had agreed to meet again yesterday, but she failed to show up. That's when I sent Yelan to investigate further. ｜ 我们约定两日后再见，如今日子已过，堂主仍未出现，我便托夜兰前去调查。

- The matra. ｜ 风纪官。

- Ohh! So, you mean like... using some kind of Forest magic to repair the Tavern? ｜ 哦！难道说，你要用什么森林的魔法，去帮助他们修复酒馆吗？

- Huh!? So... she's the Hydro Archon? But how did she know we were looking for her? ｜ 欸！那就是…水神吗！她是怎么知道我们要来的…

- I'm sorry about my friend... That's just how he is. Always had a terrible temper. Please accept my apology for his impudent behavior. ｜ 抱歉…我的朋友他脾气就是这样…我为他做出的不当行为向你们道歉…
- Hehe, not telling you just yet. ｜ 嘿嘿，这个先不告诉你。
- Gah, I'm so full... Shouldn't have taken a kitsune on in a Kitsune Ramen eating contest, of all things... ｜ 唔…吃得好撑，早知道就不跟狐妖比赛吃狐狸拉面了…
- Emmm... Yoyo, ika? Tomo? ｜ Emmm…Yoyo, ika? Tomo?
- You've heard all you need to hear about the Temple of Silence, so on that, I don't have anything to add. ｜ 缄默之殿的信息你们都知道了，我这里没有要补充的内容。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- C'mon, stop messing around. We only found one, so let's just return it to him. The Mora's for Nadia's treatment, after all. ｜ 我们不是只找到一个钱袋子吗？别开玩笑了，还是先给他吧。这可是要拿去给纳蒂亚治病用的。
- One voyage takes about one and a half years, but that's just a rough estimate. ｜ 这出船一趟就是一年半载的，没个定数。
- Can you solve any problem? ｜ 什么都能解决吗？
- Lan seems to have changed her mind about seeking the Unseen Razor. ｜ 关于寻找「藏锋」这件事，岚姐似乎改变了主意…
- Then, we have to find another way of strengthening the Sacred Flame to keep the Abyss at bay. This won't be easy. I'll need time to figure out the best approach. ｜ 在这个前提下，寻找其他方式强化圣火，抵挡深渊。当然这并不容易，所以我需要一些时间。
- Take on the challenges of the Domain of Forgery and earn precious Weapon Ascension Materials! ｜ 接受炼武秘境的挑战，获得能为武器带来突破的珍稀道具吧
- Duration|{param6:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param6:F1}秒
- Oh, it's Ningguang and the Traveler! Good to see you. ｜ 凝光，旅行者。难得见你们过来。
- #Paimon doesn't know how impressive this mysterious adventurer was, but they couldn't be better than Paimon and {NICKNAME}. ｜ #虽然不知道那位冒险家有多神奇，但我觉得，肯定还是比我和{NICKNAME}稍微差那么一点的。
- Mm-hmm. You see, we live in the wilderness and are frequently attacked by monsters. ｜ 没错。我们生活在野外，会遭受到很多魔物的攻击。
- Wait a minute... Friendship fees? ｜ 等等…朋友费是什么？
- Hm? Is that the Traveler and Paimon? ｜ 嗯？是旅行者和派蒙吗？
- *sigh* My hometown... The home of freedom...! How I long to go back and visit... ｜ 故乡，唉，好想回去啊…自由自在的城邦…
- Please deliver the prescription to Maruf. ｜ 那就麻烦你把这方子给马鲁夫送回去了。
- Hehe! We've been testing the Shock-Boiling Device this whole time. Paimon thinks we've gathered enough data. ｜ 嗯！这段时间我们好好测试了「震沸装置」，记录的数据应该差不多了。
- Yeah! We heard that Shingo defeated an apprentice of Domon's recently. Is that true? ｜ 对，我们听说信悟前一阵子击败了土门的爱徒，这是真的吗？
- #{NICKNAME}, can you do it? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，可以拜托你吗？
- But I'm sure if you keep going as you are, getting yourselves involved in other people's business all the time, you're sure to get caught up in another misadventure before too long. ｜ 不过，按照你们爱管闲事的性格，今后多半也会卷入到什么麻烦中去吧。
- Turbo Twirly! ｜ 冲天转转！
- Well, the Ruin Drake is gone. Let's go wake up Araphala. ｜ 这下，「遗迹龙兽」被摧毁了，我们回去叫醒兰非拉吧。
- The awful "sand grains"! Follow them! ｜ 可恶的「沙子」！！我们快点追上去吧！
- Alright, don't look at me with so much suspicion. If you've got no faith in the location I gave you, you could always search the entirety of Mondstadt... ｜ 好啦，别这么一副怀疑的表情看着我，如果你不相信我给你指的地点，难道你要把全蒙德都找一遍吗？
- ... ｜ ……
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Grandpa always called me gifted for mastering the Wangsheng arts by the age of eight, but by the time my dad was eight, he was already hosting rituals and incinerating fetor all by himself. ｜ 爷爷总说我有天赋，八岁就学会了往生术法，但老爹呢，八岁都已经能独立主持祭仪、焚烧死气了。

- About the Vision ｜ 关于「神之眼」…
- You can sit by my side, or... something more casual, whatever makes you feel comfortable and relaxed. ｜ 你可以坐来我的身旁，或者…更随意一些，只要是能让你放松下来的姿势都可以。
- #Aranakula knows... Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon have other missions and will leave Vana, like other Nara... ｜ #知道…那菈{NICKNAME}和派蒙有别的使命，会离开桓那，就像其他那菈那样…

- Wow, it vanished just like that... What is it? ｜ 哇！一下子就不见了，这到底是什么东西…
- Just as you have seen, the Skeptics' documents are a pile of raving-mad myths, while Dahri records are factual. Precise. ｜ 就像你们所看到的一样，矫论团的文献是一堆如同神话一般的呓语，而与荼诃人相关的记录却是真实不虚。
- #It brings me no pleasure to have to ask, but on behalf of all of Watatsumi Island... I beseech you. Please lend us your assistance one more time, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，实在不好意思。我代表海祇岛恳请你能再度助我们一臂之力。
- Decreases all party members' gliding and sprinting Stamina consumption by 15% for 900s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色滑翔和冲刺消耗的体力降低15%，持续900秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- The Fortress of Meropide works with Spina di Rosula on some matters regarding supplies and logistics, but we don't have any other dealings. This isn't because I don't trust Navia or her abilities, in fact, I hold her in quite high regard. The only reason we continue to stay out of each other's way is because I wanna honor the agreement I made with the late Mr. Callas. ｜ 梅洛彼得堡和刺玫会有一些物资方面的合作，但仅限于此。并不是不信任娜维娅小姐或是质疑她的能力——实际上恰恰相反——只不过，我们之间水下水上的事务互不干涉是我与卡雷斯先生约好的规矩，维持不变就好。

- After a Pinball triggers a Frozen reaction with the bar, it will <color=#F39000>temporarily halt in place on the bar</color>, though the bar will still be able to move. After the Frozen duration elapses, the Pinball will automatically shoot forward. Alternatively, it can also be preemptively propelled by active choice. ｜ 「弹球」与弹板发生冻结反应后，将<color=#F39000>暂时停留在弹板上</color>，此时弹板仍可以移动。冻结时间结束后，「弹球」将自动向前击出，也可以选择时机，主动击球。

- This was once a treasure granted to Qiaoying Village by an adeptus from Jueyun. As the tea-making process has changed, the Youwang Cauldron has long ceased to serve the same key function it used to. However, its symbolic role in the hearts of the villagers is likely irreplaceable... ｜ 昔日曾是绝云的仙人赠予翘英庄的宝物。伴随制茶工艺的变迁，如今的攸望釜早已不再承担如往日般重要的职责。然而仙釜在翘英庄居民心中的象征地位，依然是不可替代的吧…

You can use this method to tell who you can challenge to a game of cards with ease... When you use your Casket of Tomes to activate the ability to search for players, players closest to you whom you have yet to defeat will be prioritized. ｜ 触发寻找牌手的功能后，将跳转至地图，并对同样持有秘典之盒的其他牌手进行标记，这下到底有谁会打牌就一览无余了…通过秘典之盒激活寻找牌手功能时，会优先自动选中最近的未通关牌手。

- Come on, that should go without saying! After all the life-and-death situations we've been through together? That definitely makes you one of my greatest friends of all time! ｜ 这是什么话呀！我们不只是好朋友，还是一起经历过生死关头的好朋友！
- Boosts your Overloaded blessing. Choose between two diverging paths:\nOverloaded: <color=#ef5534>Elementary Explosion</color>: After dealing Electro DMG to an Embrittled opponent, launch <color=#ef5534>Explosive Orbs</color> at <color=#f39001>all</color> Embrittled opponents on the field, dealing Pyro DMG.\nOverloaded: <color=#b863ee>Primary Thunderstrike</color>: After dealing Pyro DMG to an Embrittled opponent, launch <color=#b863ee>Thunderstrikes</color> at <color=#f39001>all</color> Embrittled opponents on the field, dealing Electro DMG. ｜ 强化超载祝福，可选择以下两种分支：\n超载·<color=#ef5534>初阶爆炎</color>：对处于易碎效果影响下的敌人造成雷元素伤害后，将对场上<color=#f39001>所有</color>处于易碎效果的敌人释放<color=#ef5534>爆炎火球</color>，造成火元素伤害；\n超载·<color=#b863ee>初阶霆击</color>：对处于易碎效果影响下的敌人造成火元素伤害后，将对场上<color=#f39001>所有</color>处于易碎效果的敌人降下<color=#b863ee>霆雷打击</color>，造成雷元素伤害
- If you cannot complete a stage within 30s, you cannot challenge the next stage. After you exit the challenge, your results will be based on the highest floor you reached and the time spent completing it. ｜ 若未能在30秒内通过关卡，则无法继续挑战下一层。退出挑战后，将根据本次挑战抵达的层数，以及在挑战该层所用的时间结算本次挑战的成绩。
- Aren't you going to find the Commissioner? ｜ 不去找奉行方吗？
- Patrol Soldier ｜ 巡逻足轻
- Sumpter Beasts are friends of humanity. These gentle-hearted creatures are indispensable elements of production and transportation.\nIn Sumeru, your wealth is symbolized by the number of Sumpter Beasts you own. Large merchant caravans and Eremites usually come with very sizable trains of Sumpter Beasts indeed, and this allows them to carry ample supplies and goods across both desert and forest alike. ｜ 驮兽是人类的朋友。它们性格温顺，是重要的生产运输工具。\n在须弥，拥有驮兽的数量是财富的象征。大型的商队和镀金旅团往往拥有一支庞大的驮兽队伍，这使他们得以装载足够的补给与货物以跨越沙漠与丛林。
- Defeat the Everlasting Lord of Arcane Wisdom within the memory. ｜ 击败回忆中的七叶寂照秘密主。
- Haniyyah? Be more insistent? ｜ 海妮耶？强硬的气场？…
- Prized Isshin Blade ｜ 「一心传」名刀
- While Enkanomiya is covered in darkness, Light Realm Sigils can be obtained by <color=#FFE14BFF>opening chests</color>, <color=#FFE14BFF>unlocking waypoints</color>, and <color=#FFE14BFF>completing exploration objectives</color>. You may offer them up at the statue to upgrade the Bokuso Box and strengthen its <color=#FFE14BFF>corrosion resistance</color> and obtain various <color=#FFE14BFF>abilities that will help in exploration</color>. ｜ 探索被黑暗笼罩的渊下宫，可以通过<color=#FFE14BFF>开启宝箱</color>、<color=#FFE14BFF>解锁传送锚点</color>、<color=#FFE14BFF>完成探索目标</color>获得光界之印。在雕像处选择「供奉雕像」，消耗光界之印，可以提升睦疏之匣的等级，增加睦疏之匣的<color=#FFE14BFF>抗侵蚀强度</color>，获得多种<color=#FFE14BFF>有助于探索的能力</color>。
- The specters congregating here are causing all kinds of destructive elemental reactions. No material damage has been caused as of yet, but uncontrolled elemental activity is not a threat to be ignored. Please investigate the area, and also warn people nearby to stay safe and keep their distance. ｜ 群聚的飘浮灵在此地引起了很多破坏性的元素反应，虽未造成实质性的损失，但不可控的元素一直都是不容忽视的威胁。请前往现场勘查一番，并提醒周围的人注意安全。
- A teardrop looted and treasured by some members of the Eclipse hilichurl tribe. Had some trouble "convincing" them to part with it. ｜ 被抢夺的泪滴。在丘丘人的圣山「说服」了一些黑日族部落成员，才得到了这枚结晶。
- A Mechanicus: Flame of Pancha can launch large fireballs to deal AoE Pyro DMG to your Lil' Fungi. Engage them with caution... ｜ 「棋阵机关·槃遮焰焰」可以施放大型火球，对「小小灵蕈」造成火元素范围伤害，需要谨慎应对…
- Prerequisite(s) not met ｜ 未满足使用条件
- Exactly! We're chasing down a legend, after all. What's true or not doesn't matter as much. ｜ 嗯，反正都是在追寻传说的踪迹，真真假假没那么重要。
- Ningguang ｜ 凝光
- This tablet was erected by Mountain Shaper. It names Azhdaha as a terrible dragon, and serves as a warning for later generations to stay away from this place... from the seal. ｜ 此碑由理水叠山真君所立。碑文中称若陀为恶龙，是为提醒后人远离这处封印。
- Do you want to chat? ｜ 要不要聊聊天？

- Now, what do we have here... Hmm, it's more or less what I expected. ｜ 让我看看…嗯，和预想中差不多。
- Fragrant Mountain Delicacies ｜ 山珍赠芳蔼
- Anytime. ｜ 应该的。
- Light Hit Taken: I ｜ 普通受击·其一
- A Fontainian Message ｜ 枫丹式的消息
- A bag that contains Lyudochka's Fatui uniform. Considering the controversial nature of Fatui uniforms, it is best not to let other people see this. ｜ 装着柳达希卡愚人众队服的纸包。考虑到愚人众身份的敏感性，这件衣服还是不要轻易让其他人看到为好。
- Hmph, well you can take it or leave it. Believe me, there's plenty more room for upwards mobility on the price, it just so happens to be in my interests to get these off my hands sooner rather than later. Besides... good luck trying to find anyone else out there selling. ｜ 哼，你不想买我还不想卖呢，这升值空间可大得很，要不是急着脱手…呵，你看现在哪里还有得收啊。
- During the photo-taking phase, the angle of the finalized image will be decided by the settings you adjusted previously.\nDuring the photo-taking process, the direction of the shoot will be indicated by the Reflector Beam. ｜ 在留影阶段，当旅行者使用「留影机」拍摄画片时，画片完成时的角度将由之前所调整的留影设置决定。\n在留影过程中，留影的方向会由「留影射光」指示。
- The stone slates show the people gathered around the Hydro Archon in the sea... Could that be alluding to the same thing? ｜ 石板画中，人们在海里的水神周围围成一圈，难道也象征着类似的事？
- Only if you tell me what it is... ｜ 你先说是什么…
- Hehe. Mere "good jade" would succeed in imitating our shape, no doubt... ｜ 呵呵，如果只是「好玉」的话…仿出我等型制问题不大…
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- Excuse me, are you a Purbiruni researcher? ｜ 请问您是普尔比鲁尼的学者吗？
- I trust you enjoyed your stroll? How kind of you to maroon us on that neighboring island. ｜ 还得感谢你先走一步，把我们抛弃在隔壁岛上。
- Leave the village chief's house ｜ 离开村长家
- Wow... That's a lot of feels for a piece of paper, maybe Paimon failed the test. All Paimon could think of was a bunch of people eating Grilled Fish... ｜ 呜哇…一张纸片，居然能感受到这么多内容，岂不是显得我很失败？我只能想到许多人围在一起烤鱼什么的…
- Your boss seems like the nice sort. ｜ 老板人不错哦。
- You must have come across a particularly ferocious entity. How should I put this... Most spirits are incapable of harming ordinary folks. ｜ 那你们遇见的已经是相当凶恶的家伙了，怎么说呢？一般的幽灵是没有能力伤害普通人的。
- Pickled vegetables. A round of fermentation makes food richer and also allows it to keep for longer. There were originally only four "treasures," but for auspiciousness' sake, the four vegetables were mixed and plated up with one additional "treasure" added in, hence the name "Five Pickled Treasures." ｜ 腌制而成的素菜。经过发酵的食材，口感有所丰富，还能长时间保存。原本只有四宝，但为图吉利，在摆盘最后会将四种腌菜混合，再添一宝，由此得名五宝腌菜。
- We're here! Welcome to the forward operating base of the exploration team. Feel free to rest here whenever you like! ｜ 我们到了，欢迎来到勘探队前线营地！一路辛劳，就在这里休息一下吧。
- "There are dangerous gases in this area. Proceed with caution, and do not light any fires!" ｜ 「此处有危险气体，请小心慢行，禁用明火！」
- Forest Elder ｜ 森林的长老
- Investigate ｜ 调查
- What we need is to create reasonable doubt, make the culprit question whether their cover is blown... As they hesitate over whether to make some kind of last stand, that is our chance. ｜ 只要立好合理的名目，让他无法确定，自己是否要做困兽之斗就好…在他犹豫之间，正是我们的机会。
- *sob* Ohhh... I thought I was about to be sent home in a cage, my family forced to pay my debts... ｜ 呜呜，差点以为就要被关在笼子里押回「烟谜主」，向家里人要债了…
- Eh? Uh, well, lemons can be breezy too! ｜ 哇！我是说…嗯…这种东西和打倒巨兽一样，都是小意思而已！
- Clear Time Record ｜ 通关时间记录
- As such, I shall be taking my leave for now. My thanks, benefactors. ｜ 那么两位恩人，我就先告辞了。
- A fan? ...Of me? ｜ 我的…粉丝？
- Really? We can just take it and go? ｜ 咦，真的可以吗？

- Yeah, last time she also said she was going to have her daddy bring her onto the ship. ｜ 她上次也这么说啦，说要让她爸爸带着她来船上。
- Princess Mina of the Fallen Nation ｜ 亡国的美奈姬
- To my surprise, just as I was about to secretly contact the Tenryou Commission and save my kid, I found Sayu's bag in the mission crate indicating that the job was taken care of... It scared me half to death. ｜ 结果，就在我悄悄联系天领奉行，想把孩子救回来的时候，突然在汇报任务的箱子里看到早柚的袋子，说任务已经完成了，吓死我了。
- What this world needs is progress, not a cycle bereft of meaning! ｜ 这个世界，需要前进，而不是毫无意义的循环！
- Ah, haha, well... ｜ 啊哈哈，哈哈…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Well, if you can provide me with some, I could make the sauce right away. I do have some of the other condiments left over... ｜ 如果真有泡泡桔的话，我倒是可以马上做一批泡泡桔酱出来，其他的调味料也剩下一些…
- ...! ｜ ……！

- Regardless of his reasons, if my father has truly been funding a violent group of mercenaries, then it's my duty to bring him back to reason. ｜ 无论背后的原因是什么，如果我父亲真的在资助恶人，我都应该尽早让他清醒过来。
- Heh, I'm still a long way off from where you are... Rather than a "hero," I'd call myself someone who "isn't afraid of dying so that they might truly live." ｜ 比起前辈来，我差得可太远啦…比起想做英雄，唔…不如说是，「想活着的人才不怕会死于非命」吧？
- Pensive Hilichurl ｜ 思索的丘丘人
- Let's put it this way. We didn't see Aranara anywhere near the house, and we were worried, so we'd rather see if there were any leads. We might even help some trapped Aranara! ｜ 嗯…不如这么说吧！这个房子周围没见到兰那罗，我们很担心，所以想看看有没有什么线索。说不定，还能帮助受困的兰那罗呢！
- Border Fort ｜ 「边境堡垒」
- We'll need to think about this carefully. ｜ 看来要谨慎考虑了。
- Araja, what do you mean you "can't leave"...? ｜ 兰拉迦「无法离开」…？
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- Aurele ｜ 奥雷勒
- To be honest, I experience that same kind of sorrow when I'm on the battlefield. I don't know when I'll lose my comrades, so I try to appreciate every moment. ｜ 战场上其实也是一样。不知何时就会和朋友彻底分别，所以要珍惜现在的时光。
- Honorary Knight. Paimon. The owners were very reasonable and understood our reply. ｜ 荣誉骑士，派蒙，店主们都很通情达理，一听我们的回复就表示理解。
- Xuanfan ｜ 悬帆
- The wine goblet from which the Thundersoother, who defeated the Beast of Thunder, once drank violet lightning. ｜ 平雷勇士的酒盏，据说平息了雷之魔兽的英雄曾用这尊酒盏满盛紫电为饮。

- Riotous Leader ｜ 一揆寇首
- "The Adventure Continues" ｜ 「故事仍在继续」
- "Ooh, so you play Genius Invokation TCG too, huh? Let's have a match right now, then!"\nHint: Xiangling's deck contains a large number of Food Cards and cards that pair up well with Food to slowly build up advantages using Food effects. ｜ 「原来你也玩七圣召唤，那不如我们现在就来一局吧！」。\n【提示】香菱的牌组包含大量的「料理」卡牌和配合「料理」的卡牌，在发挥「料理」牌效果的同时一点一点积攒优势。
- What? N—No, not at all! We'd never do anything like that! ｜ 欸？没…没有吧！没有啦！我们绝没做什么见不得人的事！
- Could you help me look for it? It's got to be around here somewhere... I feel like it's right under my nose. ｜ 你能帮我找找吗？肯定就在这周围，我觉得…肯定就在旁边。
- Skybracer sounds right... ｜ 好像是「移霄导天真君」…

- The current generation of Qixing knows very little about these events, and very few came back from The Chasm alive. Finding out the truth has been a waiting game. ｜ 这一代七星对那些事也是一知半解。当年活着从层岩巨渊回来的人本就没有几个，想了解真相，只能等。

- He has prepared a mighty form for himself in the real world, and plans to initiate a ritual within Domus Aurea that will have him "take on flesh." ｜ 波爱修斯在真实的世界中为自己准备了一副强大的躯体，并且打算在黄金的宫殿当中进行「受肉」的仪式。

- Oh! Miss Lisa! ｜ 哦！丽莎姐姐——！
- No takebacks, now! ｜ 可不能悔牌。
- I once met an adventurer on a mountain who also happened to be picking fruits. He was even kind enough to share some with me. ｜ 在山上遇见了陌生的冒险家。他和我一样是来摘野果的，还分了我一些。
- Namecard style.\n...After that, the fish sank to the bottom of the lake, and the snake was split into several pieces. The remaining beasts waited on mountains, rivers, and moon, awaiting their silent answer. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n…后来鱼沉入湖底，蛇断为几节，留下的野兽等着山与河与月，等着它们无言的回答。
- Obtained from the initial deck ｜ 初始牌组中获取
- She was originally a young researcher with limitless promise, but one day, she left the family behind and eloped with some wild boy from who knows where. ｜ 她本来是个前途无量的青年学者，可是某天抛下家族，跟一个来路不明的野小子私奔了。
- Exhausted Iktomisaurus ｜ 疲惫的暝视龙

- Eh? What's that? ｜ 欸？那是什么…
- You gain a maximum of 1 Speedy Receiver effect\nWhen you gain <c1>1</c1>/<c2>2</c2>/<c3>3</c3> stacks of this effect, your characters' ATK SPD is increased by <c1>{1}</c1>/<c2>{2}</c2>/<c3>{3}</c3>% respectively ｜ 至多获得1项【攻速应振晶】映射效果\n该效果叠加至<c1>1</c1>/<c2>2</c2>/<c3>3</c3>层时，角色的攻击速度分别提升<c1>{1}</c1>/<c2>{2}</c2>/<c3>{3}%</c3>
- All party members gain a <multi>{0}%</multi> Dendro DMG Bonus. ｜ 队伍中所有的角色获得<multi>{0}%</multi>草元素伤害加成。
- An admirable plan. ｜ 值得敬佩的事业。
- Talk about a big door... Seems we need to collect something shaped like magatama in order to open it. ｜ 好大的门…看起来似乎需要收集那些「勾玉」形状的东西，才能打开呢。
- Let the show begin! ｜ 演唱，开始！
- About physical training... ｜ 关于锻炼身体…
- A doppelganger? In Inazuma City? But, we only detected traces of the Nightmare around Mt. Yougou... ｜ 「二重身」？这次居然直接出现在稻妻城里？可「噩梦」留下的痕迹应该没远离过影向山…
- Hmph, this kid... is not to be reasoned with. At all. ｜ 哼，这个家伙…不可理喻，油盐不进。
- She gave you her what now? ｜ 她把什么交给了你们…？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Excuse me. I will be back shortly. ｜ 总之，等我一会儿。
- A log of ships coming in and out by Little Fei ｜ 阿飞关于船只进出的见闻
- Are you just pretending to be hungry all the time just to get the customers to come take care of you? ｜ 该不会是刻意装作一副吃不饱的样子，想要惹客人们爱怜它吧？
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> Heals your active character for 2 HP.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 2</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>治疗我方「出战角色」2点。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：2</color>
- Longer range, faster rates of fire, greater payload strength. As to how we can achieve that, I'm not so sure — that's Ematol's area of expertise. ｜ 更远的射程，更快的射速，更大的威力。至于具体应该如何实现，我也不清楚，这是艾玛托那家伙的专业领域。
- Verr Goldet ｜ 菲尔戈黛特
- Sorry, we'll just have to wait for the next opportunity... ｜ 抱歉，要不等下一次机会吧…
- That way, you'll have the results you need to prove yourself, and even Koolau won't be able to question your abilities anymore. ｜ 这样，你就能拿到「结果」，即便是那个科奥劳，也不会再有质问你的资格。

- Give the Wheat and Sweet Flower to Navia ｜ 把小麦和甜甜花交给娜维娅
- Let Paimon have a look! ｜ 快给我们看看！
- Unfortunately, our investigations have now ground to a halt, as we are short on personnel... ｜ (test)但在那么多次调查之后，我们暂时也抽调不出能继续深入调查的人手了…
- We were both sad, and conflicted, and totally overthinking everything as a result, haha. ｜ 哎呀，当时难过的时候，就是会胡思乱想嘛。
- This pot used to carry concentrated and extremely potent concoctions. It is now empty, but still gives off a strong smell of medicine. ｜ 原本装满了提炼后极浓的药汁，如今只剩下浓烈的药味。
- Agony Alone May Be Repaid ｜ 唯苦痛可偿还
- Talk to Chongyun ｜ 与重云交谈
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Realm of the Easterly Winds ｜ 滔风之境
- Yep — and in fact, their tale specifically emphasizes that most of them were ordinary humans! ｜ 不仅不是仙人，甚至大多是人类呢！
- A big bed and soft pillow, appropriate lighting, and even a miniature tree for embellishment... ｜ 宽敞的床榻，松软的枕头，灯火明度适中，还有盆景作为点缀…
- Brunette Man ｜ 棕发青年
- I suppose they really are the adepti... ｜ 这么说来还真是…
- He is very powerful, and that power comes with a high level of responsibility. However, I believe him to be someone worthy of respect independent of the power he holds. ｜ 他所拥有的力量让他背负着更多的责任，不过在我看来，即使没有强悍的力量，他仍然是一位值得尊敬的人。
- We won't always be here. ｜ 我们总会离开的。
- After destroying this ball, the Crococannon's reserve ammunition will increase.\nIf you are already at maximum ammunition, you will gain {0} point(s). ｜ 击破该球后，提升「鳄鳄炮炮」的备用弹药量。\n若备用弹药量已达上限，则获得{0}分。
- "Could the Tenryou Commissioner please grant my son a few days' leave to come home so that I shall not have any lingering regrets on account of this war?" ｜ 「也请天领奉行大人能否给犬子休几天假回来看看，让老夫不至于为战争悔恨莫及。」
- Darkgold Wolfbite ｜ 黑金狼噬
- Khvarena of Good and Evil ｜ 善恶的赫瓦雷纳
- It is alright. The barrier here has been undone successfully, and thus does the Cleansing Ritual come a step closer to completion. Thank you very much. ｜ 不用在意。此处结界能成功解开，「大祓」的进度又推进了一些，实在多谢二位。
- Hermosa ｜ 赫茉莎
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Very well. Come with me, we'll choose some bystanders to converse with. ｜ 嗯，好吧。那跟我过来吧，我们随便找几个人聊聊看。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Towards Greater Heights."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『向更高处』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Meow! Meow meow, meow! ｜ 喵！喵喵，喵！
- "Hahahahaha! It's never too late to admit defeat before Arataki 'The Ultimate TCG Champion' Itto!"\nHint: Arataki Itto's deck places great emphasis on Claymore cards and Charged Attacks, allowing him to fight armed until the very end. ｜ 「哈哈哈哈哈，我乃荒泷卡牌游戏王中王一斗，现在认输还来得及！」\n【提示】荒泷一斗的牌组以「双手剑」和「重击」为主题，能够在装备武器牌后与敌人战至最后一刻。
- Yeah... Paimon understands. Being separated without even knowing the reason why... it's just terrible. ｜ 嗯…我一直都能理解你的心情，如果连分别的理由都弄不清楚的话，就太难过了…
- Unable to start challenge with Trial Characters in your party ｜ 队伍中包含试用角色，无法开启挑战
- In some places, you will find this mysterious combo of mechanisms: the Discharge Stone and the Cumulation Stone. The former shoots a harmless electric current at characters and monsters <color=#FFE14BFF>affected by Electro</color> while the latter absorbs the electrical energy from the Discharge Stone. Sometimes you will also find Relay Stones, which conduct the current released by Discharge Stones. ｜ 在某些地方，存在着这些神秘的机关组合：「放电石」与「聚电石」。前者会对处于<color=#FFE14BFF>雷元素附着</color>状态下的角色，或魔物放出无害的电流，而后者则会吸收「放电石」放出的电力。有时也会存在「继电石」。这种装置能够传导放电石放出的电流。
- Use grimoires to activate all the mysterious bookshelves in the Faded Castle. ｜ 使用魔导书激活褪色城堡里的全部神秘书柜。
- The sky is clearing up, and so is my mood. I just hope no one shows up to bother me... If they do, I'll just make them disappear. ｜ 天气变好，我也很开心。只希望没有人来打扰…如果有，就让他们消失好了。
- Before the war, being able to treat a commissioner was an honor that I, as a countryside doctor, would never have dreamed of. ｜ 没打仗之前，给鸣神岛的奉行大人治病，是我这种乡村小医生想也不敢想的殊荣。
- Paimon means something related to dragons in *this world.* This. World! ｜ 是和这个世界的龙有关的东西啦！这个世界的，龙！
- Clearance Level Too Low ｜ 权能等阶不足
- A stylized wind glider gifted to you as a mark of Fontaine's acknowledgment and recognition. ｜ 风之翼款式。因为得到枫丹的认可与嘉许，而获赠的礼物。
- Compensate... "Titu had a flash of inspiration. Perhaps he might use this to coerce these people into helping him achieve his goals..." ｜ 赔偿…「蒂图灵光一闪，说不定能够以这样的方式要挟眼前的人达成自己的目的…」
- The Sea of Fog is a thing of the past. ｜ 「雾海」已经是过去了。
- *sob*... ｜ 呜呜…
- So, all that is to say that changing the route might be a bit hard, so we could... make the boats faster? That way, we'd shorten travel time! Hmm, but what about explanation time... ｜ 唔，所以说，修改线路可能有点困难…唔，把船的速度调快一点？这样从时间来看，就变短了！嗯…但是解说时间…
- By the time he was found, he seemed to have lost his mind. He didn't react to any external stimuli at all, he was just kneeling on the stage of the Opera Epiclese. He looked like... a doll that had just stood trial... ｜ 他被发现时精神已经失常，对外界的刺激都没了反应，只是跪在欧庇克莱歌剧院的舞台上。那样子…就像一只接受审判的玩偶。
- Talk to Xavier to begin the shoot ｜ 与泽维尔对话以开始拍摄
- Pfft! Hehehe... ｜ 噗…呵呵呵呵…
- #No, that can't be {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} either. There's no tail-scarf. ｜ #也不对，尾巴上没有丝巾，不是{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}呢。
- Kompore the Cunning ｜ 狡诈的康波雷
- Don't be disheartened, this falls entirely within my expectations. Besides, getting these items back? I'd call this a very worthwhile experiment. ｜ 不用太沮丧，这也在预料之中，而且能回收失物，这次实验已经非常有价值了。
- You meet a strange person outside the forest. ｜ 在树林外，你看见了一个奇怪的人…
- Bantan Sango is my house of wisdom. The world comes to Bantan Sango, not the other way around. ｜ 万端珊瑚是我的「智慧宫」。只有世界走向万端珊瑚，绝没有珊瑚走向世界的道理。
- Some kind of seal was cast upon me, and I lost my power. ｜ 我也被神封印，失去了原本的力量
- I'd clap my hands 'till they fell off if I could — but then I couldn't write another story, so forgive me for not doing so. ｜ 如果可以，我愿意为你把我的双手拍烂…不过考虑到之后可能还要用它们写故事，所以请原谅我没法这么做。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Thank you, good Nara, for helping Aranara. I have a gift... ｜ 谢谢好那菈帮助了兰那罗，回礼…
- We're pals now! ｜ 我们已经是好朋友了！
- When she heard why I'd come, she agreed to my request. She then taught me quite a few survival lessons, and tutored me on how to take care of Fungi. ｜ 听说我的来意后，海妮耶答应了我的请求，给我好好上了几堂雨林生存课，教会了我照顾蕈兽的要点。

- I suspect so. ｜ 我的确是这么想的。
- "Spino Doubleblaster" ｜ 「飞迸湍流二重奏」
- Honore ｜ 奥诺雷
- After we defeat them, we can finally have a serious talk with their boss and get him to lend us the Divine Knowledge Capsule! ｜ 等我们打败他们，就能跟他们老大好好聊一聊，让他把神明罐装知识借给我们看看了！
- Jiangli ｜ 江蓠
- Huh? Wait, is that who Paimon thinks it is? It's Ei! ｜ 咦？站在那儿的是…影！
- Don't say that, Madam Faruzan... ｜ 不要难过，珐露珊前辈…

- S—S—Sorry for the interruption... ｜ 打打打…打断各位英雄一下…
- Investigate the surrounding area ｜ 到周围调查
- Message ｜ 留言
- She's a Knight of Favonius. She wouldn't do such a thing. ｜ 她是西风骑士，不会做这种事情。
- Amidst the Fleeing Smoke ｜ 「于散逸的浮烟中」
- Fishnado ｜ 翻鱼搅浪
- This device is of the same breed as the Melodic Blooms in the Golden Apple Archipelago, and are copies of the curious plants present in "The Islands' Stirring Strings." Their functions are somewhat different, but they have similar internal structure.\nConstructs that yearn for lovely melodies, when awakened by lilting dulcet notes, will give their own spirited reply. They are more than willing to generously offer people the extraordinary experience of riding on the winds of music.\nPlace "Allegro Bloom: Special Tuning" to continuously unleash a wind current. ｜ 与金苹果群岛的「音律花」同族的奇妙机关，也是「鸣弦列岛」上奇妙植物的摹本，虽然功能略有不同，但有着相仿的内在机理。\n渴望美妙旋律的造物，一旦被悠扬的音符唤醒，就会给出昂扬的回应。让人们在乐音中乘着轻风上行，获得格外明快的体验，正是它们热情的馈赠。\n摆放「疾奏音律花·特殊调弦」后，将持续生成风场。

- Hmph. Good. She's more suited to that work than I. ｜ 哼。那就好。她比我适合多了。
- *sigh* Well, even if my job situation is beyond hope, I should still get this cart to its destination. ｜ 唉，我肯定完蛋了，但是这车酒还是要运到才行。
- So you come and wait here through the night a few times a month just because of that promise? ｜ 哇…你们居然为了这句承诺，每个月的这几天都要冒着风险半夜守在这里？
- Huh? Wait a second... ｜ 哎？！等等…

- Grroo... ｜ 唔…

- That's how you explain throughput capacity? ｜ 原来「吞吐量」是这么理解的…
- Yeah! If the hilichurls raided the caravan, they would've taken the carts apart on the spot. But we're not seeing any carts, or any parts... Paimon thinks that's kind of weird! ｜ 对哦！如果是丘丘人抢劫了商队，应该会把马车留在原地慢慢拆解，但是我们既没看到马车，也没看到马车的零件…真是奇怪！
- No matter. My plan has already succeeded. ｜ 但没关系，我的计划已经成功了。

- Really... ｜ 会吗…

- I still need time to prepare. ｜ 还要再准备一下。
- Don't overthink it. Life's like a placid lake most of the time. You just need to get used to it. ｜ 别想太多，嗯，很多时候，生活就是没什么波澜的，习惯就好。
- Stamina Consumption decreased by 80%. ｜ 体力消耗降低80%。

- While your $[A1504] has <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C115041]</color> attached, your use of <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S15042]</color> will cost 1 less {SPRITE_PRESET#1105}<color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo Die</color>. (Every attachment of <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C115041]</color> allows the effect to be triggered twice) ｜ 装备有此牌的$[A1504]附属<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C115041]</color>期间，使用<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S15042]</color>时少花费1个{SPRITE_PRESET#1105}<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素</color>。（每附属1次<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C115041]</color>，可触发2次）
- Alright, Paimon, you're up. Time to give Crimson Cyclone a shot, maybe it'll end this losing streak of mine. ｜ 喂，小家伙，把你的「深红旋风」拿出来，帮我出这口恶气。
- For regular citizens, I help escort them safely to the city, to Springvale, or wherever. ｜ 唔，如果是普通的蒙德市民的话，我会负责护送到蒙德城或清泉镇…
- My mother took me with her to personally apologize to the client several times. ｜ 母亲拉着我去道了好几次歉。
- Goblet of Aquilo ｜ 北风之盏
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- He wants to... Actually, never mind, you can find everything you need to know inside the handbook. ｜ 它想要…唔…不管了，只要查看我的手册就能找到的！
- Traveler, come with me. Let's ask around to see what happened. ｜ 旅行者，你我先行一步，去轻策庄找村里人打听打听情况。
- Actually, we don't know much about that place either. In fact, we only came over here 'cause we heard YOU talking about it, and wanted to learn more. ｜ 但我们对那个地方也没什么了解…反倒是听你们说的有了兴趣，才过来旁听的。
- Too many attempts ｜ 操作过于频繁
- Well, how is it? Are you enjoying the feast today? If there's anything you're unhappy with, just let me know. I'll be sure to take note of it. ｜ 怎么样，今天的宴会还开心吗？有什么不满意也可以跟我说，我会改进的。
- However, Pneumousia Cores are relatively inefficient energy sources, and they have to keep up a continuous output of energy to reach the activation threshold of this contraption here. ｜ 但「芒荒湮灭能核心」是一种相对低效的能源，它必须要持续输出能量，才能达到这个大家伙的启动阈值。
- ... ｜ ……
- And of course, you can pick what dish to help with, since you are only one person. ｜ 当然，你也只有一个人，所以你就挑一道你感兴趣的菜帮忙吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- button: Hold for a Charged Attack ｜ 键（长按）：重击
- The best way to understand someone is by spending time with them, whether they're an old friend or a new acquaintance... ｜ 无论是相识已久的好友，还是初次邂逅的某人，了解他们的最好方法，或许就是与之共同度过一段时光…
- If I chose you to create the design for my project, I should have a bit more faith in your vision. ｜ 既然找你来做这个工程，就应该对你有更多信任。
- Thankfully Lisa's there... ｜ 还好，还有丽莎在…
- That's what the Masters of the Night-Wind told me during one of those therapy sessions. I'm paying them after all, so they have to give me some useful advice at least. ｜ 付费咨询的时候，烟谜主的人这么跟我说的。好歹花了钱，总得得到点有用的建议吧。
- A precious strongbox that contains a billet filled with potential. It is capable of changing its shape to fit the wishes of its owner.\n\nUse this item to choose one of the following items:\n·Midlander Sword Billet\n·Midlander Bow Billet\n·Midlander Claymore Billet\n·Midlander Catalyst Billet\n·Midlander Polearm Billet ｜ 蕴含着充满可能性的原胚的宝匣，会随着主人的愿望幻现为对应武器类型的原胚。\n\n使用后可从以下选项中选择一项获取:\n·央陆单手剑原胚\n·央陆弓原胚\n·央陆双手剑原胚\n·央陆法器原胚\n·央陆长柄武器原胚
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- You're absolutely right! Hey, you're actually really good at motivating people! ｜ 确实是这样呢！砂糖还挺会鼓舞人的嘛。
- #{SPACE}Every level will increase <color=#B09057FF>Elemental Mastery</color> by 75. ｜ 每一级会使其<color=#B09057FF>元素精通</color>提升75点。
- Merchants from all over will set up shop. There'll be tons of stuff to eat, use, and wear... More than you can count! ｜ 四面八方的商人都会过来摆摊，各种吃的、用的、穿的商品数都数不清！
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- There are so many petals here, too... This can't be a coincidence. ｜ 这么多花瓣出现在这里…应该不会是偶然。
- Kidane ｜ 基达内
- Neko Is a Cat: The Children ｜ 寝子是只猫·孩子们
- Ruined Rug ｜ 残破的毛毯
- Humanity's best friend!\nThese dogs come from a mixed bloodline, and their multicolored fur has three different hues. They have a powerful physique and are quite intelligent, and thus are often raised as either pets or working dogs.\nIn the Realm Within, these exceptionally active canines are very sensitive to the smell of exotic foods, and no edible plants, not even grasses or flowers can escape their desire to just take a bite and see what it tastes like... ｜ 人类最好的朋友！\n毛皮呈三色的犬类，有着多种犬类相融的血统，体格健壮，较为聪敏，多被当做宠物犬和工作犬培育。\n来到壶中洞天后，这种犬类对于「异国食物」的气息似乎相当敏感，异常活跃，总想把各种能吃的植物都试一遍，看见花花草草也会试探性咬上一口，尝尝味道…
- Alright, we're off! See you later, Chief! ｜ 好，那我们走了，帕加尔叔叔！
- A compactly-designed Inazuman dwelling that can be found in Watatsumi Island's Bourou Island. These buildings are often used as storehouses and their attics are particularly suited to storing coral branches.\nThe commonly-found purple dyes and trace amounts of coral powder are mixed together and treated with strong alcohol such that they will turn into a vibrant rose-red under the sun — this is exactly the same color used in Watatsumi soldiers' uniforms. As such, some children of Bourou Village believe that samurai will gain the blessings of the sea corals within such buildings, granting them wondrous powers with which they can protect Watatsumi Island from invasion and harm. ｜ 构型紧凑的稻妻民居，可见于海祇岛的望泷村。这种房屋通常被当成储物间使用，阁楼的空间尤其适合存放珊瑚枝。\n常见的紫色染料与少量珊瑚的粉末混合，经过烈酒的调和后，会在阳光下逐渐转变为明丽的玫红色，正是海祇岛军队服装所用的色彩。因此，在望泷村的孩子深信着一则传说——武士们会在这种小屋里接受海中珊瑚的祈福，获得奇妙的力量，保卫海祇岛免受侵害。
- ...You told them where I was? ｜ …你告诉了他们我在这里？
- ...Please, go back and tell them to send Yelan instead. ｜ …能否替我回告，换别人来。
- Recipe ｜ 食谱
- #Our Head Nurse and {NICKNAME} and Paimon did most of the heavy lifting, I would say. ｜ #主要是靠护士长，以及{NICKNAME}和派蒙的帮助。
- A precious medicinal ingredient that has lost all medicinal value after years in storage. ｜ 是珍贵的药材，但存放了这么久已经失去了药用价值。
- You... you vermin! Scum of a guard! ｜ 你是…看守里的败类！蛀虫！

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character uses a Normal Attack:</color> {SPRITE_PRESET#2100}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Physical DMG</color> dealt by the character is converted to {SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>. If the character is in the {SPRITE_PRESET#3504}Ousia state, heal all of your characters on standby for 1 HP. If the character is in the {SPRITE_PRESET#3505}Pneuma state, deal +2 DMG for this instance, but deal 1 Piercing DMG to your character who has taken the least DMG.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>Usage(s): 1</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>角色进行普通攻击时：</color>使角色造成的{SPRITE_PRESET#2100}<color=#FFFFFFFF>物理伤害</color>变为{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>。如果角色处于「{SPRITE_PRESET#3504}荒」形态，则治疗我方所有后台角色1点；如果角色处于「{SPRITE_PRESET#3505}芒」形态，则此伤害+2，但是对一位受伤最少的我方角色造成1点穿透伤害。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>可用次数：1</color>

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The Natlanese seem to do a lot of doodling everywhere. Except they don't call it "doodling," do they? They call it, uh... flow-something?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> "Phlogiston engraving." But strictly speaking, that refers to the engraving of special stone tablets. What you're talking about is just regular graffiti.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Take this one, for example. It basically just says, "You're in Nanatzcayan territory now! Children of Echoes for the win!"\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> That's pretty fun! Now Paimon wants in. Shall we do some graffiti of our own?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> We sure can. But what do you think we should draw?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well that's easy — a portrait of the best travel guide in all of Teyvat! Now let's see... Ah, there! Put it right there on that cliff face.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> So you want me to do the honors, huh? Alright then, lemme think about this... Yep, first we need to capture that classic Paimon facial expression: seething with rage...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Mhm-hmm— Wait, what!? Grr... You know what, forget it! Paimon has decided to find a professional Natlanese graffiti artist instead! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>纳塔的人很喜欢在各种地方涂涂画画呢，我记得他们是叫作燃素…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>是「燃素刻录」啦。不过只有刻在特殊的石碑上的才是真正的「燃素刻录」，这些就只是单纯的涂鸦而已。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>比如这幅就像是在说，「喂，这里是我们的地盘，『回声之子』天下第一！」\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>感觉很有意思呢！既然这样，{NICKNAME}，我们也来留下自己的涂鸦吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>听起来不错，不过我们的话要画些什么呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那当然是要留下提瓦特大陆最棒向导的画像啦！嘿嘿，不如就在那边的岩壁上…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>这样啊，那画师自然就是我了。让我想想，派蒙的话，首先应该是气鼓鼓的脸…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯嗯…才不对吧！算了算了，还是等下次有机会的时候，让纳塔专业的画师来帮我们画好了。

- Yikes! What kind of despicable mushroom is this? Is it trying to slow us down with these Fungi? ｜ 哇！怎么会有这么卑鄙的蘑菇！是想用这些蕈兽拖住我们吗？
- A Fatui secret agent.\nThe duty of a Fatui agent is to settle debts — but not only those of a monetary or goods-in-kind nature.\nThey also ensure dues are paid when it comes to the principle of "an eye for an eye." If there is one thing the Fatui are not known for, it is leniency, and whoever dares to oppose them will invoke the full force of their wrath upon them. ｜ 隶属愚人众的特务人员。\n债务处理人所处理的「债务」，并不局限于钱货往来的清算。\n「以眼还眼，以牙还牙」也是一种债。无论是谁，只要损害了愚人众的利益，那就要十倍奉还。
- Haha, that was quick! I like your style. ｜ 哈哈，答应得真爽快啊，我喜欢！
- ...I suppose so. ｜ …确实。

- Hmm? What a unique aroma... ｜ 欸？好独特的香气…

- *cough* But, uh, please, let me finish! ｜ 咳咳…但是…！请听我把话说完！
- Tch! Listen, I can almost guarantee that it was the Takatsukasa Clan who invited Sango to investigate. We all knew that Ryuuji was just a scapegoat, you think the Takatsukasa Clan wouldn't figure that out? They're not stupid. ｜ 嘁！你们听我说，这个珊瑚社长呢，肯定是鹰司家请来的，鹰司家也不蠢啊，我们都知道龙二是个替死鬼，他们不知道吗？
- "This is only the beginning!" ｜ 「才刚开始呢！」
- Well, that is to say that I'm like someone who repairs barrels, and who needs a single plank of wood to finish my wooden barrel. ｜ 哦，就是说，我就像一个箍木桶的人，现在还缺一块木板，就能把木桶做完了。
- Alright, I'm back! I used cast iron, so it should be hot enough! ｜ 来了来了，我直接用铁盘煎了一下，这个温度应该够高！

- No... Vigneire, she can't hate me... Let me see her, please, have mercy... ｜ 不…薇涅尔，她恨我…不…让我见她，求求你们…

- A counter used in a teahouse that is made out of Maple Wood that has been painted in deep colors.\nThis sort of counter has a secret room on the inside and storage space ample enough to hold fourteen dogs the size of Taroumaru, hence its nickname, "Toshimaru."\nThere seems to be no difference in the outer and inner face of the counter, and even the staff sometimes cannot tell which side is which. ｜ 茶室所用的柜台，以深色漆面的「枫木」打造。\n这种柜台内侧有着活动的暗门，内部储存空间宽裕，据说足以装下十四只「太郎丸」体型的狗狗，因而有了「十四丸」的别号。\n柜台内外两侧的造型几乎没有区别，茶室的工作人员有时也无法分辨正确的朝向。
- Before you know it, the sun has set, and everyone breaks for the night. ｜ 很快便到了夜晚，大家各自散去…

- Well? Is everything clear? ｜ 还有什么不明白的吗？
- They say that alchemical divination is the Dendro Archon's divine revelation. So then, if Nahida has referred to herself as the Moon... ｜ 炼金占卜据说是神明的启示，纳西妲又曾把自己比作「月亮」，看来…
- If you've got any good ideas, feel free to just hum 'em for me. I'll jot them down. ｜ 有好点子的话，可以和我分享，随便哼哼旋律也行，我会帮你记下来的。
- (So Jurieu had a confrontation with a girl named Lourvine, who also frequently visits the infirmary... I'll remember that, too.) ｜ （还有一位与朱里厄起过争执的，名叫露尔薇的女性也经常出入医务室…嗯，记住了。）
- Ah, how about our Captain Beidou? I think she would be great. ｜ 我说，要么考虑下北斗姐？我觉得她就很合适。

- Aha, there IS something hiding here! Yup, this looks like our ticket outta this place! ｜ 这里果然藏了东西！我们应该能用它脱身！

- I know of you, Traveler. You're Ningguang's guests, yes? Didn't expect to meet you here in the mountains. ｜ 我知道你的事，旅行者，你是凝光的客人吧？没想到会在山间偶遇。

- G—Ghost! There's a ghost! ｜ 有鬼，有鬼出来了！
- Listen carefully to my instructions. I don't want any mishaps. Every machine here is worth more than the both of you! ｜ 认真听好你们的工作内容，别出任何岔子，这里任何一样机械都比你们两个加起来还贵！

- They're lucky that I'm very patient, and can help them slowly turn all of those outlandish ideas into reality. ｜ 还好我很有耐心，可以慢慢帮他们把那些奇奇怪怪的主意转化成可以实现的样子。
- I'm sorry... ｜ 抱歉…
- According to Collins, the pankration tournament only took place because the Fonta company sponsored it. The company must want a return on their investment as well. ｜ 根据科林斯所说，拳力斗技大赛是依靠枫达公司的赞助才举办的。想必枫达公司也应该有着自己的目的吧。
- I give offerings from the mystic smoke: The gift of stars on a moonless night, a wreath of dreams in the swirling wind. ｜ 自秘烟中献上供奉。星星献予无月之夜，梦的花环献予风。

- Ah, you're here. Everything's been taken care of now. I was just about to go have a rest. ｜ 噢，你们来了啊，事情都处理完了。呼啊…我正打算去睡觉呢。
- Although he has the right to know the truth, the closer he draws to things hidden out of sight, the closer he also draws to danger. I had to confirm whether Kazuha has both the will and ability to be privy to the truth. ｜ 虽说他有权知道真相，但接触秘密同样意味着接近危险。我必须确认，万叶是否有了解真相的「意愿」与「能力」。
- So this is what Lisa's like when she's hard at work... ｜ 这就是工作中的丽莎小姐吗…
- No, wait... I'm not a mujina or a tanuki. I'm Sayu! ｜ 不对…不是狸猫也不是貉，是早柚！
- Would you mind going around and fetching them for me? I have a few other things to take care of. ｜ 可以麻烦你们走这一趟吗？我还需要做些事先准备。
- No, no. No need to seriously consider it. It's just a little fantasy of mine. ｜ 不用，不用，不需要认真考虑，这只是我的私心啦。
- Tsk... What's with you guys!? Go get him! Whoever takes him down gets double! ｜ 啧…你们是没吃饭吗！？给我上！放倒了他，报酬翻两倍！
- Yikes! This isn't what Paimon meant by unexpected... ｜ 呜哇！不对不对，我说的不是这种意外啦！

- I'm Lisa, the librarian. Do you need anything, cutie? ｜ 我是管理书籍资料的丽莎，有什么想问我的吗，小可爱？
- Steam replete with orchids' hint, complexions flushed in a glowing pink tint. ｜ 气浮兰芳满，色涨桃花然。
- Jeez... ｜ 真是绝了…
- She's my source of knowledge. I'm merely the representation of how she would be if she were rested and healthy. ｜ 我的知识来源于她，我所展现出来的能力，象征着她休息充分，内心健康时的理想状态。
- But you? You're pretty lean — not yet one of those gym addicts obsessed with their daily lifts and bench-presses, I'm sure. ｜ 不过看你身材挺苗条的，应该还没有变成每天疯狂举重卧推的健身狂。

- Certified player Ms. Bai. The current miller of Qingce Village inherited her father's business. She practices her skills at cards with Granny Ruoxin when she is at leisure, a process that has made her a rather good player in her own right. ｜ 协会认证牌手小白。轻策庄的磨坊主，继承了父亲的生意。平日清闲时，会陪着若心练习牌技，很快成为了一名技术不错的牌手。

- Yeah, don't you know? These huge mushrooms that grow in the rainforest can be sold for quite a good sum in the city. ｜ 对啊，你不知道吗？这种雨林里生长的大蘑，拉到城里可以卖上不少钱呢。

- Ha, I don't usually believe these things unless I see one with my own eyes. ｜ 哈，除非亲眼见到，我是不太相信这种传说的啦。

- Kujou Kamaji has proved his will, and Ei has acknowledged it. You sense that Ei's attitude is different from normal. She might have something to say to you. ｜ 九条镰治证明了自身的意志，影也表示了她的认可。你察觉到影和平时的态度有所不同，应该是有话想对你说。
- Haha, I didn't expect Demoiselle to come and pick it up in person. It's just a uniform, after all. Any of your folks could have come instead. ｜ 这点小事，请手下来办也没问题啊，大小姐竟然亲自跑一趟。
- Here's your payment, Traveler. Thank you ever so much for your help. ｜ 这是您的报酬，旅行者，非常感谢您。
- I'm just glad I didn't turn out to be an inconvenience. ｜ 还好，没有给你们添太多麻烦。
- I fear it must be Jakob. ｜ 恐怕是雅各布吧。
- Mosi mita! ｜ Mosi mita!
- Yep, it was! I'll be extra careful with it from now on. When mom gets back, she'll be so sad if she finds out I broke it... ｜ 嗯，是的！我以后会非常小心，要是妈妈回来发现梳子坏了，一定会伤心的…
- Wait... Have we met before? ｜ …嗯，等等，我们见过吗？
- I learned a lot with her and I'm getting more skilled at bargaining with vendors than ever. ｜ 这些年和姨妈学了不少东西，跟商贩们砍价也越来越熟练了。
- A warrior with a perfect face, a person who conforms to every boring standard, will not be recognized as a hero here in Natlan. ｜ 一个长着一张完美的脸的勇士，一切都合乎一个无聊标准的人，不会是我们纳塔承认的英雄。
- Hopefully there won't be any more data errors this time... ｜ 希望这次的数据不要再有误差了…
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 rapid strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，瞬间向前方挥出两剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 点按伤害|{param1:P}
- To witness such history with one's own eyes, and then record all of it in a true, complete and clear manner for posterity, is what a historian should do. ｜ 亲眼见证这样的历史，然后真实、完整、清晰地将这一切记录成册，留给后人，就是历史学者所要做的事情。
- Complete "Black Stone Under a White Stone" ｜ 完成「黑石湮落白石下」剧情
- If I know how to make wine, then I know what is in father and mother's wine. ｜ 知道，酒怎么做，也…能知道，爸爸妈妈的酒里，有什么。
- Re—really? That's good... ｜ 是、是这样吗？那就好…
- But what concerns me most is that when we did an inventory check afterward, not a single Mora was found to be missing. ｜ …不过最让我在意的是，经过清点后发现，里面存放的摩拉分文不少…
- Fontaine, of course, Fontaine! The Palais Mermonia, our energy situation, our top-down system... We have so many problems here. Can't you see? ｜ 枫丹！我在说枫丹！沫芒宫、能源模式、这自上而下的机制体系…枫丹存在那么多问题，你看不见吗？
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- A background element that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 祝柬的衬底，可用于装饰祝柬。

### Part 160

- Of course. I'm here to welcome you and our dear Miss Charlotte, whom our good Head Nurse recommended to me. ｜ 是啊，迎接你们二位，和由护士长引荐的记者夏洛蒂小姐。
- A forging blueprint passed down from ancient times in Natlan. Learn it and you can restore Ring of Yaxche (Catalyst). ｜ 纳塔自古流传至今的武器锻造图谱。掌握后，能复刻出法器「木棉之环」。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param4:F1P}
- Yellowed Letter ｜ 发黄的信件
- The—The Anemo Archon statue's hand? How did she even get up there? ｜ 风，风神像的手上？！她到底是怎么爬上去的…
- The Thing From Below ｜ 来自地下之物
- Vicious monsters have been reported around the Stormbearer Mountains. ｜ 骑士团接到报告，望风山地一带有危险的魔物出没。
- Traveler ｜ 主角
- Yikes, maybe it's us! Where is that Millelith squad... ｜ 啊！难道它们准备埋伏的是…我们要找的千岩军小队？
- Wait just a while longer. It will end soon. ｜ 你再等一下。就快结束了。
- Something seems to be the matter with Benben. It seems like... it wants to go down? ｜ 奔奔这是怎么了？它好像想往下层走？
- I don't know much about this game, but I'll do my best! ｜ 虽然我不太熟悉「七圣召唤」这游戏…但我会加油的！
- Tamoto Attack Interval|{param4:F1}s ｜ 袖攻击间隔|{param4:F1}秒
- That's great! You've always been a quiet person, so I was afraid you wouldn't like this kind of event. ｜ 太好了，看你这样文静，我之前还怕你不喜欢这种活动。
- A feather left behind by a long-extinct bird species. It was inlaid with gold and gems by the ancient adherents of the Goddess of Flowers. ｜ 早已绝迹的鸟类留下的羽毛，被古代花神的信徒镶嵌了亮丽的黄金与宝石。
- Exactly. ｜ 对。
- Camera has been adjusted to the correct angle ｜ 已经将镜头转至正确角度
- Sumeru researchers? ｜ 是须弥的学者？
- Mary-Ann ｜ 「玛丽安」
- Preposterous! I am the Prinzessin der Verurteilung! What mortal follies could venture to imprint themselves upon my psyche? ｜ 愚谬！吾乃断罪之皇女，凡间情愫何至于将我之心灵污扰？
- Hold DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 长按伤害|{param4:P}
- I didn't think much of it at first. I mean, I don't know the first thing about growing plants anyway. Later, however, I heard Kachina say that some people got sick. ｜ 开始我没在意，我本来就搞不懂怎么养绿植。可后来我听卡齐娜说，族里一些人生了病。
- Wait, Ayaka, so do you mean that— ｜ 绫华，你的意思难道是…
- Raisa ｜ 愚人众·莱莎
- Wh—Who are you! How did you get in here!? ｜ 什、什么人！你们是怎么进来的？！
- Sure did. ｜ 买到了。
- I don't mean to impose, Sir Kujou. In fact, I'm not here on official business at all. ｜ 九条大人客气了。我此番前来，为的不是公务。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Reputation Level: <color=#FFCC33>8</color> ｜ 声望等级：<color=#FFCC33>8级</color>
- That way, she should be able to see it. ｜ 这样的话，她应该就能看到了。
- Now that I think about it, I guess we're all unlucky here. ｜ 仔细想想，你们也和我一样不走运。
- So... this giant statue— ｜ 巨人像的意思是…？
- Talents ｜ 天赋
- You have mountains, and bodies of water, food and fun, and everything to like! ｜ 你这里有山有水，有吃有玩，好得很。

- Head over to the Guizhong Ballista ｜ 前往归终机附近
- Oh, right. We forgot to ask Xiangjun where she lives in Qiaoying Village... Let's go back there and ask around! ｜ 对了，我们忘记问香莙她住在翘英庄哪里了…要不先回去找人问问吧！
- Now that you mention it... Didn't you help Boss out a lot at the last one of these? The Almighty Arataki Extraordinary and Exhilarating Extreme Beetle Brawl? ｜ 这么一说…我记得，之前举办「荒泷极意堂堂斗虫大试合」的时候，你们好像帮了老大不少忙？
- Ores are pretty useful. You need them too, right? ｜ 矿石也算是挺有用的东西了，你也需要的吧。
- No more rolling Elemental Dice during the Roll Phase.\nObtain 8 Omni Dice directly! ｜ 投掷阶段不再投掷元素骰，\n直接获得8个「万能元素」！
- I've heard that Chef Mao of the Wanmin Restaurant knows how to make Black-Back Perch Stew — you can ask him. ｜ 水煮黑背鲈的话「万民堂」的卯师傅好像会做，你可以去问问他。
- Re... ward? ｜ 报…酬？
- And what did you think it would be otherwise? ｜ 不然呢？！
- Whoa, then you must be pretty tired after work every day, right? I mean, you have to swim all that way just to go home. ｜ 哇，那你们每天下班一定很累吧？要游好远好远的路呢！
- "Yumemizuki's Cozy Corner is here to help. The special psychotherapy services offered by our dream-eating baku can help dispel the shadows in your soul." ｜ 「梦见月的舒心小站等候您的来访，希望食梦貘一族特别的心理疗法能为您扫清阴霾。」
- Traveler, can I borrow you for a second? ｜ 旅行者，过来一下！
- Hello there, old friend. ｜ 久违了，老友。
- Voting Results for the Emissary's Outfit ｜ 演武华服投票结果公示
- Inazuma Exploration Progress: <color=#FFCC33>40%</color> ｜ 稻妻探索度达到<color=#FFCC33>40%</color>
- Him ｜ Him
- "Great, send ten crates of Dandelion Wine to the Fortress of Meropide then." ｜ 「那你送十箱蒲公英酒到梅洛彼得堡来吧。」
- That Seelie's stopped. Is this where it intended to come all along? ｜ 仙灵停下来了呢，难道说，它就是想要过来这里吗？
- (Let's leave quietly.) ｜ （悄悄离开吧。）
- ...What did you say? ｜ 你说什么…？
- Max Cutting DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 最大切割伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Why would you put it like that? Isn't staying here all day and serving as the manager of the Fortress a kind of sentence unto itself, another form of prison? I just happen to have some support from the rest of the inmates, that's all. ｜ 什么话？都当梅洛彼得堡的管理者了，天天待在这里，不就是变相坐牢吗？只是这里的人比较服我。
- Come forth, Chosen of Dragons, come forth... ｜ 前来觐见，受龙所选者，前来觐见。
- Two, four, five... Oh, looks like I missed the beat again. ｜ 二、四、五…哦，我好像又打错拍子了。
- While Preparing Skill: -50% DMG taken. ｜ 准备技能期间：受到的伤害减半。
- Good Afternoon ｜ 中午好…
- Hold on, please take this first! ｜ 且慢，请先收下这个！
- Able to produce endless salt... The God of Salt is powerful indeed! ｜ 能够产生无穷无尽的盐，果然，「盐之魔神」所拥有的权能是很强大的！
- Dehya, is that you? Haha, what a coincidence! You're here for a drink, too? ｜ 迪希雅？哈哈，真巧啊，你也来喝酒？
- Why did you run? ｜ 那你为什么要跑？
- Also — if you come across anything to do with a sword, anything at all, please bring it back to me. ｜ 还有，如果发现了什么与「剑」有关的东西，记得拿回来给我。
- Unlock the "Opera Epiclese" Teleport Waypoint in Fontaine ｜ 解锁「枫丹 欧庇克莱歌剧院」传送锚点
- I fight for the everlasting future of Inazuma. However long the battle may last, it is but a drop in the ocean of eternity. ｜ 若是为了稻妻无穷的未来，我的战斗无论多漫长，在「永恒」中也只如一瞬。
- Wow, I'd never have guessed you'd do so well — I clearly underestimated you! ｜ 啊，我倒是没想到你能冲出这么好的成绩，是我小看人了。
- Don't worry. This shouldn't take long. ｜ 嗯。放心，时间不会太长。
- Wow! ｜ 喔——
- Caribert ｜ 卡利贝尔
- About Mavuika ｜ 关于玛薇卡…
- Buildings that you're used to seeing up close suddenly look like tiny little boxes, and mountain peaks that you normally see from far below seem an arm's length away... ｜ 习以为常的建筑变得像箱子一样小，在地面时只能仰望的山石，一伸手就能够触碰得到…
- #There's just one chest left to find now! Come on, {NICKNAME}, let's finish all of the Returning Curios! ｜ #现在还有一个宝藏没找到呢！{NICKNAME}，我们先完成整个「千奇澴回」吧。
- Talk to Honglang ｜ 与宏朗对话

- This is one of the places mentioned by Stevens too. ｜ 这里也是史蒂文斯标记的地点之一。
- I thought he must have been someone from the Adventurers' Guild here for the event. But after a few words of conversation, it was clear that he was having memory problems. He didn't even know his own name. ｜ 我当时以为他是冒险家协会的人，也是来参加活动的。聊了几句才发现，好多事情他都记不得了，连自己的名字都不知道。
- You're taking too long! Sorry, can't afford to waste precious time on people like... ｜ 接待您已经耗费了我很多时间了，我可不能把宝贵的时间浪费在你这种…
- Arana was in the ground to preserve Ararakalari powers. This way, Narana won't wither. But Bija, still needed, for her to be strong again. ｜ 兰拉娜在地里面，维持兰迦拉梨的力量。这样的话，那菈拉娜就不会枯萎。但是，要重新变得强壮，还是需要惟耶之实。
- *sigh* You're even more impressive than I could have imagined. To be willing to give your all to resolve others' pain... Truly, you are great heroes. ｜ 唉，你们比我想象的还要了不起。你们愿意为解决他人的痛苦而付出自己的力量，真的，真的是很了不起的英雄。
- A contest? Ooh, Paimon gets it. This must be that sorta competition to see who can jump the best. ｜ 竞赛？唔…我知道！肯定是那种，比赛谁跳得最好的比赛吧。

- Listen to Reasoned Inquiry: Rank II ｜ 聆音察理·二阶
- Let's go save 'em! ｜ 我们快去救救他！
- Seriously! Seriously! ｜ 哎呀！哎呀！
- They seem to be here to participate just like everyone else. ｜ 好像是很正常的参加者。
- Ah, I thought I was going to win, but I guess I overthought the whole thing, haha... ｜ 啊，我还以为我能赢呢，看来是我想多啦，哈哈…
- Wait for the guard to reach the designated spot ｜ 等待看守到达指定位置
- It may take Master a little time to find my will in the new world. But do not worry. We will meet there again! ｜ 大师在新世界可能得花点功夫寻回我的意志了，不过不用担心。我们新世界再会！
- The great Xbalanque, impressed upon a child's body, found less than a third of his original strength available to him. In that form, I'd lost my strength of body. ｜ 伟大的希巴拉克附身在一个孩子身上，立刻受到限制，发挥不出原本实力的三分之一。这便是失去了肉体的强大。
- Though with you here, there was never a need to worry in the first place. ｜ 不过以你们的实力，应该不需要担心。
- What a shame. You'd have done so well too, Paimon. ｜ 好遗憾，不然就能让派蒙参赛了。

- ...If you had informed me sooner, there'd be plenty of room for us to... ｜ …早点通知我，我们大可以…
- Hmm... No, it's nothing, really. ｜ 不，没什么事…
- But the power of the Inscription is also hidden within. ｜ 但铭印内部蕴含的力量也藏在其中。
- And you are... ｜ 你是…

- A common bird feather. Experts use it to practice strength control, while rookies use it to make fans. ｜ 随处可见的鸟类落毛，高手用来练习力道，新手则用来制成扇子。

- That would be the drink talking... ｜ 已经开始说胡话了…
- Vanarana ｜ 桓那兰那
- We think Auntie Atea's illness has taken a turn for the better. ｜ 听我说玛拉妮，阿伽娅的病有好转的迹象，你知道吗？
- What is he doing back here? Let's go check it out! ｜ 他怎么回来了？我们快过去看看吧！
- Pele Nui ｜ 佩蕾·努伊
- Mom! ｜ 妈妈…！
- If you choose to flee and go into exile now... ｜ 如果你现在开始逃亡…
- Even her... guardian, I guess? This guy called the Cavalry Captain, I think. Either way, he got grounded too, and he was supposed to come with her. ｜ 就连预计要一起来的那位，她的监护人…什么骑兵队长的…也一并被关了禁闭。
- Gain a total of 12 stars in the Spiral Abyss ｜ 累计获得深境螺旋12星通关奖励
- Vichama didn't argue. He knew going to the front lines with an injured leg would make him a burden in battle. So, they raised the issue with the Pyro Archon, and she agreed to let him stay behind. ｜ 维查玛同样认为瘸着腿去前线是个累赘，于是众人一起向火神大人提出请求，最后得到了许可。

- Eh, what was so good about that bag, anyway? I don't remember there being anything to eat in there... ｜ 唔…那个袋子有什么好看的，我记得袋子里面可没有吃的东西…
- Which building is it? ｜ 哪一座才是…
- I think it will. ｜ 大概吧。
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- This is completely unprecedented. How can we have the Iudex acting like a private detective? ｜ 我们从未有过这方面的先例，最高审判官怎么能像私家侦探一样亲自查案呢？
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Sir... We're just going to stand by and watch them leave? Surely there must be another way! ｜ 难道要眼睁睁地看着这些家伙离开吗？我不甘心！
- Hmph, you guys teamed up to scare Paimon just now. If you think Paimon's gonna do anything you ask for, think again! ｜ 哼，你们刚才联合起来吓唬我，我才不干呢！
- One is quite all right, but I don't have confidence that I'll escape from a whole group of Fontemer Aberrants. Thinking back, I did get surrounded by a group of Ball Octopuses when I was small, and I nearly drowned. ｜ 要是一只也就罢了，我可没有信心从一群原海异种的包围中脱身。说起来我小时候的确被球球章鱼包围过，还差点溺水。
- Finally, the shelf returned to the kingdom, sequestering himself in the corner of a library, and there lived alone. ｜ 最后，架子回到了王国里。他去了图书馆的角落，就那么孤独地待着。
- Thank you. You too, of course... you've done a lot here. ｜ 谢谢，倒是你…你也辛苦了。
- My mistake. ｜ 失手。
- ...Let's just go. What's the worst that could happen? ｜ …我们去就是了。最坏又能怎样呢。
- Oh, good evening. This is the Northland Bank. ｜ …啊，晚上好，这里是北国银行。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- The power of time accumulates slowly and goes unnoticed. A great price is to be paid if you wish to perform drastic changes instantly. ｜ 时间的力量积微成著，平时你不会在意，但如果想要在瞬间改变，就需要支付极大的代价。
- Plunge DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param11:F1P}
- Not to worry. We have plenty of divesuits at the Club, more than enough to get us all down there. ｜ 不用担心，俱乐部里有好几套潜水服，足够我们下去了。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- About White Iron Chunks... ｜ 关于白铁块…
- An esteemed guest from Tenshukaku has agreed to take part in this year's festival! ｜ 我们荣幸邀请到了来自天守阁的特邀嘉宾，莅临参观本次「三川花祭」！
- Ah... ｜ 啊…
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- The goods should be near the White Lift. Please bring them to me, Traveler. ｜ 那些货物应该就在白之梯附近。旅行者，请你帮我们回收一下那些货物吧。
- Nightsoul Spirit ｜ 夜魂之灵
- Attain {param0} Festive Fever ｜ 节庆热度达到{param0}
- Where are you hiding, you pesky little... ｜ …真是麻烦，到底躲哪去了？
- (The Gardemek's visible parts glow faintly with joy.) ｜ （这台警卫机关身上的部件似乎在隐隐闪光，闪光的节奏欢腾。）
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- An idiot who would get drunk and dance around the bonfire with your swords in your hands and a burnt mushroom kebab in your mouth, and trip over yourself before falling face down into a pile of mud! ｜ 喝醉了酒以后，嘴上叼着烤焦的蘑菇串，拿着双刀在篝火边跳舞，自己绊倒自己，脸朝下摔个一脸泥巴的笨蛋！
- Follow Razi to find Tanger ｜ 跟随拉齐寻找丹吉尔
- For example, the swordplay of the Knights in Mondstadt, what's that like? Does it differ from that of the martial artists we see in Liyue? ｜ 嗯…比方说，蒙德骑士们舞起剑来是什么样子，跟我们璃月的武师有何不同？
- In my spare time, I particularly enjoy taking strolls outside. It's so quiet and peaceful. ｜ 闲暇的时候，我特别喜欢在室外静静地散步。
- What's that? ｜ 那是什么？
- Ah, like a flame that appears in the darkness, so too will heroes rise up in times of great peril. Human possibility shines through in glory at moments such as this. ｜ 哎呀…就像黑暗蒙昧之时总有火光出现，呵呵，危难之际也总能傲立起了不得的豪杰。人类的可能性总在这时候变得相当耀眼啊。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Long-Necked Rhino ｜ 长颈角犀
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- It is a great honor to use a signature designed by Calx. ｜ 竟然能获得白垩老师设计的签名，真是太荣幸了。
- Plunge DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Complete {0} to unlock. ｜ 完成{0}后解锁
- Wait till the next day ｜ 等到一天后
- Haha, thank you, thank you... Even though I still have no idea what's going on, hehehe... ｜ 多谢，多谢，虽然还是摸不着头脑，哈哈…
- A risky wish. ｜ 很危险的愿望。
- The more you focus on getting one thing right, the easier it is for the rest to become cracks in the glass... ｜ 但人有八面，一面完美，剩下的可就全是破绽了。
- You've got some smooth moves, don't you? As expected of an adventurer... ｜ 你的手脚还真是麻利，不愧是冒险家啊…

- On each challenge floor, a party can have 4 members in it. If you use trial characters, you will not be able to activate the corresponding Elemental Resonances.\nIf you choose "Save Record" after completing a challenge, the characters used this time will enter Standby mode and become unable to take part in combat. Complete another floor challenge and select "Save Record" again to allow characters on Standby to once again enter combat.\nChoosing "Reset Trial" will cause all characters in this trial to no longer be on Standby. ｜ 每个阶层的挑战中，队伍中至多可编入4名角色，如果编入试用角色，则无法触发相应的元素共鸣效果。\n如果完成挑战后，选择「保存记录」，则本次出战的角色将进入「休息备战」状态，无法再次出战，完成该试验中另一阶层的挑战，并选择「保存记录」后，当前「休息备战」中的角色可以再次出战。\n「重置试验」后，当前试验中所有角色将解除「休息备战」状态。

- So if you would, please tell him that I'll be right with him shortly. ｜ 旅行者，请你先去告诉乔尔，我等一下就会过去。

- Get me a single <color=#00E1FFFF>Qingxin flower</color>, and I'll consider that payment for a detour to find this Childe fellow. How does that sound? ｜ 给我一朵<color=#00E1FFFF>清心</color>，我就当做抵了这段额外路费，再去找那个什么「公子」，怎样？

- Hmm, perhaps only absolute power could ever contend with such a catastrophe. Hehe, but who knows? We're just tiny specks in the grand scheme of things. ｜ 嗯…或许只有绝对的力量，才能与灾难抗衡吧。呵呵…谁知道呢，我们毕竟都这么渺小。

- ...Entering standby mode. Zzz... Zzz... ｜ …进入待机模式…呼，呼…

- When your characters deal Elemental DMG with a Plunging Attack: DMG +2. After the skill finishes calculating, generate 2 Elemental Dice of the same type as your active character (once per Round).\nWhen Action Phase begins, the enemy gains 3 Attrition Energy. Each time you use a Skill, remove one Attrition Energy.\n<color=#{0}>End Phase: If the opponent still has Attrition Energy remaining, all of your opponent's characters are healed for 1 HP and all remaining Attrition Energy is consumed. The healing received is increased by 1 HP for each point of Attrition Energy consumed.</color> ｜ 我方角色进行下落攻击造成元素伤害时：伤害额外+2；技能结算后，生成2个我方出战角色类型的元素骰。（每回合1次）\n行动阶段开始时，敌方获得3点「久续之能」；每当我方使用技能，就扣除1点「久续之能」。\n<color=#{0}>结束阶段：如果敌方仍有「久续之能」剩余，则治疗所有敌方角色1点并消耗所有「久续之能」，每消耗1点就使治疗量+1。</color>

- A landscape centered around various unique buildings that recreate a corner of Poisson. Structures that emphasize practicality elevate the work efficiency of those who dwell in them, though this does not immediately translate to busywork and exhaustion, but rather is a way of safeguarding one's leisurely days. Many residents of Poisson, indeed, live by the adage "Let us be done with work swiftly, so that we may enjoy our rest," living full yet simple lives. ｜ 以多种特色建筑为核心的区域景观，还原了白淞镇一角的风貌。强调实用功能的房屋和陈设能将镇内居民工作时的效率最大化，但这并不意味着忙碌与劳累，而是悠闲度日的保障——「尽快忙完每天的工作，就能尽情享受休息的时间」，部分白淞镇的居民正以这样的原则行事，充实而淳朴地生活。

- The primitive wandering inhabitants of Teyvat's wildernesses.\nThese archers wield simple crossbows, and their arrowheads are coated with a thin layer of flammable material that can set their targets on fire. El Musk of the previous generation believed that this is an innovation by brighter hilichurls who wished to cook their game after hunting it. ｜ 提瓦特荒野中游荡的原始住民。\n手持简陋弩机的射手，箭头上敷了一层薄薄的易燃材料，以便烧灼其目标。前代的艾尔·马斯克认为，这是头脑灵光的丘丘人想要在捕猎时顺便完成烹饪而为的创新之事。

- A gamepiece based on Nimble Harvester Meks — Pneuma.\nA clockwork meka designed to excavate and transport sand and soil that is powered by the energy produced from pneuma-ousia annihilation reactions. For this wargame simulation, it was designed as a unit that can only have the Pneuma alignment. Thanks to its unique appearance, it can quickly buzzsaw forward, striking targets along a straight line with considerable destructive force. Tactics developed to deal with this kind of meka can be adapted to defend against and respond to the attacks of catapults, rolling boulders, and all kinds of other tough monsters that make use of spinning movement. ｜ 以「机关·灵活采集型·芒」为原型的兵棋。\n设计用途为发掘、输送沙土的发条机关，基于荒性与芒性湮灭产生的能量而运转，在推演中被设计成仅能具备芒性特征的单位。得益于独特的外形，能运用快速翻滚冲击一条直线上的目标，破坏力可观。对抗这种机关的技巧可被活用于防御诸如投石机、落石等形式的打击，再次见到圆滚滚的坚硬魔物时，也能从容应对它们的攻势。
- It would be great if you would work with our mandate and report anything unusual at once. ｜ 所以如果您愿意配合我们教令官的工作，或者能主动上报异常情况，就再好不过了。

- I'm just glad to know that the Dopey Dazzler's been working hard in her own field... Must have been a tough road for her... ｜ 原来「炫彩呆子」也没有松懈，一直在自己的领域努力…她这一路走来一定也很不容易吧…
